data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"DisjSet dsu(3 * n);\nauto self = [\u0026amp;](int x) { return x; };\nauto eat = [\u0026amp;](int x) { return x + n; };\nauto eaten = [\u0026amp;](int x) { return x + 2 * n; };\n\n// x 与 y 同类\nif (dsu.find(eat(x)) == dsu.find(self(y)) ||\n    dsu.find(self(x)) == dsu.find(eat(y))) {\n  // 矛盾\n} else {\n  dsu.unite(self(x), self(y));\n  dsu.unite(eat(x), eat(y));\n  dsu.unite(eaten(x), eaten(y));\n}\n\n// x 吃 y\nif (dsu.find(self(x)) == dsu.find(self(y)) ||\n    dsu.find(eaten(x)) == dsu.find(self(y))) {\n  // 矛盾\n} else {\n  dsu.unite(eat(x), self(y));\n  dsu.unite(self(x), eaten(y));\n  dsu.unite(eaten(x), eat(y));\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003eDisjSet \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003edsu\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e3\u003c/span\u003e * n);\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e self = [\u0026amp;](\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e x) { \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e x; };\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e eat = [\u0026amp;](\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e x) { \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e x + n; };\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e eaten = [\u0026amp;](\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e x) { \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e x + \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e2\u003c/span\u003e * n; };\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e x 与 y 同类\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (dsu.find(eat(x)) == dsu.find(self(y)) ||\n    dsu.find(self(x)) == dsu.find(eat(y))) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 矛盾\u003c/span\u003e\n} \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelse\u003c/span\u003e {\n  dsu.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eunite\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e(x), \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e(y));\n  dsu.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eunite\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eeat\u003c/span\u003e(x), \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eeat\u003c/span\u003e(y));\n  dsu.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eunite\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eeaten\u003c/span\u003e(x), \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eeaten\u003c/span\u003e(y));\n}\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e x 吃 y\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (dsu.find(self(x)) == dsu.find(self(y)) ||\n    dsu.find(eaten(x)) == dsu.find(self(y))) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 矛盾\u003c/span\u003e\n} \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelse\u003c/span\u003e {\n  dsu.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eunite\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eeat\u003c/span\u003e(x), \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e(y));\n  dsu.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eunite\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e(x), \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eeaten\u003c/span\u003e(y));\n  dsu.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eunite\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eeaten\u003c/span\u003e(x), \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eeat\u003c/span\u003e(y));\n}\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e扩展并查集应用：\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e三倍域：\u003ccode\u003ex\u003c/code\u003e、\u003ccode\u003ex + n\u003c/code\u003e、\u003ccode\u003ex + 2n\u003c/code\u003e 分别表示不同关系类。常用于食物链：同类、捕食、被捕食。\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e二倍域：\u003ccode\u003ex\u003c/code\u003e 和 \u003ccode\u003ex + n\u003c/code\u003e 表示相反关系。常用于敌友关系、二分图染色、奇偶约束。\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e带权并查集：维护 \u003ccode\u003edist[x] = x 到 parent[x] 的关系值\u003c/code\u003e，适合关系可以用模数表示的题。\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch4 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e带权并查集\u003c/h4\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-带权并查集\" class=\"anchor\" 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003edist[x]\u003c/code\u003e 表示 \u003ccode\u003ex\u003c/code\u003e 到根的关系值，关系在 \u003ccode\u003emod\u003c/code\u003e 下运算。若要加入约束 \u003ccode\u003ex - y = w (mod mod)\u003c/code\u003e：\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"class WeightedDSU {\nprivate:\n  int mod;\n  std::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; parent, dist; // dist[x]: x 到 parent[x] 的关系\n\npublic:\n  explicit WeightedDSU(int n, int mod) : mod(mod), parent(n), dist(n, 0) {\n    std::iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);\n  }\n\n  auto find(int x) -\u0026gt; int {\n    if (parent[x] == x)\n      return x;\n    int old_parent = parent[x];\n    parent[x] = find(parent[x]);\n    dist[x] = (dist[x] + dist[old_parent]) % mod;\n    return parent[x];\n  }\n\n  auto unite(int x, int y, int w) -\u0026gt; bool {\n    int root_x = find(x), root_y = find(y);\n    if (root_x == root_y)\n      return ((dist[x] - dist[y] - w) % mod + mod) % mod == 0;\n\n    parent[root_x] = root_y;\n    dist[root_x] = ((w + dist[y] - dist[x]) % mod + mod) % mod;\n    return true;\n  }\n};\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eclass\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eWeightedDSU\u003c/span\u003e {\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eprivate:\u003c/span\u003e\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e mod;\n  std::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; parent, dist; \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e dist[x]: x 到 parent[x] 的关系\u003c/span\u003e\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003epublic:\u003c/span\u003e\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eexplicit\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eWeightedDSU\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e n, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e mod) : mod(mod), parent(n), dist(n, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e) {\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003estd::iota\u003c/span\u003e(parent.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ebegin\u003c/span\u003e(), parent.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eend\u003c/span\u003e(), \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e);\n  }\n\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003efind\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e x) -\u0026gt; int {\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (parent[x] == x)\n      \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e x;\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e old_parent = parent[x];\n    parent[x] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efind\u003c/span\u003e(parent[x]);\n    dist[x] = (dist[x] + dist[old_parent]) % mod;\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e parent[x];\n  }\n\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eunite\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e x, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e y, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e w) -\u0026gt; bool {\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e root_x = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efind\u003c/span\u003e(x), root_y = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efind\u003c/span\u003e(y);\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (root_x == root_y)\n      \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e ((dist[x] - dist[y] - w) % mod + mod) % mod == \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e;\n\n    parent[root_x] = root_y;\n    dist[root_x] = ((w + dist[y] - dist[x]) % mod + mod) % mod;\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etrue\u003c/span\u003e;\n  }\n};\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e应用换算：\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e奇偶/二分关系：\u003ccode\u003emod = 2\u003c/code\u003e，同色 \u003ccode\u003ew = 0\u003c/code\u003e，异色 \u003ccode\u003ew = 1\u003c/code\u003e。\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e食物链：\u003ccode\u003emod = 3\u003c/code\u003e，同类 \u003ccode\u003ew = 0\u003c/code\u003e，\u003ccode\u003ex\u003c/code\u003e 吃 \u003ccode\u003ey\u003c/code\u003e 可设 \u003ccode\u003ew = 1\u003c/code\u003e，\u003ccode\u003ex\u003c/code\u003e 被 \u003ccode\u003ey\u003c/code\u003e 吃可设 \u003ccode\u003ew = 2\u003c/code\u003e。\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e距离差约束：不用取模时，把 \u003ccode\u003e% mod\u003c/code\u003e 去掉，\u003ccode\u003edist\u003c/code\u003e 用 \u003ccode\u003elong long\u003c/code\u003e。\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch3 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e线段树\u003c/h3\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-线段树\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 线段树\" href=\"#线段树\"\u003e\u003csvg data-component=\"Octicon\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"class SegTree {\nprivate:\n  int n;\n  const int default_val = 0;\n  std::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; tree;\n\npublic:\n  SegTree(const std::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; \u0026amp;data)\n      : n(data.size()), tree(2 * n, 0) {\n    for (int i = 0; i \u0026lt; n; ++i) {\n      tree[i + n] = data[i];\n    }\n    for (int i = n - 1; i \u0026gt; 0; --i) {\n      tree[i] = tree[i \u0026lt;\u0026lt; 1] + tree[i \u0026lt;\u0026lt; 1 | 1];\n    }\n  }\n\n  auto update(int i, int value) -\u0026gt; void {\n    i += n;\n    tree[i] = value;\n\n    while (i \u0026gt; 1) {\n      tree[i \u0026gt;\u0026gt; 1] = tree[i] + tree[i ^ 1];\n      i \u0026gt;\u0026gt;= 1;\n    }\n  }\n\n  auto sumRange(int l, int r) -\u0026gt; int {\n    int res = default_val;\n    l += n;\n    r += n + 1;\n\n    while (l \u0026lt; r) {\n      if (l \u0026amp; 1) {\n        res = res + tree[l++];\n      }\n      if (r \u0026amp; 1) {\n        res = res + tree[--r];\n      }\n      l \u0026gt;\u0026gt;= 1;\n      r \u0026gt;\u0026gt;= 1;\n    }\n    return res;\n  }\n};\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eclass\u003c/span\u003e class=\"pl-k\"\u003econst\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e default_val = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e;\n  std::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; tree;\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003epublic:\u003c/span\u003e\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eSegTree\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003econst\u003c/span\u003e std::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; \u0026amp;data)\n      : n(data.size()), tree(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e2\u003c/span\u003e * n, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e) {\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e i = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e; i \u0026lt; n; ++i) {\n      tree[i + n] = data[i];\n    }\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e i = n - \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e; i \u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e; --i) {\n      tree[i] = tree[i \u0026lt;\u0026lt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e] + tree[i \u0026lt;\u0026lt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e | \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e];\n    }\n  }\n\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eupdate\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e i, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e value) -\u0026gt; void {\n    i += n;\n    tree[i] = value;\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ewhile\u003c/span\u003e (i \u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e) {\n      tree[i \u0026gt;\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e] = tree[i] + tree[i ^ \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e];\n      i \u0026gt;\u0026gt;= \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e;\n    }\n  }\n\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003esumRange\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e l, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e r) -\u0026gt; int {\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e res = default_val;\n    l += n;\n    r += n + \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e;\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ewhile\u003c/span\u003e (l \u0026lt; r) {\n      \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (l \u0026amp; \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e) {\n        res = res + tree[l++];\n      }\n      \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (r \u0026amp; \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e) {\n        res = res + tree[--r];\n      }\n      l \u0026gt;\u0026gt;= \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e;\n      r \u0026gt;\u0026gt;= \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e;\n    }\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e res;\n  }\n};\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv aria-label=\"Permalink: 区间开闭和自定义点\" href=\"#区间开闭和自定义点\"\u003e\u003csvg data-component=\"Octicon\" class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e递归线段树：\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e对外接口：通常传 0-index 闭区间 \u003ccode\u003e[l, r]\u003c/code\u003e。\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e节点区间：\u003ccode\u003e[start, end]\u003c/code\u003e，也是闭区间。\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e分裂方式：左儿子 \u003ccode\u003e[start, mid]\u003c/code\u003e，右儿子 \u003ccode\u003e[mid + 1, end]\u003c/code\u003e。\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e判断覆盖：\u003ccode\u003el \u0026lt;= start \u0026amp;\u0026amp; end \u0026lt;= r\u003c/code\u003e。\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e判断进左儿子：\u003ccode\u003el \u0026lt;= mid\u003c/code\u003e；判断进右儿子：\u003ccode\u003er \u0026gt; mid\u003c/code\u003e。\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e如果题目输入是 1-index \u003ccode\u003e[l, r]\u003c/code\u003e，调用时改成 \u003ccode\u003e[l - 1, r - 1]\u003c/code\u003e。\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003ezkw / 迭代线段树：\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e对外接口：也可以设计成 0-index 闭区间 \u003ccode\u003e[l, r]\u003c/code\u003e。\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e内部会转成半开区间 \u003ccode\u003e[left, right)\u003c/code\u003e：\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"size_t left = l + base;\nsize_t right = r + base + 1;\nwhile (left \u0026lt; right) { ... }\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esize_t\u003c/span\u003e left = l + base;\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esize_t\u003c/span\u003e right = r + base + \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e;\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ewhile\u003c/span\u003e (left \u0026lt; right) { ... }\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e如果本来就想传半开区间 \u003ccode\u003e[l, r)\u003c/code\u003e，则写成 \u003ccode\u003eright = r + base\u003c/code\u003e。\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e可自定义的地方：\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eType\u003c/code\u003e：节点值和懒标记类型，可能要用 \u003ccode\u003elong long\u003c/code\u003e。\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003efunc\u003c/code\u003e：左右儿子的合并方式，如 \u003ccode\u003esum / max / min / gcd\u003c/code\u003e。\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003equery_default\u003c/code\u003e：查询单位元。\u003ccode\u003esum = 0\u003c/code\u003e，\u003ccode\u003emax = -inf\u003c/code\u003e，\u003ccode\u003emin = +inf\u003c/code\u003e。\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003elazy_default\u003c/code\u003e：空懒标记。区间加法通常是 \u003ccode\u003e0\u003c/code\u003e。\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003e_apply\u003c/code\u003e：整段更新如何影响 \u003ccode\u003etree[p]\u003c/code\u003e 和 \u003ccode\u003elazy[p]\u003c/code\u003e。\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003e_push\u003c/code\u003e：父节点懒标记如何下传给左右儿子。\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003e_pull\u003c/code\u003e：子节点变化后，如何重新计算父节点。\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e常见 \u003ccode\u003e_apply\u003c/code\u003e：\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"// 区间加 + 区间最大值：最大值整体加 value，不需要 len\ntree[p] += value;\nlazy[p] += value;\n\n// 区间加 + 区间和：整段和增加 value * len\ntree[p] += value * len;\nlazy[p] += value;\n\n// 区间赋值 + 区间和：懒标记是覆盖，不是累加\ntree[p] = value * len;\nlazy[p] = value;\nhas_lazy[p] = true;\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 区间加 + 区间最大值：最大值整体加 value，不需要 len\u003c/span\u003e\ntree[p] += value;\nlazy[p] += value;\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 区间加 + 区间和：整段和增加 value * len\u003c/span\u003e\ntree[p] += value * len;\nlazy[p] += value;\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 区间赋值 + 区间和：懒标记是覆盖，不是累加\u003c/span\u003e\ntree[p] = value * len;\nlazy[p] = value;\nhas_lazy[p] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etrue\u003c/span\u003e;\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch4 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e区间加法+最大值查询 懒标记线段树\u003c/h4\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-区间加法最大值查询-懒标记线段树\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 区间加法+最大值查询 懒标记线段树\" href=\"#区间加法最大值查询-懒标记线段树\"\u003e\u003csvg data-component=\"Octicon\" class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e递归版，接口是 0-index 闭区间 \u003ccode\u003e[l, r]\u003c/code\u003e。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"template \u0026lt;typename Type, typename Func\u0026gt; class LazySegTree {\nprivate:\n  size_t n;\n  Type default_val;\n  Func func;\n  std::vector\u0026lt;Type\u0026gt; tree;\n  std::vector\u0026lt;Type\u0026gt; lazy;\n  std::vector\u0026lt;bool\u0026gt; has_lazy;\n\n  auto _perc_down(size_t node, size_t start, size_t end) -\u0026gt; void {\n    if (has_lazy[node]) {\n      const auto left = node \u0026lt;\u0026lt; 1;\n      const auto right = node \u0026lt;\u0026lt; 1 | 1;\n\n      lazy[left] += lazy[node];\n      has_lazy[left] = true;\n      tree[left] += lazy[node];\n\n      lazy[right] += lazy[node];\n      has_lazy[right] = true;\n      tree[right] += lazy[node];\n\n      lazy[node] = default_val;\n      has_lazy[node] = false;\n    }\n  }\n\n  auto _build(const std::vector\u0026lt;Type\u0026gt; \u0026amp;data, size_t node, size_t start,\n              size_t end) -\u0026gt; void {\n    if (start == end) {\n      tree[node] = data[start];\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const auto mid = start + ((end - start) \u0026gt;\u0026gt; 1);\n    _build(data, node \u0026lt;\u0026lt; 1, start, mid);\n    _build(data, node \u0026lt;\u0026lt; 1 | 1, mid + 1, end);\n\n    tree[node] = func(tree[node \u0026lt;\u0026lt; 1], tree[node \u0026lt;\u0026lt; 1 | 1]);\n  }\n\n  auto _update_range(size_t node, size_t start, size_t end, size_t l, size_t r,\n                     Type value) -\u0026gt; void {\n    if (l \u0026lt;= start \u0026amp;\u0026amp; end \u0026lt;= r) {\n      lazy[node] += value;\n      has_lazy[node] = true;\n      tree[node] += value;\n      return;\n    }\n\n    _perc_down(node, start, end);\n\n    const auto mid = start + ((end - start) \u0026gt;\u0026gt; 1);\n    if (l \u0026lt;= mid) {\n      _update_range(node \u0026lt;\u0026lt; 1, start, mid, l, r, value);\n    }\n    if (r \u0026gt; mid) {\n      _update_range(node \u0026lt;\u0026lt; 1 | 1, mid + 1, end, l, r, value);\n    }\n\n    tree[node] = func(tree[node \u0026lt;\u0026lt; 1], tree[node \u0026lt;\u0026lt; 1 | 1]);\n  }\n\n  auto _query_range(size_t node, size_t start, size_t end, size_t l, size_t r)\n      -\u0026gt; Type {\n    if (l \u0026lt;= start \u0026amp;\u0026amp; end \u0026lt;= r) {\n      return tree[node];\n    }\n\n    _perc_down(node, start, end);\n    const auto mid = start + ((end - start) \u0026gt;\u0026gt; 1);\n    if (r \u0026lt;= mid) {\n      return _query_range(node \u0026lt;\u0026lt; 1, start, mid, l, r);\n    }\n    if (l \u0026gt; mid) {\n      return _query_range(node \u0026lt;\u0026lt; 1 | 1, mid + 1, end, l, r);\n    }\n\n    return func(_query_range(node \u0026lt;\u0026lt; 1, start, mid, l, r),\n                _query_range(node \u0026lt;\u0026lt; 1 | 1, mid + 1, end, l, r));\n  }\n\npublic:\n  explicit LazySegTree(const std::vector\u0026lt;Type\u0026gt; \u0026amp;data, Func func = Func{},\n                       const Type \u0026amp;de = Type())\n      : n(data.size()), default_val(de), func(func) {\n    tree.assign(4 * n, default_val);\n    lazy.assign(4 * n, default_val);\n    has_lazy.assign(4 * n, false);\n    _build(data, 1, 0, n - 1);\n  }\n\n  auto update_range(size_t l, size_t r, Type value) -\u0026gt; void {\n    _update_range(1, 0, n - 1, l, r, value);\n  }\n\n  auto query_range(size_t l, size_t r) -\u0026gt; Type {\n    return _query_range(1, 0, n - 1, l, r);\n  }\n};\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003etemplate data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"template \u0026lt;typename Type, typename Func\u0026gt; class SegTree {\nprivate:\n  size_t size;\n  size_t base;\n  size_t height;\n  Type query_default;\n  Type lazy_default;\n  Func func;\n  std::vector\u0026lt;Type\u0026gt; tree;\n  std::vector\u0026lt;Type\u0026gt; lazy;\n  std::vector\u0026lt;bool\u0026gt; has_lazy;\n\n  auto _apply(size_t p, const Type \u0026amp;value) -\u0026gt; void {\n    tree[p] += value;\n    if (p \u0026lt; base) {\n      lazy[p] += value;\n      has_lazy[p] = true;\n    }\n  }\n\n  auto _push(size_t p) -\u0026gt; void {\n    for (size_t s = height; s \u0026gt; 0; --s) {\n      const size_t i = p \u0026gt;\u0026gt; s;\n      if (!has_lazy[i]) {\n        continue;\n      }\n\n      _apply(i \u0026lt;\u0026lt; 1, lazy[i]);\n      _apply(i \u0026lt;\u0026lt; 1 | 1, lazy[i]);\n      lazy[i] = lazy_default;\n      has_lazy[i] = false;\n    }\n  }\n\n  auto _pull(size_t p) -\u0026gt; void {\n    for (p \u0026gt;\u0026gt;= 1; p \u0026gt; 0; p \u0026gt;\u0026gt;= 1) {\n      tree[p] = func(tree[p \u0026lt;\u0026lt; 1], tree[p \u0026lt;\u0026lt; 1 | 1]);\n      if (has_lazy[p]) {\n        tree[p] += lazy[p];\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\npublic:\n  explicit SegTree(const std::vector\u0026lt;Type\u0026gt; \u0026amp;data, Func f = Func{},\n                   const Type \u0026amp;query_de = Type(),\n                   const Type \u0026amp;lazy_de = Type())\n      : size(data.size()), query_default(query_de), lazy_default(lazy_de),\n        func(f) {\n    base = 1;\n    height = 0;\n    while (base \u0026lt; size) {\n      base \u0026lt;\u0026lt;= 1;\n      ++height;\n    }\n\n    tree.assign(base \u0026lt;\u0026lt; 1, query_default);\n    lazy.assign(base \u0026lt;\u0026lt; 1, lazy_default);\n    has_lazy.assign(base \u0026lt;\u0026lt; 1, false);\n\n    for (size_t i = 0; i \u0026lt; size; ++i) {\n      tree[base + i] = data[i];\n    }\n    for (size_t i = base - 1; i \u0026gt; 0; --i) {\n      tree[i] = func(tree[i \u0026lt;\u0026lt; 1], tree[i \u0026lt;\u0026lt; 1 | 1]);\n    }\n  }\n\n  auto add_range(size_t l, size_t r, const Type \u0026amp;value) -\u0026gt; void {\n    if (size == 0 || l \u0026gt; r || r \u0026gt;= size) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    size_t left = l + base;\n    size_t right = r + base + 1;\n    const size_t left_origin = left;\n    const size_t right_origin = right;\n\n    _push(left_origin);\n    _push(right_origin - 1);\n\n    while (left \u0026lt; right) {\n      if (left \u0026amp; 1) {\n        _apply(left++, value);\n      }\n      if (right \u0026amp; 1) {\n        _apply(--right, value);\n      }\n      left \u0026gt;\u0026gt;= 1;\n      right \u0026gt;\u0026gt;= 1;\n    }\n\n    _pull(left_origin);\n    _pull(right_origin - 1);\n  }\n\n  auto query_range(size_t l, size_t r) -\u0026gt; Type {\n    if (size == 0 || l \u0026gt; r || r \u0026gt;= size) {\n      return query_default;\n    }\n\n    size_t left = l + base;\n    size_t right = r + base + 1;\n    _push(left);\n    _push(right - 1);\n\n    auto left_res = query_default;\n    auto right_res = query_default;\n    while (left \u0026lt; right) {\n      if (left \u0026amp; 1) {\n        left_res = func(left_res, tree[left++]);\n      }\n      if (right \u0026amp; 1) {\n        right_res = func(right_res, tree[--right]);\n      }\n      left \u0026gt;\u0026gt;= 1;\n      right \u0026gt;\u0026gt;= 1;\n    }\n\n    return func(left_res, right_res);\n  }\n};\n\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003etemplate \u003c/span\u003e\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003econtinue\u003c/span\u003e;\n      }\n\n      \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e_apply\u003c/span\u003e(i \u0026lt;\u0026lt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e, lazy[i]);\n      \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e_apply\u003c/span\u003e(i \u0026lt;\u0026lt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e | \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e, lazy[i]);\n      lazy[i] = lazy_default;\n      has_lazy[i] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efalse\u003c/span\u003e;\n    }\n  }\n\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e适用：给出一批“禁止边/权值为 1 的边”，需要在补图中找连通块。维护未访问集合；从点 \u003ccode\u003eu\u003c/code\u003e 扩展时，所有未访问且不是 \u003ccode\u003eu\u003c/code\u003e 原图邻居的点，都是补图邻居。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"std::vector\u0026lt;std::unordered_set\u0026lt;int\u0026gt;\u0026gt; edge(n + 1);\nfor (auto [u, v] : edges) {\n  edge[u].insert(v);\n  edge[v].insert(u);\n}\n\nstd::set\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; unvisited;\nfor (int i = 1; i \u0026lt;= n; ++i)\n  unvisited.insert(i);\n\nint component_count = 0;\nstd::queue\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; q;\nwhile (!unvisited.empty()) {\n  ++component_count;\n  int start = *unvisited.begin();\n  unvisited.erase(start);\n  q.push(start);\n\n  while (!q.empty()) {\n    int u = q.front();\n    q.pop();\n    for (auto it = unvisited.begin(); it != unvisited.end();) {\n      int v = *it;\n      if (!edge[u].contains(v)) {\n        it = unvisited.erase(it);\n        q.push(v);\n      } else {\n        ++it;\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003estd::vector\u0026lt;std::unordered_set\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;\u0026gt; \u003cspan (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e i = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e; i \u0026lt;= n; ++i)\n  unvisited.insert(i);\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e component_count = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e;\nstd::queue\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; q;\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ewhile\u003c/span\u003e (!unvisited.empty()) {\n  ++component_count;\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e start = *unvisited.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ebegin\u003c/span\u003e();\n  unvisited.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eerase\u003c/span\u003e(start);\n  q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epush\u003c/span\u003e(start);\n\n class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efront\u003c/span\u003e();\n    q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epop\u003c/span\u003e();\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e it = unvisited.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ebegin\u003c/span\u003e(); it != unvisited.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eend\u003c/span\u003e();) {\n      \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e v = *it;\n      \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (!edge[u].\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003econtains\u003c/span\u003e(v)) {\n        it = unvisited.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eerase\u003c/span\u003e(it);\n        q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epush\u003c/span\u003e(v);\n      } \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelse\u003c/span\u003e {\n        ++it;\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e0/1 完全图 MST：输入边权为 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e适用：单词接龙 / 只改一个字符的最短路。把单词按通配符模式分桶，如 \u003ccode\u003efool\u003c/code\u003e 放入 \u003ccode\u003e_ool, f_ol, fo_l, foo_\u003c/code\u003e，同桶单词两两只差一个字符。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"int n = static_cast\u0026lt;int\u0026gt;(words.size());\nint len = static_cast\u0026lt;int\u0026gt;(words[0].size());\nstd::unordered_map\u0026lt;std::string, std::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt;\u0026gt; bucket;\n\nfor (int i = 0; i \u0026lt; n; ++i) {\n  for (int p = 0; p \u0026lt; len; ++p) {\n    std::string key = words[i];\n    key[p] = '_';\n    bucket[key].push_back(i);\n  }\n}\n\nstd::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; dist(n, -1);\nstd::queue\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; q;\ndist[start] = 0;\nq.push(start);\n\nwhile (!q.empty()) {\n  int u = q.front();\n  q.pop();\n\n  for (int p = 0; p \u0026lt; len; ++p) {\n    std::string key = words[u];\n    key[p] = '_';\n\n    for (int v : bucket[key]) {\n      if (dist[v] == -1) {\n        dist[v] = dist[u] + 1;\n        q.push(v);\n      }\n    }\n    bucket[key].clear(); // 这个桶以后不用重复扫\n  }\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e n = \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003estatic_cast\u003c/span\u003e\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;(words.size());\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e len = \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003estatic_cast\u003c/span\u003e\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;(words[\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e].size());\nstd::unordered_map\u0026lt;std::string, std::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;\u0026gt; bucket;\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e i = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e; i \u0026lt; n; ++i) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e p = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e; p \u0026lt; len; ++p) {\n    std::string key = words[i];\n    key[p] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-pds\"\u003e'\u003c/span\u003e_\u003cspan class=\"pl-pds\"\u003e'\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e;\n    bucket[key].\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epush_back\u003c/span\u003e(i);\n  }\n}\n\nstd::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003edist\u003c/span\u003e(n, -\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e);\nstd::queue\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; q;\ndist[start] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e;\nq.push(start);\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ewhile\u003c/span\u003e (!q.empty()) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e u = q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efront\u003c/span\u003e();\n  q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epop\u003c/span\u003e();\n\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e p = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e; p \u0026lt; len; ++p) {\n    std::string key = words[u];\n    key[p] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-pds\"\u003e'\u003c/span\u003e_\u003cspan class=\"pl-pds\"\u003e'\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e;\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e v : bucket[key]) {\n      \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (dist[v] == -\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e) {\n        dist[v] = dist[u] + \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e;\n        q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epush\u003c/span\u003e(v);\n      }\n    }\n    bucket[key].\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eclear\u003c/span\u003e(); \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 这个桶以后不用重复扫\u003c/span\u003e\n  }\n}\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e复杂度：建桶 \u003ccode\u003eO(n * len)\u003c/code\u003e 个键；BFS 时每个桶最多展开一次，比暴力枚举两两比较 \u003ccode\u003eO(n^2 * len)\u003c/code\u003e 快很多。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch3 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e二分图染色 / 奇偶约束\u003c/h3\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-二分图染色--奇偶约束\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 二分图染色 / 奇偶约束\" href=\"#二分图染色--奇偶约束\"\u003e\u003csvg data-component=\"Octicon\" class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e无向图二分图判定：相邻点颜色必须不同。若遇到同色边，说明不是二分图。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"std::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; color(n, -1);\nbool ok = true;\nfor (int s = 0; s \u0026lt; n \u0026amp;\u0026amp; ok; ++s) {\n  if (color[s] != -1)\n    continue;\n\n  std::queue\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; q;\n  color[s] = 0;\n  q.push(s);\n\n  while (!q.empty() \u0026amp;\u0026amp; ok) {\n    int u = q.front();\n    q.pop();\n    for (int v : adj[u]) {\n      if (color[v] == -1) {\n        color[v] = color[u] ^ 1;\n        q.push(v);\n      } else if (color[v] == color[u]) {\n        ok = false;\n        break;\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003estd::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ecolor\u003c/span\u003e(n, -\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e);\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ebool\u003c/span\u003e ok = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etrue\u003c/span\u003e;\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e s = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e; s \u0026lt; n \u0026amp;\u0026amp; ok; ++s) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (color[s] != -\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e)\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003econtinue\u003c/span\u003e;\n\n  std::queue\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; q;\n  color[s] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e;\n  q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epush\u003c/span\u003e(s);\n\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ewhile\u003c/span\u003e (!q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eempty\u003c/span\u003e() \u0026amp;\u0026amp; ok) {\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e u = q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efront\u003c/span\u003e();\n    q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epop\u003c/span\u003e();\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e v : adj[u]) {\n      \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (color[v] == -\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e) {\n        color[v] = color[u] ^ \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e;\n        q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epush\u003c/span\u003e(v);\n      } \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelse\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (color[v] == color[u]) {\n        ok = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efalse\u003c/span\u003e;\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ebreak\u003c/span\u003e;\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e带奇偶关系的动态合并通常用带权并查集，维护 \u003ccode\u003edist[x]\u003c/code\u003e 到根的奇偶值。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch3 tabindex=\"-1\" 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e适用：骑士巡游、网格 DFS、精确覆盖类搜索。原则是：下一步优先走“后续可走选择最少”的点，尽早发现死路。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"std::vector\u0026lt;std::pair\u0026lt;int, int\u0026gt;\u0026gt; moves = {\n    {1, 2}, {2, 1}, {-1, 2}, {-2, 1},\n    {1, -2}, {2, -1}, {-1, -2}, {-2, -1}};\n\nauto inside = [\u0026amp;](int x, int y) {\n  return 0 \u0026lt;= x \u0026amp;\u0026amp; x \u0026lt; n \u0026amp;\u0026amp; 0 \u0026lt;= y \u0026amp;\u0026amp; y \u0026lt; m;\n};\n\nauto degree = [\u0026amp;](int x, int y) {\n  int cnt = 0;\n  for (auto [dx, dy] : moves) {\n    int nx = x + dx, ny = y + dy;\n    if (inside(nx, ny) \u0026amp;\u0026amp; !visited[nx][ny])\n      ++cnt;\n  }\n  return cnt;\n};\n\nauto dfs = [\u0026amp;](auto \u0026amp;\u0026amp;self, int x, int y, int step) -\u0026gt; bool {\n  if (step == n * m)\n    return true;\n\n  std::vector\u0026lt;std::tuple\u0026lt;int, int, int\u0026gt;\u0026gt; next;\n  for (auto [dx, dy] : moves) {\n    int nx = x + dx, ny = y + dy;\n    if (inside(nx, ny) \u0026amp;\u0026amp; !visited[nx][ny])\n      next.emplace_back(degree(nx, ny), nx, ny);\n  }\n  std::sort(next.begin(), next.end()); // 可走出路少的先搜\n\n  return std::any_of(next.begin(), next.end(), [\u0026amp;](auto item) {\n    auto [deg, nx, ny] = item;\n    visited[nx][ny] = true;\n    path.emplace_back(nx, ny);\n    if (self(self, nx, ny, step + 1))\n      return true;\n    path.pop_back();\n    visited[nx][ny] = false;\n    return false;\n  });\n};\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003estd::vector\u0026lt;std::pair\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;\u0026gt; moves = {\n    {\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e2\u003c/span\u003e}, {\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e2\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e}, {-\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e2\u003c/span\u003e}, {-\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e2\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e},\n    {\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e, -\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e2\u003c/span\u003e}, {\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e2\u003c/span\u003e, -\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e}, {-\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e, -\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e2\u003c/span\u003e}, {-\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e2\u003c/span\u003e, -\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e}};\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e inside = [\u0026amp;](\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e x, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e y) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e \u0026lt;= x \u0026amp;\u0026amp; x \u0026lt; n \u0026amp;\u0026amp; \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e \u0026lt;= y \u0026amp;\u0026amp; y \u0026lt; m;\n};\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e degree = [\u0026amp;](\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e x, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e y) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e cnt = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e;\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e [dx, dy] : moves) {\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e nx = x + dx, ny = y + dy;\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003einside\u003c/span\u003e(nx, ny) \u0026amp;\u0026amp; !visited[nx][ny])\n      ++cnt;\n  }\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e cnt;\n};\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e dfs = [\u0026amp;](\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e \u0026amp;\u0026amp;self, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e x, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e y, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e step) -\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ebool\u003c/span\u003e {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (step == n * m)\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etrue\u003c/span\u003e;\n\n  std::vector\u0026lt;std::tuple\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;\u0026gt; next;\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e [dx, dy] : moves) {\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e nx = x + dx, ny = y + dy;\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003einside\u003c/span\u003e(nx, ny) \u0026amp;\u0026amp; !visited[nx][ny])\n      next.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eemplace_back\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003edegree\u003c/span\u003e(nx, ny), nx, ny);\n  }\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003estd::sort\u003c/span\u003e(next.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ebegin\u003c/span\u003e(), next.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eend\u003c/span\u003e()); \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 可走出路少的先搜\u003c/span\u003e\n\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003estd::any_of\u003c/span\u003e(next.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ebegin\u003c/span\u003e(), next.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eend\u003c/span\u003e(), [\u0026amp;](\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e item) {\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e [deg, nx, ny] = item;\n    visited[nx][ny] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etrue\u003c/span\u003e;\n    path.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eemplace_back\u003c/span\u003e(nx, ny);\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e(self, nx, ny, step + \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e))\n      \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etrue\u003c/span\u003e;\n    path.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epop_back\u003c/span\u003e();\n    visited[nx][ny] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efalse\u003c/span\u003e;\n dir=\"auto\"\u003e数据以邻接表储存，输出为拓扑序。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"auto topo_sort_kahn(int n, const std::vector\u0026lt;std::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt;\u0026gt; \u0026amp;adj)\n    -\u0026gt; std::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; {\n  std::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; indegree(n, 0);\n  for (int u = 0; u \u0026lt; n; ++u)\n    for (auto v : adj[u])\n      ++indegree[v];\n  std::queue\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; q;\n  for (int i = 0; i \u0026lt; n; ++i)\n    if (!indegree[i])\n      q.emplace(i);\n  std::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; topo_order;\n  while (!q.empty()) {\n    int u = q.front();\n    q.pop();\n    topo_order.emplace_back(u);\n    for (auto v : adj[u]) {\n      --indegree[v];\n      if (!indegree[v])\n        q.emplace(v);\n    }\n  }\n  return topo_order; // 若 topo_order.size() != n 说明有环\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003etopo_sort_kahn\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e n, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003econst\u003c/span\u003e std::vector\u0026lt;std::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;\u0026gt; \u0026amp;adj)\n    -\u0026gt; std::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; {\n  std::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eindegree\u003c/span\u003e(n, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e);\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e u = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e; u \u0026lt; n; ++u)\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e v : adj[u])\n      ++indegree[v];\n  std::queue\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; q;\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e i = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e; i \u0026lt; n; ++i)\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (!indegree[i])\n      q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eemplace\u003c/span\u003e(i);\n  std::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; topo_order;\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ewhile\u003c/span\u003e (!q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eempty\u003c/span\u003e()) {\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e u = q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efront\u003c/span\u003e();\n    q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epop\u003c/span\u003e();\n    topo_order.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eemplace_back\u003c/span\u003e(u);\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e v : adj[u]) {\n      --indegree[v];\n      \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (!indegree[v])\n        q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eemplace\u003c/span\u003e(v);\n    }\n  }\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e topo_order; \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 若 topo_order.size() != n 说明有环\u003c/span\u003e\n}\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"auto dfs_topo_sort(const std::vector\u0026lt;std::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt;\u0026gt; \u0026amp;adj) {\n  int n = static_cast\u0026lt;int\u0026gt;(adj.size());\n  std::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; visited(n, false);\n  std::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; finish_order;\n  auto dfs_visit = [\u0026amp;](this auto \u0026amp;\u0026amp;self, int u) -\u0026gt; bool {\n    visited[u] = 1;\n    for (auto v : adj[u]) {\n      if (visited[v] == 0) {\n        if (!self(v))\n          return false;\n      } else if (visited[v] == 1) {\n        return false;\n      }\n    }\n    visited[u] = 2;\n    finish_order.emplace_back(u);\n    return true;\n  };\n  for (int u = 0; u \u0026lt; n; ++u) {\n    if (visited[u] == 0) {\n      if (!dfs_visit(u))\n        return {};\n    }\n  }\n  std::ranges::reverse(finish_order);\n  return finish_order;\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;\u0026gt; \u0026amp;adj) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e n = \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003estatic_cast\u003c/span\u003e\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;(adj.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esize\u003c/span\u003e());\n  std::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003evisited\u003c/span\u003e(n, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efalse\u003c/span\u003e);\n  std::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; finish_order;\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e dfs_visit = [\u0026amp;](\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ethis\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e \u0026amp;\u0026amp;self, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e u) -\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ebool\u003c/span\u003e {\n    visited[u] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e;\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e v : adj[u]) {\n      \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (visited[v] == \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e) {\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (!\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e(v))\n          \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efalse\u003c/span\u003e;\n      } \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelse\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (visited[v] == \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e) {\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efalse\u003c/span\u003e;\n      }\n    }\n    visited[u] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e2\u003c/span\u003e;\n    finish_order.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eemplace_back\u003c/span\u003e(u);\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etrue\u003c/span\u003e;\n  };\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e u = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e; u \u0026lt; n; ++u) {\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (visited[u] == \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e) {\n dir=\"auto\"\u003e在函数\u003ccode\u003eunite()\u003c/code\u003e中判断：\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"auto unite(int x, int y) -\u0026gt; bool {\n  int root_x = find(x);\n  int root_y = find(y);\n  if (root_x == root_y)\n    return false; // 有环\n  if (rank[root_x] \u0026lt; rank[root_y])\n    parent[root_x] = root_y;\n  else if (rank[root_x] \u0026gt; rank[root_y])\n    parent[root_y] = root_x;\n  else {\n    parent[root_y] = root_x;\n    ++rank[root_x];\n  }\n  return true;\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eunite\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e x, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e y) -\u0026gt; bool {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e root_x = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efind\u003c/span\u003e(x);\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e root_y = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efind\u003c/span\u003e(y);\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (root_x == root_y)\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efalse\u003c/span\u003e; \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 有环\u003c/span\u003e\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (rank[root_x] \u0026lt; rank[root_y])\n    parent[root_x] = root_y;\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelse\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (rank[root_x] \u0026gt; rank[root_y])\n    parent[root_y] = root_x;\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelse\u003c/span\u003e {\n    parent[root_y] = root_x;\n    ++rank[root_x];\n  }\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etrue\u003c/span\u003e;\n}\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e存图时用边表示无向图：\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"DisjSet dsu(n);\nfor (auto [u, v] : edges)\n  if (!dsu.unite(u, v))\n    return false;\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003eDisjSet \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003edsu\u003c/span\u003e(n);\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e [u, v] : edges)\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (!dsu.unite(u, v))\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efalse\u003c/span\u003e;\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch5 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"auto has_cycle(int n, const std::vector\u0026lt;std::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt;\u0026gt; \u0026amp;adj) {\n  std::vector\u0026lt;bool\u0026gt; visited(n, false);\n  auto dfs = [\u0026amp;](this auto \u0026amp;\u0026amp;self, int node, int parent) {\n    visited[node] = true;\n    for (auto v : adj[node]) {\n      if (!visited[v]) {\n        if (self(v, node))\n          return true; // 有环\n      } else if (v != parent) {\n        return true;\n      }\n    }\n    return false;\n  };\n  for (int u = 0; u \u0026lt; n; ++u)\n    if (!visited[u] \u0026amp;\u0026amp; dfs(u, -1))\n      return true;\n  return false;\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ebool\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003evisited\u003c/span\u003e(n, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efalse\u003c/span\u003e);\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e dfs = [\u0026amp;](\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ethis\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e \u0026amp;\u0026amp;self, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e node, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e parent) {\n    visited[node] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etrue\u003c/span\u003e;\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e v : adj[node]) {\n      \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (!visited[v]) {\n class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etrue\u003c/span\u003e; \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 有环\u003c/span\u003e\n      } \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelse\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (v != parent) {\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etrue\u003c/span\u003e;\n      }\n    }\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efalse\u003c/span\u003e;\n  };\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e u = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e; u \u0026lt; n; ++u)\n    \u003cspan 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eTarjan 可用于无向图求桥、割点、边双连通分量、点双连通分量。核心仍是 \u003ccode\u003edfn/low\u003c/code\u003e，但判定条件和 SCC 不同。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e桥：\u003ccode\u003elow[v] \u0026gt; dfn[u]\u003c/code\u003e，是边双连通分量分界线\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e割点：非根节点满足 \u003ccode\u003elow[v] \u0026gt;= dfn[u]\u003c/code\u003e；根节点有至少两个 DFS 儿子，是点双连通分量分界线\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e有重边时必须用边编号跳过父边，不能只判断 \u003ccode\u003ev == parent\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"struct Edge {\n  int to;\n  int id;\n};\n\nstd::vector\u0026lt;std::vector\u0026lt;Edge\u0026gt;\u0026gt; adj(n);\nfor (int id = 0; id \u0026lt; m; ++id) {\n  int u, v;\n  std::cin \u0026gt;\u0026gt; u \u0026gt;\u0026gt; v;\n  adj[u].push_back({v, id});\n  adj[v].push_back({u, id});\n}\n\nstd::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; dfn(n, -1), low(n), is_cut(n, false);\nstd::vector\u0026lt;std::pair\u0026lt;int, int\u0026gt;\u0026gt; bridges;\nint timer = 0;\n\nauto dfs = [\u0026amp;](auto \u0026amp;\u0026amp;self, int u, int parent_edge) -\u0026gt; void {\n  dfn[u] = low[u] = timer++;\n  int child_count = 0;\n  for (auto [v, edge_id] : adj[u]) {\n    if (edge_id == parent_edge)\n      continue;\n    if (dfn[v] == -1) {\n      ++child_count;\n      self(self, v, edge_id);\n      low[u] = std::min(low[u], low[v]);\n      if (low[v] \u0026gt; dfn[u])\n        bridges.push_back({u, v});\n      if (parent_edge != -1 \u0026amp;\u0026amp; low[v] \u0026gt;= dfn[u])\n        is_cut[u] = true;\n    } else {\n      low[u] = std::min(low[u], dfn[v]);\n    }\n  }\n  if (parent_edge == -1 \u0026amp;\u0026amp; child_count \u0026gt;= 2)\n    is_cut[u] = true;\n};\n\nfor (int u = 0; u \u0026lt; n; ++u)\n  if (dfn[u] == -1)\n    dfs(dfs, u, -1);\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003estruct\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eEdge\u003c/span\u003e {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e to;\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e id;\n};\n\nstd::vector\u0026lt;std::vector\u0026lt;Edge\u0026gt;\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eadj\u003c/span\u003e(n);\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e id = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e; id \u0026lt; m; ++id) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e u, v;\n  std::cin \u0026gt;\u0026gt; u \u0026gt;\u0026gt; v;\n  adj[u].\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epush_back\u003c/span\u003e({v, id});\n  adj[v].\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epush_back\u003c/span\u003e({u, id});\n}\n\nstd::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003edfn\u003c/span\u003e(n, -\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e), low(n), is_cut(n, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efalse\u003c/span\u003e);\nstd::vector\u0026lt;std::pair\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;\u0026gt; bridges;\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e timer = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e;\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e dfs = [\u0026amp;](\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e \u0026amp;\u0026amp;self, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e u, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e parent_edge) -\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003evoid\u003c/span\u003e {\n  dfn[u] = low[u] = timer++;\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e [v, edge_id] : adj[u]) {\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (edge_id == parent_edge)\n      \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003econtinue\u003c/span\u003e;\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (dfn[v] == -\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e) {\n      ++child_count;\n class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e)\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003edfs\u003c/span\u003e(dfs, u, -\u003cspan data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"auto tarjan(const std::vector\u0026lt;std::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt;\u0026gt; \u0026amp;adj) {\n  int n = adj.size();\n  int timer = 0;\n  std::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; dfn(n, -1);\n  std::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; low(n, -1);\n  std::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; stack{};\n  std::vector\u0026lt;bool\u0026gt; on_stack(n, false);\n  std::vector\u0026lt;std::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt;\u0026gt; sccs;\n  auto dfs = [\u0026amp;](auto \u0026amp;\u0026amp;self, int u) -\u0026gt; void {\n    dfn[u] = low[u] = timer++;\n    stack.emplace_back(u);\n    on_stack[u] = true;\n    for (auto v : adj[u]) {\n      if (dfn[v] == -1) {\n        self(self, v);\n        low[u] = std::min(low[u], low[v]);\n      } else if (on_stack[v]) {\n        low[u] = std::min(low[u], dfn[v]);\n      }\n    }\n    if (low[u] == dfn[u]) {\n      std::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; component;\n      while (true) {\n        int node = stack.back();\n        stack.pop_back();\n        component.emplace_back(node);\n        on_stack[node] = false;\n        if (node == u) break;\n      }\n      sccs.emplace_back(component);\n    }\n  };\n  for (int i = 0; i \u0026lt; n; ++i)\n    if (dfn[i] == -1) dfs(dfs, i);\n  return sccs;\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003etarjan\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003econst\u003c/span\u003e std::vector\u0026lt;std::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;\u0026gt; \u0026amp;adj) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e n = adj.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esize\u003c/span\u003e();\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e timer = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e;\n  std::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003edfn\u003c/span\u003e(n, -\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e);\n  std::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003elow\u003c/span\u003e(n, -\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e);\n  std::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; stack{};\n  std::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ebool\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eon_stack\u003c/span\u003e(n, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efalse\u003c/span\u003e);\n  std::vector\u0026lt;std::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;\u0026gt; sccs;\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e dfs = [\u0026amp;](\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e \u0026amp;\u0026amp;self, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e u) -\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003evoid\u003c/span\u003e {\n    dfn[u] = low[u] = timer++;\n    stack.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eemplace_back\u003c/span\u003e(u);\n    on_stack[u] = class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (dfn[v] == -\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e) {\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e(self, v);\n        low[u] = {\n      std::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; component;\n      \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ewhile\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etrue\u003c/span\u003e) {\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e node = stack.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eback\u003c/span\u003e();\n        stack.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epop_back\u003c/span\u003e();\n        component.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eemplace_back\u003c/span\u003e(node);\n        on_stack[node] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efalse\u003c/span\u003e;\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (node == u) \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ebreak\u003c/span\u003e;\n      }\n      sccs.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eemplace_back\u003c/span\u003e(component);\n    }\n  };\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e i = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e; i \u0026lt; n; ++i)\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (dfn[i] == -\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e) \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003edfs\u003c/span\u003e(dfs, i);\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e sccs;\n}\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003ecomp[u]\u003c/code\u003e 表示点 \u003ccode\u003eu\u003c/code\u003e 属于哪个强连通分量。每个 SCC 缩成一个点后，原图变成 DAG。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"std::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; dfn(n, -1), low(n), stk, comp(n, -1);\nstd::vector\u0026lt;bool\u0026gt; in_stack(n, false);\nint timer = 0, comp_count = 0;\nauto dfs = [\u0026amp;](auto \u0026amp;\u0026amp;self, int u) -\u0026gt; void {\n  dfn[u] = low[u] = timer++;\n  stk.push_back(u);\n  in_stack[u] = true;\n  for (int v : g[u]) {\n    if (dfn[v] == -1) {\n      self(self, v);\n      low[u] = std::min(low[u], low[v]);\n    } else if (in_stack[v]) {\n      low[u] = std::min(low[u], dfn[v]);\n    }\n  }\n  if (dfn[u] == low[u]) {\n    while (true) {\n      int x = stk.back();\n      stk.pop_back();\n      in_stack[x] = false;\n      comp[x] = comp_count;\n      if (x == u)\n        break;\n    }\n    ++comp_count;\n  }\n};\nfor (int i = 0; i \u0026lt; n; ++i)\n  if (dfn[i] == -1)\n    dfs(dfs, i);\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003estd::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etrue\u003c/span\u003e) {\n      \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e x = stk.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eback\u003c/span\u003e();\n      stk.\u003cspan (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e i = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e; i \u0026lt; n; ++i)\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (dfn[i] == dir=\"auto\"\u003e建缩点图：\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"std::vector\u0026lt;std::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt;\u0026gt; dag(comp_count);\nstd::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; indegree(comp_count, 0);\n\nfor (int u = 0; u \u0026lt; n; ++u) {\n  for (int v : g[u]) {\n    int cu = comp[u], cv = comp[v];\n    if (cu == cv)\n      continue;\n    dag[cu].push_back(cv);\n  }\n}\n\n// 去重，否则入度、DP 可能被重边影响\nfor (int u = 0; u \u0026lt; comp_count; ++u) {\n  std::sort(dag[u].begin(), dag[u].end());\n  dag[u].erase(std::unique(dag[u].begin(), dag[u].end()), dag[u].end());\n  for (int v : dag[u])\n    ++indegree[v];\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003estd::vector\u0026lt;std::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003edag\u003c/span\u003e(comp_count);\nstd::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; \u003cspan cv)\n      \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003econtinue\u003c/span\u003e;\n    dag[cu].\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epush_back\u003c/span\u003e(cv);\n  }\n}\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 去重，否则入度、DP 可能被重边影响\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e u = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eend\u003c/span\u003e());\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e v : dag[u])\n overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"std::vector\u0026lt;long long\u0026gt; comp_weight(comp_count, 0);\nfor (int u = 0; u \u0026lt; n; ++u) {\n  comp_weight[comp[u]] += weight[u];\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003estd::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ecomp_weight\u003c/span\u003e(comp_count, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e);\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e u = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e; u \u0026lt; n; ++u) {\n  comp_weight[comp[u]] += weight[u];\n}\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e缩点 DAG DP：有边 \u003ccode\u003eu -\u0026gt; v\u003c/code\u003e 时，\u003ccode\u003eu\u003c/code\u003e 的答案可由 \u003ccode\u003ev\u003c/code\u003e 更新。先求拓扑序，再反向转移。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"std::queue\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; q;\nstd::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; topo;\nfor (int i = 0; i \u0026lt; comp_count; ++i)\n  if (indegree[i] == 0)\n    q.push(i);\n\nwhile (!q.empty()) {\n  int u = q.front();\n  q.pop();\n  topo.push_back(u);\n  for (int v : dag[u])\n    if (--indegree[v] == 0)\n      q.push(v);\n}\n\nstd::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; dp(comp_count);\nfor (int c = 0; c \u0026lt; comp_count; ++c)\n  dp[c] = comp_min_id[c]; // 或 comp_weight[c] 等 SCC 自身信息\n\nfor (int i = static_cast\u0026lt;int\u0026gt;(topo.size()) - 1; i \u0026gt;= 0; --i) {\n  int u = topo[i];\n  for (int v : dag[u])\n    dp[u] = std::min(dp[u], dp[v]);\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003estd::queue\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; q;\nstd::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan q.push(i);\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ewhile\u003c/span\u003e (!q.empty()) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e u = q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e v : dag[u])\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (--indegree[v] == \u003cspan SCC 自身信息\u003c/span\u003e\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e i = \u003cspan 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e适用：每条边恰好走一次。无向图要求奇度点为 \u003ccode\u003e0\u003c/code\u003e 或 \u003ccode\u003e2\u003c/code\u003e 个；有向图要求出入度差符合起终点条件，并且相关点连通。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e有向图模板，\u003ccode\u003eadj[u]\u003c/code\u003e 存边的终点，边会被弹出：\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"std::vector\u0026lt;std::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt;\u0026gt; adj(n);\nstd::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; path;\n\nauto dfs = [\u0026amp;](this auto \u0026amp;\u0026amp;self, int u) -\u0026gt; void {\n  while (!adj[u].empty()) {\n    int v = adj[u].back();\n    adj[u].pop_back();\n    self(v);\n  }\n  path.push_back(u);\n};\n\ndfs(start);\nstd::ranges::reverse(path); // path.size() == edge_count + 1 才用完所有边\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003estd::vector\u0026lt;std::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eadj\u003c/span\u003e(n);\nstd::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; path;\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e dfs = [\u0026amp;](\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ethis\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e \u0026amp;\u0026amp;self, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e u) -\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003evoid\u003c/span\u003e {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ewhile\u003c/span\u003e (!adj[u].\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eempty\u003c/span\u003e()) {\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e v = adj[u].\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eback\u003c/span\u003e();\n    adj[u].\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epop_back\u003c/span\u003e();\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e(v);\n  }\n  path.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epush_back\u003c/span\u003e(u);\n};\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003edfs\u003c/span\u003e(start);\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003estd::ranges::reverse\u003c/span\u003e(path); \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e path.size() == edge_count + 1 才用完所有边\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e字符串接龙 / Catenyms 类题常把单词看成边，首字母到尾字母建有向边；输出边时需要同时保存边编号或单词。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"auto dijkstra(int n, const std::vector\u0026lt;std::vector\u0026lt;std::pair\u0026lt;int, int\u0026gt;\u0026gt;\u0026gt; \u0026amp;adj,\n              int start) {\n  const long long INF = 4e18;\n  std::vector\u0026lt;long long\u0026gt; dist(n, INF);\n  dist[start] = 0;\n  std::priority_queue\u0026lt;std::pair\u0026lt;long long, int\u0026gt;,\n                      std::vector\u0026lt;std::pair\u0026lt;long long, int\u0026gt;\u0026gt;,\n                      std::greater\u0026lt;\u0026gt;\u0026gt; pq;\n  pq.emplace(0, start);\n  while (!pq.empty()) {\n    auto [d, u] = pq.top();\n    pq.pop();\n    if (d \u0026gt; dist[u]) continue;\n    for (auto [v, weight] : adj[u])\n      if (dist[u] + weight \u0026lt; dist[v]) {\n        dist[v] = dist[u] + weight;\n        pq.emplace(dist[v], v);\n      }\n  }\n  return dist;\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003edijkstra\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e n, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003econst\u003c/span\u003e std::vector\u0026lt;std::vector\u0026lt;std::pair\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;\u0026gt;\u0026gt; \u0026amp;adj,\n              \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e start) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003econst\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e INF = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e4e18\u003c/span\u003e;\n  std::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003edist\u003c/span\u003e(n, INF);\n  dist[start] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e;\n  std::priority_queue\u0026lt;std::pair\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;,\n                      std::vector\u0026lt;std::pair\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;\u0026gt;,\n                      std::greater\u0026lt;\u0026gt;\u0026gt; pq;\n  pq.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eemplace\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e, start);\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ewhile\u003c/span\u003e (!pq.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eempty\u003c/span\u003e()) {\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e [d, u] = pq.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etop\u003c/span\u003e();\n    pq.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epop\u003c/span\u003e();\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (d \u0026gt; dist[u]) \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003econtinue\u003c/span\u003e;\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e [v, weight] : adj[u])\n      \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (dist[u] + weight \u0026lt; dist[v]) {\n        dist[v] = dist[u] + weight;\n        pq.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eemplace\u003c/span\u003e(dist[v], v);\n      }\n  }\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e dist;\n}\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch4 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\"
