dir=\"auto\"\u003e只改状态、初值、转移和堆方向；其余框架沿用 Dijkstra。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"// 同余最短路：dist[r] 是能达到余数 r 的最小值\nint mod = static_cast\u0026lt;int\u0026gt;(*std::min_element(step.begin(), step.end()));\nstd::vector\u0026lt;long long\u0026gt; dist(mod, INF);\ndist[0] = 0; // 若从 base 开始：dist[base % mod] = base\nfor (long long w : step) {\n  int v = static_cast\u0026lt;int\u0026gt;((u + w) % mod);\n  relax_min(v, du + w);\n}\nbool ok = dist[target % mod] \u0026lt;= target;\n\n// 统计 [0, limit] 内可达数\nif (dist[r] \u0026lt;= limit)\n  ans += (limit - dist[r]) / mod + 1;\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 同余最短路：dist[r] 是能达到余数 r 的最小值\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e mod = \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003estatic_cast\u003c/span\u003e\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;(*\u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003estd::min_element\u003c/span\u003e(step.begin(), step.end()));\nstd::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003edist\u003c/span\u003e(mod, INF);\ndist[\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e; \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 若从 base 开始：dist[base % mod] = base\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e w : step) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e v = \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003estatic_cast\u003c/span\u003e\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;((u + w) % mod);\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003erelax_min\u003c/span\u003e(v, du + w);\n}\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ebool\u003c/span\u003e ok = dist[target % mod] \u0026lt;= target;\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 统计 [0, limit] 内可达数\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (dist[r] \u0026lt;= limit)\n  ans += (limit - dist[r]) / mod + \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e;\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"// 最小瓶颈路：最小化路径最大边权，海拔差/最小体力\nlong long next = std::max(dist[u], w);\nif (next \u0026lt; dist[v])\n  relax_min(v, next);\n\n// 最大瓶颈路：最大化路径最小边权，货车限重/最大带宽\ndist[start] = INF;              // 其他点初值 -1\nlong long next = std::min(dist[u], w);\nif (next \u0026gt; dist[v])\n  relax_max(v, next);           // 用大根堆\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 最小瓶颈路：最小化路径最大边权，海拔差/最小体力\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e next = std::max(dist[u], w);\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (next \u0026lt; dist[v])\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003erelax_min\u003c/span\u003e(v, next);\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 最大瓶颈路：最大化路径最小边权，货车限重/最大带宽\u003c/span\u003e\ndist[start] = INF;              \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 其他点初值 -1\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e next = std::min(dist[u], w);\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (next \u0026gt; dist[v])\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003erelax_max\u003c/span\u003e(v, next);           \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 用大根堆\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"// 最大概率路：最大化边概率乘积\nprob[start] = 1;                // 其他点初值 0\ndouble next = prob[u] * p;\nif (next \u0026gt; prob[v])\n  relax_max(v, next);           // 用大根堆\n\n// 状态/分层图：最多用一次道具、剩余次数、钥匙状态等\nstd::vector dist(n, std::array\u0026lt;long long, 2\u0026gt;{INF, INF});\n// 状态为 (du, u, used)\nif (!special)\n  relax_min({v, used}, du + w);\nelse if (used == 0)\n  relax_min({v, 1}, du + w);\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 最大概率路：最大化边概率乘积\u003c/span\u003e\nprob[start] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e;                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 其他点初值 0\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edouble\u003c/span\u003e next = prob[u] * p;\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (next \u0026gt; prob[v])\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003erelax_max\u003c/span\u003e(v, next);           \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 用大根堆\u003c/span\u003e\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 状态/分层图：最多用一次道具、剩余次数、钥匙状态等\u003c/span\u003e\nstd::vector \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003edist\u003c/span\u003e(n, std::array\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e2\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;{INF, INF});\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 状态为 (du, u, used)\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (!special)\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003erelax_min\u003c/span\u003e({v, used}, du + w);\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelse\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (used == \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e)\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003erelax_min\u003c/span\u003e({v, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e}, du + w);\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e最小瓶颈路也可二分答案 + BFS，或 Kruskal 按边权从小到大加边；最大瓶颈路也可用最大生成树 + LCA 查询路径最小边。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" \u003ccode\u003eO(nm)\u003c/code\u003e。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"struct Edge {\n  int from, to;\n  long long weight;\n};\n\nconst long long INF = 4e18;\nstd::vector\u0026lt;long long\u0026gt; dist(n + 1, INF);\ndist[start] = 0;\n\nfor (int i = 1; i \u0026lt;= n - 1; ++i) {\n  bool relaxed = false;\n  for (auto [u, v, w] : edges) {\n    if (dist[u] != INF \u0026amp;\u0026amp; dist[v] \u0026gt; dist[u] + w) {\n      dist[v] = dist[u] + w;\n      relaxed = true;\n    }\n  }\n  if (!relaxed)\n    break;\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003estruct\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eEdge\u003c/span\u003e {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e from, to;\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e weight;\n};\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003econst\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e INF = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e4e18\u003c/span\u003e;\nstd::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003edist\u003c/span\u003e(n + \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e, INF);\ndist[start] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e;\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e i = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e; i \u0026lt;= n - \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e; ++i) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ebool\u003c/span\u003e relaxed = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efalse\u003c/span\u003e;\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e [u, v, w] : edges) {\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (dist[u] != INF \u0026amp;\u0026amp; dist[v] \u0026gt; dist[u] + w) {\n      dist[v] = dist[u] + w;\n      relaxed = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etrue\u003c/span\u003e;\n    }\n  }\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (!relaxed)\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ebreak\u003c/span\u003e;\n}\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e判断从 \u003ccode\u003estart\u003c/code\u003e 可达的负环：\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"bool has_negative_cycle = false;\nfor (auto [u, v, w] : edges) {\n  if (dist[u] != INF \u0026amp;\u0026amp; dist[v] \u0026gt; dist[u] + w) {\n    has_negative_cycle = true;\n    break;\n  }\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ebool\u003c/span\u003e has_negative_cycle = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efalse\u003c/span\u003e;\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e [u, v, w] : edges) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (dist[u] != INF \u0026amp;\u0026amp; dist[v] \u0026gt; dist[u] + w) {\n    has_negative_cycle = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etrue\u003c/span\u003e;\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ebreak\u003c/span\u003e;\n  }\n}\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e最多经过 \u003ccode\u003ek\u003c/code\u003e 条边的最短路：每一轮必须用上一轮的备份，避免同一轮连续松弛多条边。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"std::vector\u0026lt;long long\u0026gt; dist(n + 1, INF);\ndist[start] = 0;\n\nfor (int step = 1; step \u0026lt;= k; ++step) {\n  auto prev = dist;\n  for (auto [u, v, w] : edges) {\n    if (prev[u] != INF)\n      dist[v] = std::min(dist[v], prev[u] + w);\n  }\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003estd::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003edist\u003c/span\u003e(n + \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e, INF);\ndist[start] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e;\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e step = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e; step \u0026lt;= k; ++step) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e prev = dist;\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e [u, v, w] : edges) {\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (prev[u] != INF)\n      dist[v] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003estd::min\u003c/span\u003e(dist[v], prev[u] + w);\n  }\n}\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e差分约束：\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003ex_v \u0026lt;= x_u + w\u003c/code\u003e 建边 \u003ccode\u003eu -\u0026gt; v, w\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e求一组可行解：加超级源 \u003ccode\u003e0\u003c/code\u003e，向所有点连 \u003ccode\u003e0\u003c/code\u003e 权边，再跑 Bellman-Ford\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e若存在负环，则约束无解\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"for (int i = 1; i \u0026lt;= n; ++i)\n  edges.push_back({0, i, 0});\ndist.assign(n + 1, INF);\ndist[0] = 0;\n// 跑 Bellman-Ford；若还能松弛，说明差分约束无解\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e i = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e; i \u0026lt;= n; ++i)\n  edges.push_back({\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e, i, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e});\ndist.assign(n + \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e, INF);\ndist[\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e;\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 跑 Bellman-Ford；若还能松弛，说明差分约束无解\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch4 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003eSPFA\u003c/h4\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-spfa\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: SPFA\" href=\"#spfa\"\u003e\u003csvg data-component=\"Octicon\" class=\"octicon 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eBellman-Ford 的队列优化版。只把被更新的点入队，再用它继续松弛出边。最坏仍是 \u003ccode\u003eO(nm)\u003c/code\u003e，但稀疏图/差分约束中常用。SLF 优化：如果新点距离比队首更小，就放到队首。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"const long long INF = 4e18;\nstd::vector\u0026lt;long long\u0026gt; dist(n + 1, INF);\nstd::vector\u0026lt;bool\u0026gt; in_queue(n + 1, false);\nstd::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; count(n + 1, 0);\nstd::deque\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; q;\n\ndist[start] = 0;\nq.push(start);\nin_queue[start] = true;\ncount[start] = 1;\n\nbool has_negative_cycle = false;\nwhile (!q.empty() \u0026amp;\u0026amp; !has_negative_cycle) {\n  int u = q.front();\n  q.pop();\n  in_queue[u] = false;\n\n  for (auto [v, w] : adj[u]) {\n    if (dist[u] != INF \u0026amp;\u0026amp; dist[v] \u0026gt; dist[u] + w) {\n      dist[v] = dist[u] + w;\n      if (!in_queue[v]) {\n        if (!q.empty() \u0026amp;\u0026amp; dist[v] \u0026lt; dist[q.front()])\n          q.push_front(v);\n        else\n          q.push_back(v);\n        in_queue[v] = true;\n        if (++count[v] \u0026gt; n) {\n          has_negative_cycle = true;\n          break;\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003econst\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e INF = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e4e18\u003c/span\u003e;\nstd::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003edist\u003c/span\u003e(n + \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e, INF);\nstd::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ebool\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ein_queue\u003c/span\u003e(n + \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efalse\u003c/span\u003e);\nstd::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ecount\u003c/span\u003e(n + \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e);\nstd::deque\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; q;\n\ndist[start] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e;\nq.push(start);\nin_queue[start] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etrue\u003c/span\u003e;\ncount[start] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e;\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ebool\u003c/span\u003e has_negative_cycle = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efalse\u003c/span\u003e;\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ewhile\u003c/span\u003e (!q.empty() \u0026amp;\u0026amp; !has_negative_cycle) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e u = q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efront\u003c/span\u003e();\n  q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epop\u003c/span\u003e();\n  in_queue[u] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efalse\u003c/span\u003e;\n\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e [v, w] : adj[u]) {\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (dist[u] != INF \u0026amp;\u0026amp; dist[v] \u0026gt; dist[u] + w) {\n      dist[v] = dist[u] + w;\n      \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (!in_queue[v]) {\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (!q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eempty\u003c/span\u003e() \u0026amp;\u0026amp; dist[v] \u0026lt; dist[q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efront\u003c/span\u003e()])\n          q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epush_front\u003c/span\u003e(v);\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelse\u003c/span\u003e\n          q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epush_back\u003c/span\u003e(v);\n        in_queue[v] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etrue\u003c/span\u003e;\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (++count[v] \u0026gt; n) {\n          has_negative_cycle = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etrue\u003c/span\u003e;\n          \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ebreak\u003c/span\u003e;\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e差分约束要检查全图负环时，加超级源后从 \u003ccode\u003e0\u003c/code\u003e 开始跑；或者一开始把所有点都入队：\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"for (int i = 1; i \u0026lt;= n; ++i) {\n  dist[i] = 0;\n  q.push_back(i);\n  in_queue[i] = true;\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e i = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e; i \u0026lt;= n; ++i) {\n  dist[i] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e;\n  q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epush_back\u003c/span\u003e(i);\n  in_queue[i] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etrue\u003c/span\u003e;\n}\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch4 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003eFloyd-Warshall（全源最短路）\u003c/h4\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-floyd-warshall全源最短路\" class=\"anchor\" 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e适用：点数较小的全源最短路，复杂度 \u003ccode\u003eO(n^3)\u003c/code\u003e。通常用 0-based 或 1-based 都可以，下面是 1-based。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"const long long INF = 4e18;\nstd::vector dist(n + 1, std::vector\u0026lt;long long\u0026gt;(n + 1, INF));\n\nfor (int i = 1; i \u0026lt;= n; ++i)\n  dist[i][i] = 0;\nfor (auto [u, v, w] : edges)\n  dist[u][v] = std::min(dist[u][v], w); // 无向图再加 dist[v][u]\n\nfor (int k = 1; k \u0026lt;= n; ++k)\n  for (int i = 1; i \u0026lt;= n; ++i)\n    for (int j = 1; j \u0026lt;= n; ++j)\n      if (dist[i][k] != INF \u0026amp;\u0026amp; dist[k][j] != INF)\n        dist[i][j] = std::min(dist[i][j], dist[i][k] + dist[k][j]);\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003econst\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e INF = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e4e18\u003c/span\u003e;\nstd::vector \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003edist\u003c/span\u003e(n + \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e, std::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;(n + \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e, INF));\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e i = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e; i \u0026lt;= n; ++i)\n  dist[i][i] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e;\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e [u, v, w] : edges)\n  dist[u][v] = std::min(dist[u][v], w); \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 无向图再加 dist[v][u]\u003c/span\u003e\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e k = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e; k \u0026lt;= n; ++k)\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e i = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e; i \u0026lt;= n; ++i)\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e j = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e; j \u0026lt;= n; ++j)\n      \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (dist[i][k] != INF \u0026amp;\u0026amp; dist[k][j] != INF)\n        dist[i][j] = std::min(dist[i][j], dist[i][k] + dist[k][j]);\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e路径恢复：\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"std::vector next(n + 1, std::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt;(n + 1, -1));\nfor (int i = 1; i \u0026lt;= n; ++i)\n  next[i][i] = i;\nfor (auto [u, v, w] : edges) {\n  if (w \u0026lt; dist[u][v]) {\n    dist[u][v] = w;\n    next[u][v] = v;\n  }\n}\n\nfor (int k = 1; k \u0026lt;= n; ++k)\n  for (int i = 1; i dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e边集输入、稀疏图：Kruskal，\u003ccode\u003eO(m log m)\u003c/code\u003e，最好写。\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e邻接矩阵、完全图、稠密图：朴素 Prim，\u003ccode\u003eO(n^2)\u003c/code\u003e。\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e邻接表且边较多但不稠密：堆优化 Prim，\u003ccode\u003eO(m log m)\u003c/code\u003e。\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e应用：\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e城市/网络/道路最小连接成本。\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e完全图坐标点 MST：通常用朴素 Prim，距离边用到时再算。\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e“已存在免费边”：先把免费边权设为 \u003ccode\u003e0\u003c/code\u003e，或先用并查集合并。\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e最大生成树：把排序改成从大到小，或 Prim 选最大边。\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch4 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003eKruskal\u003c/h4\u003e\u003ca data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"struct Edge {\n  int u, v;\n  long long w;\n  bool operator\u0026lt;(const Edge \u0026amp;other) const {\n    return w \u0026lt; other.w;\n  }\n};\n\nclass DSU {\nprivate:\n  std::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; parent, size;\n\npublic:\n  explicit DSU(int n) : parent(n + 1), size(n + 1, 1) {\n    std::iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);\n  }\n\n  auto find(int x) -\u0026gt; int {\n    return parent[x] == x ? x : parent[x] = find(parent[x]);\n  }\n\n  auto unite(int x, int y) -\u0026gt; bool {\n    int rx = find(x), ry = find(y);\n    if (rx == ry)\n      return false;\n    if (size[rx] \u0026lt; size[ry])\n      std::swap(rx, ry);\n    parent[ry] = rx;\n    size[rx] += size[ry];\n    return true;\n  }\n};\n\nstd::sort(edges.begin(), edges.end());\nDSU dsu(n);\nlong long mst = 0;\nint count = 0;\n\nfor (auto [u, v, w] : edges) {\n  if (dsu.unite(u, v)) {\n    mst += w;\n    if (++count == n - 1)\n      break;\n  }\n}\n\nif (count != n - 1) {\n  // 图不连通，不存在生成树\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003estruct\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eEdge\u003c/span\u003e {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e u, v;\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e w;\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ebool\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eoperator\u003c/span\u003e\u0026lt;(\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003econst\u003c/span\u003e Edge \u0026amp;other) \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003econst\u003c/span\u003e {\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e w \u0026lt; other.\u003cspan class=\"pl-smi\"\u003ew\u003c/span\u003e;\n  }\n};\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eclass\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eDSU\u003c/span\u003e {\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eprivate:\u003c/span\u003e\n  std::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; parent, size;\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003epublic:\u003c/span\u003e\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eexplicit\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eDSU\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e n) : parent(n + \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e), size(n + \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e) {\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003estd::iota\u003c/span\u003e(parent.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ebegin\u003c/span\u003e(), parent.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eend\u003c/span\u003e(), \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e);\n  }\n\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003efind\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e x) -\u0026gt; int {\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e parent[x] == x ? x : parent[x] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efind\u003c/span\u003e(parent[x]);\n  }\n\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eunite\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e x, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e y) -\u0026gt; bool {\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e rx = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efind\u003c/span\u003e(x), ry = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efind\u003c/span\u003e(y);\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (rx == ry)\n      \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efalse\u003c/span\u003e;\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (size[rx] \u0026lt; size[ry])\n      \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003estd::swap\u003c/span\u003e(rx, ry);\n    parent[ry] = rx;\n    size[rx] += size[ry];\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etrue\u003c/span\u003e;\n  }\n};\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003estd::sort\u003c/span\u003e(edges.begin(), edges.end());\nDSU \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003edsu\u003c/span\u003e(n);\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e mst = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e;\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e count = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e;\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e [u, v, w] : edges) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (dsu.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eunite\u003c/span\u003e(u, v)) {\n    mst += w;\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (++count == n - \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e)\n      \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ebreak\u003c/span\u003e;\n  }\n}\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (count != n - \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 图不连通，不存在生成树\u003c/span\u003e\n}\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch4 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003ePrim 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e适合稠密图。\u003ccode\u003ematrix[u][v]\u003c/code\u003e 是边权，不连通边设为 \u003ccode\u003eINF\u003c/code\u003e。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"const long long INF = 4e18;\nstd::vector\u0026lt;long long\u0026gt; min_dist(n, INF);\nstd::vector\u0026lt;bool\u0026gt; visited(n, false);\n\nmin_dist[0] = 0;\nlong long mst = 0;\n\nfor (int step = 0; step \u0026lt; n; ++step) {\n  int u = -1;\n  for (int i = 0; i \u0026lt; n; ++i)\n    if (!visited[i] \u0026amp;\u0026amp; (u == -1 || min_dist[i] \u0026lt; min_dist[u]))\n      u = i;\n\n  if (u == -1 || min_dist[u] == INF) {\n    // 图不连通\n    break;\n  }\n\n  visited[u] = true;\n  mst += min_dist[u];\n\n  for (int v = 0; v \u0026lt; n; ++v)\n    if (!visited[v] \u0026amp;\u0026amp; matrix[u][v] \u0026lt; min_dist[v])\n      min_dist[v] = matrix[u][v];\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003econst\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan INF);\nstd::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ebool\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003evisited\u003c/span\u003e(n, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efalse\u003c/span\u003e);\n\nmin_dist[\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e;\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e mst = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e;\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e step = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e; step \u0026lt; n; ++step) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e u = -\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e;\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e i = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e; i \u0026lt; n; ++i)\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (!visited[i] \u0026amp;\u0026amp; (u == -\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e || min_dist[i] \u0026lt; min_dist[u]))\n      u = i;\n\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (u == class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e v = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e; v \u0026lt; n; ++v)\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (!visited[v] \u0026amp;\u0026amp; matrix[u][v] \u0026lt; min_dist[v])\n      min_dist[v] = matrix[u][v];\n}\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"std::vector\u0026lt;bool\u0026gt; visited(n + 1, false);\nstd::priority_queue\u0026lt;std::pair\u0026lt;long long, int\u0026gt;,\n                    std::vector\u0026lt;std::pair\u0026lt;long long, int\u0026gt;\u0026gt;,\n                    std::greater\u0026lt;\u0026gt;\u0026gt; pq;\n\npq.emplace(0, 1);\nlong long mst = 0;\nint count = 0;\n\nwhile (!pq.empty() \u0026amp;\u0026amp; count \u0026lt; n) {\n  auto [w, u] = pq.top();\n  pq.pop();\n  if (visited[u])\n    continue;\n\n  visited[u] = true;\n  mst += w;\n  ++count;\n\n  for (auto [v, weight] : adj[u])\n    if (!visited[v])\n      pq.emplace(weight, v);\n}\n\nif (count != n) {\n  // 图不连通\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003estd::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e适用：有向无环图 DAG，边表示活动，边权表示活动耗时。求项目最短完成时间、关键活动、哪些任务不能延误。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e记号：\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eve[u]\u003c/code\u003e：事件 \u003ccode\u003eu\u003c/code\u003e 的最早发生时间\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003evl[u]\u003c/code\u003e：事件 \u003ccode\u003eu\u003c/code\u003e 的最晚发生时间\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e边 \u003ccode\u003eu -\u0026gt; v, w\u003c/code\u003e 的活动最早开始 \u003ccode\u003ee = ve[u]\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e边 \u003ccode\u003eu -\u0026gt; v, w\u003c/code\u003e 的活动最晚开始 \u003ccode\u003el = vl[v] - w\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e若 \u003ccode\u003ee == l\u003c/code\u003e，该活动是关键活动\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"struct Edge {\n  int from, to, weight;\n};\n\nstd::vector\u0026lt;std::vector\u0026lt;std::pair\u0026lt;int, int\u0026gt;\u0026gt;\u0026gt; adj(n);\nstd::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; indegree(n, 0);\nstd::vector\u0026lt;Edge\u0026gt; edges;\n\nfor (auto [u, v, w] : edges) {\n  adj[u].emplace_back(v, w);\n  ++indegree[v];\n}\n\nstd::queue\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; q;\nstd::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; topo;\nstd::vector\u0026lt;long long\u0026gt; ve(n, 0);\n\nfor (int i = 0; i \u0026lt; n; ++i)\n  if (indegree[i] == 0)\n    q.push(i);\n\nwhile (!q.empty()) {\n  int u = q.front();\n  q.pop();\n  topo.push_back(u);\n\n  for (auto [v, w] : adj[u]) {\n    ve[v] = std::max(ve[v], ve[u] + w);\n    if (--indegree[v] == 0)\n      q.push(v);\n  }\n}\n\nif (topo.size() != n) {\n  // 有环，不是 AOE 网\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003estruct\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eEdge\u003c/span\u003e {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e from, to, weight;\n};\n\nstd::vector\u0026lt;std::vector\u0026lt;std::pair\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;\u0026gt;\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eadj\u003c/span\u003e(n);\nstd::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eindegree\u003c/span\u003e(n, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e);\nstd::vector\u0026lt;Edge\u0026gt; edges;\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e [u, v, w] : edges) {\n  adj[u].\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eemplace_back\u003c/span\u003e(v, w);\n  ++indegree[v];\n}\n\nstd::queue\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; q;\nstd::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; topo;\nstd::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eve\u003c/span\u003e(n, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e);\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e i = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e; i \u0026lt; n; ++i)\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (indegree[i] == \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e)\n    q.push(i);\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ewhile\u003c/span\u003e (!q.empty()) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e u = q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efront\u003c/span\u003e();\n  q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epop\u003c/span\u003e();\n  topo.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epush_back\u003c/span\u003e(u);\n\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e [v, w] : adj[u]) {\n    ve[v] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003estd::max\u003c/span\u003e(ve[v], ve[u] + w);\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (--indegree[v] == \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e)\n      q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epush\u003c/span\u003e(v);\n  }\n}\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (topo.size() != n) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 有环，不是 AOE 网\u003c/span\u003e\n}\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e反向求最晚发生时间：\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"long long project_time = *std::ranges::max_element(ve);\n\nstd::vector\u0026lt;long long\u0026gt; vl(n, project_time);\nfor (int i = n - 1; i \u0026gt;= 0; --i) {\n  int u = topo[i];\n  for (auto [v, w] : adj[u]) {\n    vl[u] = std::min(vl[u], vl[v] - w);\n  }\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e project_time = *\u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003estd::ranges::max_element\u003c/span\u003e(ve);\n\nstd::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003evl\u003c/span\u003e(n, project_time);\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e i = n - \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e; i \u0026gt;= \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e; --i) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e u = topo[i];\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e [v, w] : adj[u]) {\n    vl[u] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003estd::min\u003c/span\u003e(vl[u], vl[v] - w);\n  }\n}\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e输出关键活动：\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"for (auto [u, v, w] : edges) {\n  long long earliest = ve[u];\n  long long latest = vl[v] - w;\n  if (earliest == latest) {\n    // u -\u0026gt; v 是关键活动\n  }\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e [u, v, w] : edges) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e earliest = ve[u];\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e latest = vl[v] - w;\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (earliest == latest) {\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e u -\u0026gt; v 是关键活动\u003c/span\u003e\n  }\n}\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e应用：\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e项目最短完成时间：\u003ccode\u003eproject_time\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e关键路径长度：\u003ccode\u003eproject_time\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e活动可延误时间：\u003ccode\u003elatest - earliest\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e多条关键路径：所有 \u003ccode\u003eearliest == latest\u003c/code\u003e 的边组成的关键子图中可能有多条路径\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv dir=\"auto\"\u003e判重、计数、记录最早或最晚位置。\u003ccode\u003estd::set\u003c/code\u003e 有序，查找和插入 \u003ccode\u003eO(log n)\u003c/code\u003e；\u003ccode\u003estd::unordered_set\u003c/code\u003e 均摊 \u003ccode\u003eO(1)\u003c/code\u003e，但不能有序遍历。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"std::unordered_map\u0026lt;int, int\u0026gt; count;\nfor (int x : a)\n  ++count[x];\n\nstd::unordered_set\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; seen;\nfor (int x : a) {\n  if (seen.contains(target - x)) {\n    // 找到一组和为 target 的数\n  }\n  seen.insert(x);\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003estd::unordered_map\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e x : a) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (seen.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003econtains\u003c/span\u003e(target - x)) {\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 找到一组和为 target 的数\u003c/span\u003e\n  }\n  seen.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003einsert\u003c/span\u003e(x);\n}\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e值到下标列表，配合二分找最小合法下标：\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ dir=\"auto\"\u003e有序数组二数和：\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"int l = 0, r = n - 1;\nwhile (l \u0026lt; r) {\n  int sum = a[l] + a[r];\n  if (sum \u0026lt; target)\n    ++l;\n  else if (sum \u0026gt; target)\n    --r;\n  else\n    break;\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e l = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e, r = n - \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e;\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ewhile\u003c/span\u003e (l \u0026lt; r) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e sum = a[l] + a[r];\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (sum \u0026lt; target)\n    ++l;\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelse\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (sum \u0026gt; target)\n    --r;\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelse\u003c/span\u003e\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ebreak\u003c/span\u003e;\n}\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e滑动窗口：\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"int l = 0;\nlong long sum = 0;\nfor (int r = 0; r \u0026lt; n; ++r) {\n  sum += a[r];\n  while (l \u0026lt;= r \u0026amp;\u0026amp; !check_window(l, r, sum)) {\n    sum -= a[l];\n    ++l;\n  }\n  // [l, r] 是当前合法窗口\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e l = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e;\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e sum = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e;\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e r = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e; r \u0026lt; n; ++r) {\n  sum += a[r];\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ewhile\u003c/span\u003e (l \u0026lt;= r \u0026amp;\u0026amp; !\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003echeck_window\u003c/span\u003e(l, r, sum)) {\n    sum -= a[l];\n    ++l;\n  }\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e [l, r] 是当前合法窗口\u003c/span\u003e\n}\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch3 tabindex=\"-1\" 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e普通 BFS 用 \u003ccode\u003equeue\u003c/code\u003e；需要两端进出、维护窗口或 0-1 BFS 时用 \u003ccode\u003edeque\u003c/code\u003e。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"std::queue\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; q;\ndist[start] = 0;\nq.push(start);\n\nwhile (!q.empty()) {\n  int u = q.front();\n  q.pop();\n  for (int v : g[u]) {\n    if (dist[v] != -1)\n      continue;\n    dist[v] = dist[u] + 1;\n    q.push(v);\n  }\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003estd::queue\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; q;\ndist[start] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e;\nq.push(start);\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ewhile\u003c/span\u003e (!q.empty()) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e u = q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efront\u003c/span\u003e();\n  q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epop\u003c/span\u003e();\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e v : g[u]) {\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (dist[v] != -\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e)\n      \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003econtinue\u003c/span\u003e;\n    dist[v] = dist[u] + \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e;\n    q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epush\u003c/span\u003e(v);\n  }\n}\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e0-1 BFS：\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"std::deque\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; q;\ndist[start] = 0;\nq.push_front(start);\n\nwhile (!q.empty()) {\n  int u = q.front();\n  q.pop_front();\n  for (auto [v, w] : g[u]) {\n    if (dist[u] + w \u0026lt; dist[v]) {\n      dist[v] = dist[u] + w;\n      if (w == 0)\n        q.push_front(v);\n      else\n        q.push_back(v);\n    }\n  }\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003estd::deque\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; q;\ndist[start] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e;\nq.push_front(start);\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ewhile\u003c/span\u003e (!q.empty()) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e u = q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efront\u003c/span\u003e();\n  q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epop_front\u003c/span\u003e();\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e [v, w] : g[u]) {\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (dist[u] + w \u0026lt; dist[v]) {\n      dist[v] = dist[u] + w;\n      \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (w == \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e)\n        q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epush_front\u003c/span\u003e(v);\n      \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelse\u003c/span\u003e\n        q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epush_back\u003c/span\u003e(v);\n    }\n  }\n}\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"struct Change {\n  int index;\n  int old_value;\n};\n\nstd::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; a(n);\nstd::vector\u0026lt;Change\u0026gt; history;\n\nauto assign_value = [\u0026amp;](int index, int value) {\n  history.push_back({index, a[index]});\n  a[index] = value;\n};\n\nauto snapshot = [\u0026amp;]() {\n  return static_cast\u0026lt;int\u0026gt;(history.size());\n};\n\nauto rollback = [\u0026amp;](int checkpoint) {\n  while (static_cast\u0026lt;int\u0026gt;(history.size()) \u0026gt; checkpoint) {\n    auto [index, old_value] = history.back();\n    history.pop_back();\n    a[index] = old_value;\n  }\n};\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003estruct\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eChange\u003c/span\u003e {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e index;\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e old_value;\n};\n\nstd::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ea\u003c/span\u003e(n);\nstd::vector\u0026lt;Change\u0026gt; history;\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e assign_value = [\u0026amp;](\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e index, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e value) {\n  history.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epush_back\u003c/span\u003e({index, a[index]});\n  a[index] = value;\n};\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e snapshot = [\u0026amp;]() {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003estatic_cast\u003c/span\u003e\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;(history.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esize\u003c/span\u003e());\n};\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e rollback = [\u0026amp;](\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e checkpoint) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ewhile\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003estatic_cast\u003c/span\u003e\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;(history.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esize\u003c/span\u003e()) \u0026gt; checkpoint) {\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e [index, old_value] = history.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eback\u003c/span\u003e();\n    history.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epop_back\u003c/span\u003e();\n    a[index] = old_value;\n  }\n};\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch3 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e堆 / 优先队列\u003c/h3\u003e\u003ca \u003ccode\u003estd::greater\u0026lt;\u0026gt;\u003c/code\u003e。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"std::priority_queue\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; max_heap;\nstd::priority_queue\u0026lt;int, std::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt;, std::greater\u0026lt;\u0026gt;\u0026gt; min_heap;\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003estd::priority_queue\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; max_heap;\nstd::priority_queue\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e, std::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;, std::greater\u0026lt;\u0026gt;\u0026gt; min_heap;\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e自定义排序：比较器返回 \u003ccode\u003etrue\u003c/code\u003e 表示优先级更低，会排到后面。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"struct Node {\n  int value;\n  int id;\n};\n\nstruct Compare {\n  auto operator()(const Node \u0026amp;a, const Node \u0026amp;b) const -\u0026gt; bool {\n    if (a.value != b.value)\n      return a.value \u0026gt; b.value; // 小 value 优先\n    return a.id \u0026gt; b.id;\n  }\n};\n\nstd::priority_queue\u0026lt;Node, std::vector\u0026lt;Node\u0026gt;, Compare\u0026gt; pq;\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003estruct\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eNode\u003c/span\u003e {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e value;\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e id;\n};\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003estruct\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eCompare\u003c/span\u003e {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eoperator\u003c/span\u003e()(\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003econst\u003c/span\u003e Node \u0026amp;a, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003econst\u003c/span\u003e Node \u0026amp;b) \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003econst\u003c/span\u003e -\u0026gt; bool {\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (a.\u003cspan class=\"pl-smi\"\u003evalue\u003c/span\u003e != b.\u003cspan class=\"pl-smi\"\u003evalue\u003c/span\u003e)\n      \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e a.\u003cspan class=\"pl-smi\"\u003evalue\u003c/span\u003e \u0026gt; b.\u003cspan class=\"pl-smi\"\u003evalue\u003c/span\u003e; \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 小 value 优先\u003c/span\u003e\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e a.\u003cspan class=\"pl-smi\"\u003eid\u003c/span\u003e \u0026gt; b.\u003cspan class=\"pl-smi\"\u003eid\u003c/span\u003e;\n  }\n};\n\nstd::priority_queue\u0026lt;Node, std::vector\u0026lt;Node\u0026gt;, Compare\u0026gt; pq;\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eDijkstra / Prim 里常用懒删除：弹出时如果状态已经过期，直接 \u003ccode\u003econtinue\u003c/code\u003e。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch3 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e适用：找每个元素左/右第一个更大或更小的元素、柱状图最大矩形、字典序删除字符。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e右侧第一个更大元素：\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"std::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; next_greater(n, -1);\nstd::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; st; // 栈内下标对应值单调递减\n\nfor (int i = 0; i \u0026lt; n; ++i) {\n  while (!st.empty() \u0026amp;\u0026amp; a[st.back()] \u0026lt; a[i]) {\n    next_greater[st.back()] = i;\n    st.pop_back();\n  }\n  st.push_back(i);\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003estd::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003enext_greater\u003c/span\u003e(n, -\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e);\nstd::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; st; \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 栈内下标对应值单调递减\u003c/span\u003e\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e i = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e; i \u0026lt; n; ++i) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ewhile\u003c/span\u003e (!st.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eempty\u003c/span\u003e() \u0026amp;\u0026amp; a[st.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eback\u003c/span\u003e()] \u0026lt; a[i]) {\n    next_greater[st.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eback\u003c/span\u003e()] = i;\n    st.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epop_back\u003c/span\u003e();\n  }\n  st.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epush_back\u003c/span\u003e(i);\n}\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e柱状图最大矩形：\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"a.push_back(0); // 哨兵，清空栈\nstd::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; st;\nlong long ans = 0;\n\nfor (int i = 0; i \u0026lt; a.size(); ++i) {\n  while (!st.empty() \u0026amp;\u0026amp; a[st.back()] \u0026gt; a[i]) {\n    int h = a[st.back()];\n    st.pop_back();\n    int left = st.empty() ? -1 : st.back();\n    ans = std::max(ans, 1LL * h * (i - left - 1));\n  }\n  st.push_back(i);\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003ea.push_back(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e); \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 哨兵，清空栈\u003c/span\u003e\nstd::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; st;\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e ans = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e;\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e i = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e; i \u0026lt; a.size(); ++i) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ewhile\u003c/span\u003e (!st.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eempty\u003c/span\u003e() \u0026amp;\u0026amp; a[st.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eback\u003c/span\u003e()] \u0026gt; a[i]) {\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e h = a[st.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eback\u003c/span\u003e()];\n    st.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epop_back\u003c/span\u003e();\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e left = st.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eempty\u003c/span\u003e() ? -\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e : st.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eback\u003c/span\u003e();\n    ans = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003estd::max\u003c/span\u003e(ans, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1LL\u003c/span\u003e * h * (i - left - \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e));\n  }\n  st.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epush_back\u003c/span\u003e(i);\n}\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e适用：滑动窗口最大/最小值、窗口内 DP 最值优化。队列里存下标，队首永远是当前窗口最优。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e滑动窗口最大值：\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"std::deque\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; q;\nstd::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; ans;\n\nfor (int i = 0; i \u0026lt; n; ++i) {\n  while (!q.empty() \u0026amp;\u0026amp; q.front() \u0026lt;= i - k)\n    q.pop_front(); // 过期\n  while (!q.empty() \u0026amp;\u0026amp; a[q.back()] \u0026lt;= a[i])\n    q.pop_back(); // 保持递减\n  q.push_back(i);\n  if (i \u0026gt;= k - 1)\n    ans.push_back(a[q.front()]);\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003estd::deque\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; q;\nstd::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; ans;\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e i = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e; i \u0026lt; n; ++i) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ewhile\u003c/span\u003e (!q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eempty\u003c/span\u003e() \u0026amp;\u0026amp; q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efront\u003c/span\u003e() \u0026lt;= i - k)\n    q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epop_front\u003c/span\u003e(); \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 过期\u003c/span\u003e\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ewhile\u003c/span\u003e (!q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eempty\u003c/span\u003e() \u0026amp;\u0026amp; a[q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eback\u003c/span\u003e()] \u0026lt;= a[i])\n    q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epop_back\u003c/span\u003e(); \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 保持递减\u003c/span\u003e\n  q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epush_back\u003c/span\u003e(i);\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (i \u0026gt;= k - \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e)\n    ans.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epush_back\u003c/span\u003e(a[q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efront\u003c/span\u003e()]);\n}\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eDP 窗口最大值：\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"// dp[i] = value[i] + max(dp[j]), i - k \u0026lt;= j \u0026lt; i\nstd::deque\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; q;\nfor (int i = 0; i \u0026lt; n; ++i) {\n  while (!q.empty() \u0026amp;\u0026amp; q.front() \u0026lt; i - k)\n    q.pop_front();\n  if (!q.empty())\n    dp[i] = value[i] + dp[q.front()];\n  while (!q.empty() \u0026amp;\u0026amp; dp[q.back()] \u0026lt;= dp[i])\n    q.pop_back();\n  q.push_back(i);\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e dp[i] = value[i] + max(dp[j]), i - k \u0026lt;= j \u0026lt; i\u003c/span\u003e\nstd::deque\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; q;\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e i = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e; i \u0026lt; n; ++i) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ewhile\u003c/span\u003e (!q.\u003cspan dp[q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efront\u003c/span\u003e()];\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ewhile\u003c/span\u003e (!q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eempty\u003c/span\u003e() \u0026amp;\u0026amp; dp[q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eback\u003c/span\u003e()] \u0026lt;= dp[i])\n    q.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epop_back\u003c/span\u003e();\n  q.\u003cspan 是否可行”。关键是判定函数 \u003ccode\u003echeck(x)\u003c/code\u003e 必须单调。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e最大值最小化：找最小可行值，形如 \u003ccode\u003efalse false true true\u003c/code\u003e。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"auto check = [\u0026amp;](long long x) {\n  // 是否能让最大代价 \u0026lt;= x\n  return true;\n};\n\nlong long l = low, r = high;\nwhile (l \u0026lt; r) {\n  long long mid = l + ((r - l) \u0026gt;\u0026gt; 1);\n  if (check(mid))\n    r = mid;\n  else\n    l = mid + 1;\n}\n// l 是最小可行值\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e check = [\u0026amp;](\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e x) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e 是否能让最大代价 \u0026lt;= x\u003c/span\u003e\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etrue\u003c/span\u003e;\n};\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e l = low, r = high;\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ewhile\u003c/span\u003e (l \u0026lt; r) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e mid = l + ((r - l) \u0026gt;\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e);\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003echeck\u003c/span\u003e(mid))\n    r = mid;\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelse\u003c/span\u003e\n    l = mid + \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e;\n}\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e l 是最小可行值\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e应用：分割数组最小化最大段和、运货最小容量、最小化最大距离。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e最小值最大化：找最大可行值，形如 \u003ccode\u003etrue true false false\u003c/code\u003e。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"auto check = [\u0026amp;](long long x) {\n  // 是否能让最小收益/间距 \u0026gt;= x\n  return true;\n};\n\nlong long l = low, r = high;\nwhile (l \u0026lt; r) {\n  long long mid = l + ((r - l + 1) \u0026gt;\u0026gt; 1);\n  if (check(mid))\n    l = mid;\n  else\n    r = mid - 1;\n}\n// l 是最大可行值\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e check = [\u0026amp;](\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etrue\u003c/span\u003e;\n};\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e mid = l + ((r - l + \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e) \u0026gt;\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e);\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003echeck\u003c/span\u003e(mid))\n    l = mid;\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelse\u003c/span\u003e\n    r = mid - \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e;\n}\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e//\u003c/span\u003e l 是最大可行值\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e埃氏筛，简单好写，复杂度 \u003ccode\u003eO(n log log n)\u003c/code\u003e。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"std::vector\u0026lt;bool\u0026gt; is_prime(limit + 1, true);\nis_prime[0] = is_prime[1] = false;\n\nfor (int i = 2; i * i \u0026lt;= limit; ++i) {\n  if (!is_prime[i])\n    continue;\n  for (long long j = 1LL * i * i; j \u0026lt;= limit; j += i)\n    is_prime[j] = false;\n}\n\nstd::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; primes;\nfor (int i = 2; i \u0026lt;= class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (!is_prime[i])\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003econtinue\u003c/span\u003e;\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e j = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1LL\u003c/span\u003e * i * i; j \u0026lt;= limit; j += i)\n    is_prime[j] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efalse\u003c/span\u003e;\n}\n\nstd::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; primes;\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e i = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e2\u003c/span\u003e; i \u0026lt;= limit; ++i)\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (is_prime[i])\n    primes.push_back(i);\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e线性筛，每个合数只被最小质因数筛一次，复杂度 \u003ccode\u003eO(n)\u003c/code\u003e。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"std::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; primes;\nstd::vector\u0026lt;bool\u0026gt; is_composite(limit + 1, false);\n\nfor (int i = 2; i \u0026lt;= limit; ++i) {\n  if (!is_composite[i])\n    primes.push_back(i);\n  for (int p : primes) {\n    if (1LL * i * p \u0026gt; limit)\n      break;\n    is_composite[i * p] = true;\n    if (i % p == 0)\n      break;\n \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eis_composite\u003c/span\u003e(limit + \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efalse\u003c/span\u003e);\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e i = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e2\u003c/span\u003e; i \u0026lt;= limit; ++i) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (!is_composite[i])\n    primes.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epush_back\u003c/span\u003e(i);\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e p : primes) {\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1LL\u003c/span\u003e * i * p \u0026gt; limit)\n      \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ebreak\u003c/span\u003e;\n    is_composite[i * p] = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etrue\u003c/span\u003e;\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (i % p == \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e)\n      \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ebreak\u003c/span\u003e;\n  }\n}\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e多次分解整数时先筛 \u003ccode\u003espf[x]\u003c/code\u003e，\u003ccode\u003espf[x]\u003c/code\u003e 表示 \u003ccode\u003ex\u003c/code\u003e 的最小质因数。复杂度 \u003ccode\u003eO(M log log M)\u003c/code\u003e 预处理，单次分解约 \u003ccode\u003eO(质因数个数)\u003c/code\u003e。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"std::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; spf(limit + 1, 0);\nfor (int i = 2; i \u0026lt;= limit; ++i) {\n  if (spf[i] != 0)\n    continue;\n  for (long long j = i; j \u0026lt;= limit; j += i)\n    if (spf[j] == 0)\n      spf[j] = i;\n}\n\nauto factorize = [\u0026amp;](int x) {\n  std::vector\u0026lt;std::pair\u0026lt;int, int\u0026gt;\u0026gt; factors;\n  while (x \u0026gt; 1) {\n    int p = spf[x], cnt = 0;\n    while (x % p == 0) {\n      x /= p;\n      ++cnt;\n    }\n    factors.push_back({p, cnt});\n  }\n  return factors;\n};\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003estd::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003espf\u003c/span\u003e(limit + \u003cspan i = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e2\u003c/span\u003e; i \u0026lt;= limit; ++i) {\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (spf[i] != \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e)\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003econtinue\u003c/span\u003e;\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003elong\u003c/span\u003e j = i; j \u0026lt;= limit; j += i)\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e (spf[j] == \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e)\n      spf[j] = i;\n}\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eauto\u003c/span\u003e factorize = [\u0026amp;](\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e x) {\n  std::vector\u0026lt;std::pair\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;\u0026gt; factors;\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ewhile\u003c/span\u003e (x \u0026gt; \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e) {\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e p = spf[x], cnt = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e;\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ewhile\u003c/span\u003e (x % p == \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e) {\n      x /= p;\n      ++cnt;\n    }\n    factors.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epush_back\u003c/span\u003e({p, cnt});\n  }\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e factors;\n};\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e生成所有约数：\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"std::vector\u0026lt;int\u0026gt; divisors{1};\nfor (auto [p, cnt] : factors) {\n  int size = static_cast\u0026lt;int\u0026gt;(divisors.size());\n  int power = 1;\n  for (int e = 1; e \u0026lt;= cnt; ++e) {\n    power *= p;\n    for (int i = 0; i \u0026lt; size; ++i)\n      divisors.push_back(divisors[i] * power);\n  }\n}\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003estd::vector\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt; divisors{\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e size = \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003estatic_cast\u003c/span\u003e\u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;(divisors.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esize\u003c/span\u003e());\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e power = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e;\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e e = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e; e \u0026lt;= cnt; ++e) {\n    power *= p;\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eint\u003c/span\u003e i = \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e; i \u0026lt; size; ++i)\n      divisors.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epush_back\u003c/span\u003e(divisors[i] * power);\n  }\n}\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e若图的转移和质因数/约数有关，先预处理每个数的因子表，再 BFS，避免每次现场分解。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch3 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e剪枝搜索\u003c/h3\u003e\u003ca 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e适用：组合枚举、分组、因子拆分。核心是先排序，再用上下界、重复跳过、不可行提前返回。\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"std::sort(a.rbegin(), a.rend()); // 大元素优先，剪枝更强\n\nauto dfs = [\u0026amp;](auto \u0026amp;\u0026amp;self, int index, int current) -\u0026gt; void {\n  if (current \u0026gt;= best)\n    return; // 最优性剪枝\n  if (index == n) {\n    best = std::min(best, current);\n    return;\n  }\n\n  for (int choice = 0; choice \u0026lt; limit; ++choice) {\n    if (!can_place(index, choice))\n      continue; // 可行性剪枝\n    place(index, choice);\n    self(self, index + 1, current + cost(index, choice));\n    undo(index, choice);\n  }\n};\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003estd::sort\u003c/span\u003e(a.rbegin(), a.rend()); \u003cspan
