 - pdf-two-col","---","","# Final Cheat Sheet","## 前缀和","### 二维前缀和","```cpp","class PrefixSum2D {","private:","  int m{}, n{};","  std::vector\u003cstd::vector\u003clong long\u003e\u003e pre_sum;","","public:","  explicit PrefixSum2D(const std::vector\u003cstd::vector\u003cint\u003e\u003e \u0026matrix) {","    m = static_cast\u003cint\u003e(matrix.size());","    n = m == 0 ? 0 : static_cast\u003cint\u003e(matrix[0].size());","    pre_sum.assign(m + 1, std::vector\u003clong long\u003e(n + 1, 0));","    for (int i = 1; i \u003c= m; ++i)","      for (int j = 1; j \u003c= n; ++j)","        pre_sum[i][j] = pre_sum[i - 1][j] + pre_sum[i][j - 1] -","                        pre_sum[i - 1][j - 1] + matrix[i - 1][j - 1];","  }","","  auto query(int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2) -\u003e long long {","    return pre_sum[x2 + 1][y2 + 1] - pre_sum[x1][y2 + 1] -","           pre_sum[x2 + 1][y1] + pre_sum[x1][y1];","  }","};","```","### 动态前缀和：BIT","```cpp","class Fenwick {","private:","  int n;","  std::vector\u003cint\u003e tree;","public:","  explicit Fenwick(int n) : n(n), tree(n + 1, 0) {}","  auto update(int i, int v) -\u003e void {","    while (i \u003c= n) {","      tree[i] += v; // 单点增加 v","      i += (i \u0026 -i);","    }","  }","  auto query(int i) -\u003e int {","    int sum = 0;","    while (i \u003e 0) {","      sum += tree[i]; // 查询前缀和[1, i]","      i \u0026= i - 1;","    }","    return sum;","  }","};","```","### BIT 扫描方向","离散化后 `rank(x)` 是 1-index；BIT 维护已经扫过的数的出现次数。","```cpp","std::vector\u003cint\u003e sorted = nums;","std::sort(sorted.begin(), sorted.end());","sorted.erase(std::unique(sorted.begin(), sorted.end()), sorted.end());","auto get_rank = [\u0026](int value) {","  return static_cast\u003cint\u003e(std::lower_bound(sorted.begin(), sorted.end(), value) - sorted.begin()) + 1;","};","```","边界：`\u003c x = query(r - 1)`，`\u003c= x = query(r)`，`\u003e x = seen - query(r)`，`\u003e= x = seen - query(r - 1)`。","```cpp","Fenwick bit(static_cast\u003cint\u003e(sorted.size()));","long long ans = 0;","// 左 -\u003e 右：统计左侧信息，如逆序对左边 \u003e nums[i]","for (int i = 0; i \u003c static_cast\u003cint\u003e(nums.size()); ++i) {","  int r = get_rank(nums[i]);","  ans += i - bit.query(r);","  bit.update(r, 1);","}","// 右 -\u003e 左：统计右侧信息，如逆序对右边 \u003c nums[i]","bit = Fenwick(static_cast\u003cint\u003e(sorted.size()));","for (int i = static_cast\u003cint\u003e(nums.size()) - 1; i \u003e= 0; --i) {","  int r = get_rank(nums[i]);","  ans += bit.query(r - 1);","  bit.update(r, 1);","}","```","康托展开排名从右往左扫：","```cpp","long long rank = 1;","for (int i = n - 1; i \u003e= 0; --i) {","  int smaller_on_right = bit.query(permutation[i] - 1);","  rank = (rank + smaller_on_right * fact[n - 1 - i]) % MOD;","  bit.update(permutation[i], 1);","}","```","","## 位运算 / 状态压缩","### 位运算速记","```cpp","bool has = (mask \u003e\u003e i) \u0026 1;        // 第 i 位是否为 1","mask |= 1 \u003c\u003c i;                    // 把第 i 位设为 1","mask \u0026= ~(1 \u003c\u003c i);                 // 把第 i 位清 0","mask ^= 1 \u003c\u003c i;                    // 翻转第 i 位","int lowbit = x \u0026 -x;               // 最低位的 1","int count = std::popcount(mask);   // C++20，1 的个数","```","枚举集合 `mask` 的非空子集：","```cpp","for (int sub = mask; sub; sub = (sub - 1) \u0026 mask) {","  // sub 是 mask 的一个非空子集","}","```","若要包含空集：","```cpp","for (int sub = mask;; sub = (sub - 1) \u0026 mask) {","  // use sub","  if (sub == 0)","    break;","}","```","","### 状态压缩 DP","适用：`n \u003c= 20` 左右，状态用二进制集合表示。常见转移是“从小集合扩展到大集合”。","","```cpp","const long long INF = 4e18;","std::vector dp(1 \u003c\u003c n, std::vector\u003clong long\u003e(n, INF));","dp[1 \u003c\u003c start][start] = 0;","","for (int mask = 0; mask \u003c (1 \u003c\u003c n); ++mask) {","  for (int u = 0; u \u003c n; ++u) {","    if (((mask \u003e\u003e u) \u0026 1) == 0 || dp[mask][u] == INF)","      continue;","    for (int v = 0; v \u003c n; ++v) {","      if ((mask \u003e\u003e v) \u0026 1)","        continue;","      int next_mask = mask | (1 \u003c\u003c v);","      dp[next_mask][v] = std::min(dp[next_mask][v], dp[mask][u] + cost[u][v]);","    }","  }","}","```","","## 排序 / 分治","### 归并排序 + 逆序对","```cpp","std::vector\u003cint\u003e tmp(nums.size());","auto merge_sort = [\u0026](auto \u0026\u0026self, int l, int r) -\u003e long long {","  if (r - l \u003c= 1) return 0;","  int m = l + ((r - l) \u003e\u003e 1);","  long long inv = self(self, l, m) + self(self, m, r);","  int i = l, j = m, k = l;","  while (i \u003c m || j \u003c r) {","    if (j == r || (i \u003c m \u0026\u0026 nums[i] \u003c= nums[j])) {","      tmp[k++] = nums[i++];","    } else {","      inv += m - i; // nums[i..m) 都 \u003e nums[j]","      tmp[k++] = nums[j++];","    }","  }","  for (int p = l; p \u003c r; ++p) nums[p] = tmp[p];","  return inv;","};","long long inversions = merge_sort(merge_sort, 0, static_cast\u003cint\u003e(nums.size()));","```","","### 贪心速记","适用：局部选择不会破坏全局最优，常和排序、优先队列、交换论证搭配。","","常见套路：","- 区间调度：按结束时间升序选，能选就选。","- 覆盖问题：在当前位置可选范围内，选能延伸最远的方案。","- 配对问题：排序后双指针，最小配最大或相邻配对。","- 反悔贪心：先接受选择，若超限制就用堆删掉代价最大或收益最小的选择。","","```cpp","std::sort(intervals.begin(), intervals.end(),","          [](auto \u0026a, auto \u0026b) { return a.end \u003c b.end; });","","int count = 0;","int last_end = std::numeric_limits\u003cint\u003e::min();","for (auto [start, end] : intervals) {","  if (start \u003e= last_end) {","    ++count;","    last_end = end;","  }","}","```","","## 动态规划","### 背包","0/1 背包：每个物品最多选一次，容量从大到小扫。","```cpp","std::vector\u003clong long\u003e dp(capacity + 1, 0);","for (int i = 0; i \u003c n; ++i)","  for (int c = capacity; c \u003e= weight[i]; --c)","    dp[c] = std::max(dp[c], dp[c - weight[i]] + value[i]);","```","完全背包：每个物品可选多次，容量从小到大扫。","```cpp","std::vector\u003clong long\u003e dp(capacity + 1, 0);","for (int i = 0; i \u003c n; ++i)","  for (int c = weight[i]; c \u003c= capacity; ++c)","    dp[c] = std::max(dp[c], dp[c - weight[i]] + value[i]);","```","","### LIS","`tails[len]` 表示长度为 `len + 1` 的上升子序列的最小结尾。","```cpp","std::vector\u003cint\u003e tails;","for (int x : nums) {","  auto it = std::lower_bound(tails.begin(), tails.end(), x);","  if (it == tails.end())","    tails.push_back(x);","  else","    *it = x;","}","int lis = static_cast\u003cint\u003e(tails.size());","```","严格上升用 `lower_bound`；非下降用 `upper_bound`。","","### 网格 DP","```cpp","std::vector dp(m, std::vector\u003clong long\u003e(n, 0));","dp[0][0] = grid[0][0];","for (int i = 0; i \u003c m; ++i) {","  for (int j = 0; j \u003c n; ++j) {","    if (i \u003e 0)","      dp[i][j] = std::max(dp[i][j], dp[i - 1][j] + grid[i][j]);","    if (j \u003e 0)","      dp[i][j] = std::max(dp[i][j], dp[i][j - 1] + grid[i][j]);","  }","}","```","","### 线性 DP / 滑动窗口 DP","线性 DP 通常只依赖前面若干状态：","","```cpp","std::vector\u003clong long\u003e dp(n, 0);","dp[0] = base;","for (int i = 1; i \u003c n; ++i) {","  dp[i] = std::max(dp[i - 1] + take[i], skip_value);","}","```","","若转移形如 `dp[i] = sum(dp[j]), i - k \u003c= j \u003c i`，用前缀和维护窗口和：","","```cpp","std::vector\u003clong long\u003e dp(n + 1, 0), prefix(n + 1, 0);","dp[0] = 1;","prefix[1] = 1;","","for (int i = 1; i \u003c= n; ++i) {","  int left = std::max(0, i - k);","  dp[i] = prefix[i] - prefix[left];","  prefix[i + 1] = prefix[i] + dp[i];","}","```","","## Manacher / 马拉车","`d1[i]` 是以 `i` 为中心的奇回文半径，长度为 `2 * d1[i] - 1`；`d2[i]` 是以 `i - 1` 和 `i` 中间为中心的偶回文半径，长度为 `2 * d2[i]`。","```cpp","int n = static_cast\u003cint\u003e(s.size());","std::vector\u003cint\u003e d1(n), d2(n);","// 奇回文：中心是 i，初始半径至少为 1，即 s[i] 本身","for (int i = 0, l = 0, r = -1; i \u003c n; ++i) {","  // [l, r] 是当前最靠右的回文区间，l + r - i 是 i 的镜像点","  int k = i \u003e r ? 1 : std::min(d1[l + r - i], r - i + 1);","  while (0 \u003c= i - k \u0026\u0026 i + k \u003c n \u0026\u0026 s[i - k] == s[i + k]) ++k;","  d1[i] = k;","  // 如果以 i 为中心的回文更靠右，就更新最右回文区间","  if (i + k - 1 \u003e r) {","    l = i - k + 1;","    r = i + k - 1;","  }","}","// 偶回文：中心在 i - 1 和 i 中间，初始半径可以为 0","for (int i = 0, l = 0, r = -1; i \u003c n; ++i) {","  int k = i \u003e r ? 0 : std::min(d2[l + r - i + 1], r - i + 1);","  while (0 \u003c= i - k - 1 \u0026\u0026 i + k \u003c n \u0026\u0026 s[i - k - 1] == s[i + k]) ++k;","  d2[i] = k;","  if (i + k - 1 \u003e r) {","    l = i - k;","    r = i + k - 1;","  }","}","int longest = 0;","for (int i = 0; i \u003c n; ++i) {","  // 奇长度 = 2 * d1[i] - 1，偶长度 = 2 * d2[i]","  longest = std::max({longest, 2 * d1[i] - 1, 2 * d2[i]});","}","```","## KMP","### 字符串匹配","```cpp","auto compute_lps(const std::string \u0026s) -\u003e std::vector\u003cint\u003e {","  int n = static_cast\u003cint\u003e(s.length());","  std::vector\u003cint\u003e lps(n, 0);","  int length = 0;","  for (int i = 1; i \u003c n; ++i) {","    while (length \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026 s[i] != s[length])","      length = lps[length - 1];","    if (s[i] == s[length])","      ++length;","    lps[i] = length;","  }","  return lps;","} // 计算pattern字符串的LPS(最长前缀后缀)表","auto kmp_search(const std::string \u0026text, const std::string \u0026s) -\u003e std::vector\u003cint\u003e {","  int n = static_cast\u003cint\u003e(text.length());","  int m = static_cast\u003cint\u003e(s.length());","  auto lps = compute_lps(s);","  std::vector\u003cint\u003e matches;","  int j = 0; // 模式串指针","  for (int i = 0; i \u003c n; ++i) { // 主串指针","    while (j \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026 text[i] != s[j])","      j = lps[j - 1];","    if (text[i] == s[j])","      ++j;","    if (j == m) {","      matches.emplace_back(i - j + 1);","      j = lps[j - 1];","    }","  } // 统计text中匹配的s的第1位指针","  return matches;","}","```","","### 最小循环元引理","假设一个字符串的长度为 `L`（`1-based` 计数），其对应的 LPS 数组最后一位为 `lps[L-1]`。 若满足 $L\\mod{(L - lps[L-1])} == 0$，则：","该字符串由一个长度为 ``d = L - lps[L-1]`` 的子串重复构成，该子串即为**最小循环元**，重复次数 ``K = L / d``。","## 调度场算法","中缀表达式求值：数字入 `nums`，运算符入 `ops`；遇到低优先级运算符前，先结算栈顶高/同优先级运算符。","","```cpp","auto priority = [](char op) {","  if (op == '+' || op == '-') return 1;","  if (op == '*' || op == '/') return 2;","  return 0;","};","std::vector\u003clong long\u003e nums;","std::vector\u003cchar\u003e ops;","auto apply = [\u0026]() {","  long long b = nums.back(); nums.pop_back();","  long long a = nums.back(); nums.pop_back();","  char op = ops.back(); ops.pop_back();","  if (op == '+') nums.push_back(a + b);","  if (op == '-') nums.push_back(a - b);","  if (op == '*') nums.push_back(a * b);","  if (op == '/') nums.push_back(a / b);","};","bool need_num = true;","for (int i = 0; i \u003c s.size();) {","  if (std::isspace(s[i])) {","    ++i;","  } else if (std::isdigit(s[i]) ||","             (need_num \u0026\u0026 (s[i] == '+' || s[i] == '-') \u0026\u0026","              i + 1 \u003c s.size() \u0026\u0026 std::isdigit(s[i + 1]))) {","    int sign = 1;","    if (s[i] == '+' || s[i] == '-') sign = s[i++] == '-' ? -1 : 1;","    long long x = 0;","    while (i \u003c s.size() \u0026\u0026 std::isdigit(s[i])) {","      x = x * 10 + s[i++] - '0';","    }","    nums.push_back(sign * x);","    need_num = false;","  } else if (s[i] == '(') {","    ops.push_back(s[i++]), need_num = true;","  } else if (s[i] == ')') {","    while (ops.back() != '(') apply();","    ops.pop_back(), ++i, need_num = false;","  } else {","    char op = s[i++];","    while (!ops.empty() \u0026\u0026 ops.back() != '(' \u0026\u0026","           priority(ops.back()) \u003e= priority(op))","      apply();","    ops.push_back(op), need_num = true;","  }","}","while (!ops.empty()) apply();","long long ans = nums.back();","```","## 链表","### 反转链表","```cpp","auto reverseList(ListNode *head) -\u003e ListNode * {","  ListNode *prev = nullptr;","  while (head) {","    auto next = head-\u003enext;","    head-\u003enext = prev;","    prev = head;","    head = next;","  }","  return prev;","}","```","","### 快慢指针","找中点：循环结束后 `slow` 在中点；偶数长度时在右中点。","```cpp","auto middleNode(ListNode *head) -\u003e ListNode * {","  auto slow = head;","  auto fast = head;","  while (fast \u0026\u0026 fast-\u003enext) {","    slow = slow-\u003enext;","    fast = fast-\u003enext-\u003enext;","  }","  return slow;","}","```","判环并找入环点：","```cpp","auto detectCycle(ListNode *head) -\u003e ListNode * {","  auto slow = head;","  auto fast = head;","  while (fast \u0026\u0026 fast-\u003enext) {","    slow = slow-\u003enext;","    fast = fast-\u003enext-\u003enext;","    if (slow == fast) {","      auto ptr = head;","      while (ptr != slow) {","        ptr = ptr-\u003enext;","        slow = slow-\u003enext;","      }","      return ptr;","    }","  }","  return nullptr;","}","```","## Tree","### 树的读入和长子兄弟法","```cpp","struct TreeNode {","  char id;","  TreeNode *first_child{};","  TreeNode *next_sibling{};","  explicit TreeNode(char id) : id(id) {}","};","struct Node {","  char id;","  int degree;","};","auto buildTree(const std::vector\u003cNode\u003e \u0026nodes) -\u003e TreeNode * {","  if (nodes.empty())","    return nullptr;","","  auto root = new TreeNode(nodes[0].id);","  std::queue\u003cstd::pair\u003cTreeNode *, int\u003e\u003e q;","  q.emplace(root, nodes[0].degree);","","  size_t i = 1;","  while (!q.empty() \u0026\u0026 i \u003c nodes.size()) {","    auto [parent, degree] = q.front();","    q.pop();","","    auto first_child = parent-\u003efirst_child;","    auto prev_child = first_child;","    while (degree-- \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026 i \u003c nodes.size()) {","      auto child = new TreeNode(nodes[i].id);","      if (!first_child)","        first_child = child;","      else","        prev_child-\u003enext_sibling = child;","","      prev_child = child;","      q.emplace(child, nodes[i].degree);","      ++i;","    }","    parent-\u003efirst_child = first_child;","  }","  return root;","}","```","### 嵌套括号树","```cpp","auto parseNode(const std::string \u0026data, size_t \u0026ptr) -\u003e TreeNode * {","  if (ptr \u003e= data.size())","    return nullptr;","","  // 先读当前节点，如 A(B,C) 中的 A","  auto root = new TreeNode(data[ptr]);","  ++ptr;","","  // 如果后面接 '('，说明当前节点有孩子列表","  if (ptr \u003c data.size() \u0026\u0026 data[ptr] == '(') {","    ++ptr; // 跳过 '('","    TreeNode *prev = nullptr;","","    // 逐个解析孩子，直到遇到 ')'；逗号只负责分隔兄弟","    while (ptr \u003c data.size() \u0026\u0026 data[ptr] != ')') {","      auto child = parseNode(data, ptr);","      if (!root-\u003efirst_child)","        root-\u003efirst_child = child; // 第一个孩子挂到 first_child","      else","        prev-\u003enext_sibling = child; // 后续孩子接到上一个孩子的兄弟指针","      prev = child;","      if (ptr \u003c data.size() \u0026\u0026 data[ptr] == ',')","        ++ptr; // 跳过 ','","    }","    if (ptr \u003c data.size() \u0026\u0026 data[ptr] == ')')","      ++ptr; // 跳过 ')'","  }","  return root;","}","auto buildTree(const std::string \u0026data) -\u003e TreeNode * {","  if (data.empty())","    return nullptr;","  size_t ptr = 0;","  return parseNode(data, ptr);","}","```","如果题目给的是二叉树括号表示：`A(B,C)`，逗号左边是左子树，右边是右子树；空子树可写成 `A(,B)` 或 `A(B,)`。","```cpp","auto parseBinary(const std::string \u0026s, size_t \u0026pos) -\u003e BinaryNode * {","  if (pos \u003e= s.size() || s[pos] == ')' || s[pos] == ',')","    return nullptr;","  // 先读根节点，如 A(B,C) 中的 A","  auto root = new BinaryNode(s[pos++]);","  // 如果后面接括号，括号内最多两棵子树：left,right","  if (pos \u003c s.size() \u0026\u0026 s[pos] == '(') {","    ++pos; // 跳过 '('","    if (pos \u003c s.size() \u0026\u0026 s[pos] != ',')","      root-\u003eleft = parseBinary(s, pos);","    if (pos \u003c s.size() \u0026\u0026 s[pos] == ',')","      ++pos; // 跳过 ','","    if (pos \u003c s.size() \u0026\u0026 s[pos] != ')')","      root-\u003eright = parseBinary(s, pos);","    if (pos \u003c s.size() \u0026\u0026 s[pos] == ')')","      ++pos; // 跳过 ')'","  }","  return root;","}","```","","### LCA 倍增法","预处理 `up[u][k]` 表示 `u` 的第 `2^k` 级祖先。查询时先把两个点提到同一深度，再一起向上跳。","","```cpp","int LOG = 1;","while ((1 \u003c\u003c LOG) \u003c= n) ++LOG;","","std::vector\u003cint\u003e depth(n + 1, 0);","std::vector up(n + 1, std::vector\u003cint\u003e(LOG, 0));","","auto dfs = [\u0026](auto \u0026\u0026self, int u, int parent) -\u003e void {","  up[u][0] = parent;","  for (int k = 1; k \u003c LOG; ++k)","    up[u][k] = up[up[u][k - 1]][k - 1];","","  for (int v : tree[u]) {","    if (v == parent)","      continue;","    depth[v] = depth[u] + 1;","    self(self, v, u);","  }","};","","auto lift = [\u0026](int u, int step) {","  for (int k = 0; k \u003c LOG; ++k)","    if ((step \u003e\u003e k) \u0026 1)","      u = up[u][k];","  return u;","};","","auto lca = [\u0026](int u, int v) {","  if (depth[u] \u003c depth[v])","    std::swap(u, v);","  u = lift(u, depth[u] - depth[v]);","  if (u == v)","    return u;","","  for (int k = LOG - 1; k \u003e= 0; --k) {","    if (up[u][k] != up[v][k]) {","      u = up[u][k];","      v = up[v][k];","    }","  }","  return up[u][0];","};","","dfs(dfs, root, 0);","```","","树上距离：","","```cpp","int ancestor = lca(u, v);","int distance = depth[u] + depth[v] - 2 * depth[ancestor];","```","","### DFS 序 / 子树区间","DFS 进入时间把树映射成数组，任意子树对应连续区间 `[tin[u], tout[u]]`。适用：子树加、子树和、统计子树内信息。","","```cpp","std::vector\u003cint\u003e tin(n + 1), tout(n + 1);","int timer = 0;","","auto dfs_order = [\u0026](auto \u0026\u0026self, int u, int parent) -\u003e void {","  tin[u] = ++timer;","  for (int v : tree[u]) {","    if (v == parent)","      continue;","    self(self, v, u);","  }","  tout[u] = timer;","};","","dfs_order(dfs_order, root, 0);","// subtree(u) -\u003e [tin[u], tout[u]]","```","","映射关系：","- `tin[u]`：树上点 `u` 对应 DFS 序数组位置。","- `order[pos]`：DFS 序位置 `pos` 对应树上哪个点。","- `flat[tin[u]] = weight[u]`：把树上点权映射到数组。","","```cpp","std::vector\u003cint\u003e order(n + 1);","std::vector\u003clong long\u003e flat(n + 1);","","auto dfs_flatten = [\u0026](auto \u0026\u0026self, int u, int parent) -\u003e void {","  tin[u] = ++timer;","  order[timer] = u;","  flat[timer] = weight[u];","","  for (int v : tree[u]) {","    if (v == parent)","      continue;","    self(self, v, u);","  }","","  tout[u] = timer;","};","```","","常用转换：单点 `u` 修改 -\u003e 修改 `tin[u]`；查询或修改 `u` 的整棵子树 -\u003e 区间 `[tin[u], tout[u]]`。","","### 树上背包 DP","`dp[u][j]` 表示在 `u` 子树中选 `j` 个点的最优值。合并儿子时容量倒序，避免同一个儿子被重复用。","","```cpp","const long long INF = 4e18;","std::vector dp(n + 1, std::vector\u003clong long\u003e(k + 1, -INF));","std::vector\u003cint\u003e size(n + 1, 0);","","auto dfs_knapsack = [\u0026](auto \u0026\u0026self, int u, int parent) -\u003e void {","  dp[u][0] = 0;","  dp[u][1] = value[u];","  size[u] = 1;","","  for (int v : tree[u]) {","    if (v == parent)","      continue;","    self(self, v, u);","","    for (int i = std::min(size[u], k); i \u003e= 0; --i) {","      for (int j = 1; j \u003c= size[v] \u0026\u0026 i + j \u003c= k; ++j) {","        dp[u][i + j] = std::max(dp[u][i + j], dp[u][i] + dp[v][j]);","      }","    }","    size[u] += size[v];","  }","};","```","","### 卡特兰数","Catalan数 $𝐶_𝑛$ 的递推关系有着天然的递归结构：规模为 $𝑛$ 的计数问题 $𝐶_𝑛$ ，可以通过枚举分界点，分拆为两个规模分别为 $𝑖$ 和 $(𝑛−1-𝑖)$ 的子问题。这一递推关系使得Catalan数广泛出现于各类具有类似递归结构的问题中。","**路径计数问题**：有一个大小为 $n\\times n$ 的方格图，左下角为 $(0,0)(0, 0)$，右上角为 $(𝑛,𝑛)(n, n)$ 。从左下角开始，每次都只能向右或者向上走一单位，不走到对角线 $y=x$ 上方（但可以触碰）的情况下，到达右上角的路径总数为 $C_n$ 。","**圆内不相交弦计数问题**：圆上有 $2n$ 个点，将这些点成对连接起来且使得所得到的 $n$ 条线段两两不交的方案数是 $C_n$。","**三角剖分计数问题**：对角线不相交的情况下，将一个凸 $(n + 2)$ 边形区域分成三角形区域的方法数为 $C_n$ 。","**二叉树计数问题**：含有 $n$ 个结点的形态不同的二叉树数目为 $C_n$ 。等价地，含有 $n$ 个非叶结点的形态不同的满二叉树数目为 $C_{n}$ 。","**括号序列计数问题**：由 $n$ 对括号构成的合法括号序列数为 $C_n$ 。","**出栈序列计数问题**：一个栈（无穷大）的进栈序列为 $1,2,3, \\ldots ,n$ ，合法出栈序列的数目为 $C_n$ 。","**数列计数问题**：由 $n$ 个 $+1$ 和 $n$ 个 $-1$ 组成的数列 $a_1,a_2, \\ldots ,a_{2n}$ 中，部分和满足 $a_1+a_2+ \\ldots +a_k \\geq 0~(k=1,2,3, \\ldots ,2n)$ 的数列数目为 $C_n$ 。","","$C_n = \\frac{(4n - 2)}{n + 1} C_{n-1},\\ n \u003e 0,\\ C_0 = 1.$","### Huffman Tree","```cpp","struct TreeNode {","  char ch;","  int freq;","  TreeNode *left{};","  TreeNode *right{};","  TreeNode() : ch(0), freq(0) {}","  TreeNode(char ch, int freq) : ch(ch), freq(freq) {}","  TreeNode(char ch, int freq, TreeNode *left, TreeNode *right)","      : ch(ch), freq(freq), left(left), right(right) {}","};","class HuffmanTree {","private:","  struct CompareNode {","    auto operator()(TreeNode *a, TreeNode *b) -\u003e bool {","      if (a-\u003efreq != b-\u003efreq) {","        return a-\u003efreq \u003e b-\u003efreq;","      }","      return a-\u003ech \u003e b-\u003ech;","    }","  };","  std::priority_queue\u003cTreeNode *, std::vector\u003cTreeNode *\u003e, CompareNode\u003e pq;","  TreeNode *root{};","public:","  auto build_huffman_tree(const std::vector\u003cstd::pair\u003cchar, int\u003e\u003e \u0026char_set)","      -\u003e TreeNode * {","    for (auto \u0026\u0026x : char_set) {","      pq.emplace(new TreeNode(x.first, x.second));","    }","    while (pq.size() \u003e 1) {","      auto left = pq.top();","      pq.pop();","      auto right = pq.top();","      pq.pop();","      auto node = new TreeNode('\\0', left-\u003efreq + right-\u003efreq, left, right);","      pq.emplace(node);","    }","    root = pq.top();","    return root;","  }","};","```","### BST","二叉搜索树依赖于这样一个性质：小于父节点的键都在左子树中，大于父节点的键则都在右子树中。我们称这个性质为二叉搜索性。","```cpp","struct BSTNode {","  char value;","  BSTNode *left{};","  BSTNode *right{};","  explicit BSTNode(char value) : value(value) {}","};","","class TreeUtils {","private:","  auto insertNode(BSTNode *root, char value) -\u003e BSTNode * {","    if (!root)","      return new BSTNode(value);","    if (value \u003c root-\u003evalue)","      root-\u003eleft = insertNode(root-\u003eleft, value);","    else","      root-\u003eright = insertNode(root-\u003eright, value);","    return root;","  }","public:","  auto buildBST(const std::string \u0026leaves) -\u003e BSTNode * {","    if (leaves.empty())","      return nullptr;","    BSTNode *root = nullptr;","    for (int i = static_cast\u003cint\u003e(leaves.size()) - 1; i \u003e= 0; --i)","      root = insertNode(root, leaves[i]);","    return root;","  }","};","```","### 字典树 (Trie)","```cpp","class Trie {","private:","  struct TrieNode {","    std::array\u003cTrieNode *, 26\u003e children{};","    int word_count = 0;","    uint32_t child_mask = 0;","  };","","  TrieNode *root{};","","  auto _erase_recursive(TrieNode *current, const std::string \u0026word,","                        size_t index, bool \u0026erased) -\u003e bool {","    if (!current) {","      return false;","    }","","    if (index == word.size()) {","      if (current-\u003eword_count == 0) {","        return false;","      }","      --current-\u003eword_count;","      erased = true;","      return current-\u003eword_count == 0 \u0026\u0026 !current-\u003echild_mask;","    }","","    const int char_idx = word[index] - 'a';","    auto node = current-\u003echildren[char_idx];","","    if (!node) {","      return false;","    }","","    if (_erase_recursive(node, word, index + 1, erased)) {","      delete node;","      current-\u003echildren[char_idx] = nullptr;","      current-\u003echild_mask \u0026= ~(1 \u003c\u003c char_idx);","      return current-\u003eword_count == 0 \u0026\u0026 !current-\u003echild_mask;","    }","","    return false;","  }","","  auto _clean(TrieNode *node) -\u003e void {","    if (!node)","      return;","","    auto mask = node-\u003echild_mask;","    while (mask) {","      _clean(node-\u003echildren[__builtin_ctz(mask)]);","      mask \u0026= (mask - 1);","    }","    delete node;","  }","","public:","  Trie() : root(new TrieNode()) {}","","  ~Trie() { _clean(root); }","","  auto insert(const std::string \u0026word) -\u003e void {","    auto current = root;","","    for (auto \u0026\u0026c : word) {","      const int index = c - 'a';","      if (!current-\u003echildren[index]) {","        current-\u003echildren[index] = new TrieNode();","        current-\u003echild_mask |= (1 \u003c\u003c index);","      }","      current = current-\u003echildren[index];","    }","    ++current-\u003eword_count;","  }","","  auto search(const std::string \u0026word) -\u003e bool {","    if (!root)","      return false;","","    auto current = root;","","    for (auto \u0026\u0026c : word) {","      const int index = c - 'a';","      if (!current-\u003echildren[index]) {","        return false;","      }","      current = current-\u003echildren[index];","    }","    return current-\u003eword_count \u003e 0;","  }","","  auto startsWith(const std::string \u0026prefix) -\u003e bool {","    if (!root)","      return false;","","    auto current = root;","","    for (auto \u0026\u0026c : prefix) {","      const int index = c - 'a';","      if (!current-\u003echildren[index]) {","        return false;","      }","      current = current-\u003echildren[index];","    }","    return true;","  }","","  auto erase(const std::string \u0026word) -\u003e bool {","    bool erased = false;","    _erase_recursive(root, word, 0, erased);","    return erased;","  }","};","```","- 例：LC 421.数组中两个数的最大异或值","```cpp","class Solution {","  struct TrieNode {","    TrieNode *left{};","    TrieNode *right{};","    TrieNode() = default;","  };","","  TrieNode *root = new TrieNode();","  constexpr static int HIGH_BIT = 30;","","  auto add(int num) -\u003e void {","    auto curr = root;","    for (int k = HIGH_BIT; k \u003e= 0; --k) {","      int bit = (num \u003e\u003e k) \u0026 1;","      if (!bit) {","        if (!curr-\u003eleft) {","          curr-\u003eleft = new TrieNode();","        }","        curr = curr-\u003eleft;","      } else {","        if (!curr-\u003eright) {","          curr-\u003eright = new TrieNode();","        }","        curr = curr-\u003eright;","      }","    }","  }","","  auto check(int num) -\u003e int {","    int x = 0;","    auto curr = root;","    for (int k = HIGH_BIT; k \u003e= 0; --k) {","      int bit = (num \u003e\u003e k) \u0026 1;","      if (!bit) {","        if (curr-\u003eright) {","          curr = curr-\u003eright;","          x = x \u003c\u003c 1 | 1;","        } else {","          curr = curr-\u003eleft;","          x \u003c\u003c= 1;","        }","      } else {","        if (curr-\u003eleft) {","          curr = curr-\u003eleft;","          x = x \u003c\u003c 1 | 1;","        } else {","          curr = curr-\u003eright;","          x \u003c\u003c= 1;","        }","      }","    }","    return x;","  }","","public:","  auto findMaximumXOR(std::vector\u003cint\u003e \u0026nums) -\u003e int {","    int n = nums.size();","    int maxXOR = 0;","    for (int i = 1; i \u003c n; ++i) {","      add(nums[i - 1]);","      maxXOR = std::max(maxXOR, check(nums[i]));","    }","    return maxXOR;","  }","};","```","### 并查集","#### 模板","```cpp","class DisjSet {","private:","  std::vector\u003cint\u003e parent;","  std::vector\u003cint\u003e rank;","","public:","  explicit DisjSet(int n) : parent(n), rank(n, 0) {","    for (int i = 0; i \u003c n; ++i) {","      parent[i] = i;","    }","  }","","  auto find(int x) -\u003e int {","    return parent[x] == x ? x : parent[x] = find(parent[x]);","  }","","  auto unite(int x, int y) -\u003e bool {","    int root_x = find(x);","    int root_y = find(y);","","    if (root_x == root_y) {","      return false;","    }","","    if (rank[root_x] \u003e rank[root_y]) {","      parent[root_y] = root_x;","    } else if (rank[root_x] \u003c rank[root_y]) {","      parent[root_x] = root_y;","    } else {","      parent[root_y] = root_x;","      ++rank[root_x];","    }","    return true;","  }","};","```","#### 扩展并查集","```cpp","DisjSet dsu(3 * n);","auto self = [\u0026](int x) { return x; };","auto eat = [\u0026](int x) { return x + n; };","auto eaten = [\u0026](int x) { return x + 2 * n; };","","// x 与 y 同类","if (dsu.find(eat(x)) == dsu.find(self(y)) ||","    dsu.find(self(x)) == dsu.find(eat(y))) {","  // 矛盾","} else {","  dsu.unite(self(x), self(y));","  dsu.unite(eat(x), eat(y));","  dsu.unite(eaten(x), eaten(y));","}","","// x 吃 y","if (dsu.find(self(x)) == dsu.find(self(y)) ||","    dsu.find(eaten(x)) == dsu.find(self(y))) {","  // 矛盾","} else {","  dsu.unite(eat(x), self(y));","  dsu.unite(self(x), eaten(y));","  dsu.unite(eaten(x), eat(y));","}","```","扩展并查集应用：","- 三倍域：`x`、`x + n`、`x + 2n` 分别表示不同关系类。常用于食物链：同类、捕食、被捕食。","- 二倍域：`x` 和 `x + n` 表示相反关系。常用于敌友关系、二分图染色、奇偶约束。","- 带权并查集：维护 `dist[x] = x 到 parent[x] 的关系值`，适合关系可以用模数表示的题。","","#### 带权并查集","`dist[x]` 表示 `x` 到根的关系值，关系在 `mod` 下运算。若要加入约束 `x - y = w (mod mod)`：","```cpp","class WeightedDSU {","private:","  int mod;","  std::vector\u003cint\u003e parent, dist; // dist[x]: x 到 parent[x] 的关系","","public:","  explicit WeightedDSU(int n, int mod) : mod(mod), parent(n), dist(n, 0) {","    std::iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);","  }","","  auto find(int x) -\u003e int {","    if (parent[x] == x)","      return x;","    int old_parent = parent[x];","    parent[x] = find(parent[x]);","    dist[x] = (dist[x] + dist[old_parent]) % mod;","    return parent[x];","  }","","  auto unite(int x, int y, int w) -\u003e bool {","    int root_x = find(x), root_y = find(y);","    if (root_x == root_y)","      return ((dist[x] - dist[y] - w) % mod + mod) % mod == 0;","","    parent[root_x] = root_y;","    dist[root_x] = ((w + dist[y] - dist[x]) % mod + mod) % mod;","    return true;","  }","};","```","应用换算：","- 奇偶/二分关系：`mod = 2`，同色 `w = 0`，异色 `w = 1`。","- 食物链：`mod = 3`，同类 `w = 0`，`x` 吃 `y` 可设 `w = 1`，`x` 被 `y` 吃可设 `w = 2`。","- 距离差约束：不用取模时，把 `% mod` 去掉，`dist` 用 `long long`。","","### 线段树","#### 模板","```cpp","class SegTree {","private:","  int n;","  const int default_val = 0;","  std::vector\u003cint\u003e tree;","","public:","  SegTree(const std::vector\u003cint\u003e \u0026data)","      : n(data.size()), tree(2 * n, 0) {","    for (int i = 0; i \u003c n; ++i) {","      tree[i + n] = data[i];","    }","    for (int i = n - 1; i \u003e 0; --i) {","      tree[i] = tree[i \u003c\u003c 1] + tree[i \u003c\u003c 1 | 1];","    }","  }","","  auto update(int i, int value) -\u003e void {","    i += n;","    tree[i] = value;","","    while (i \u003e 1) {","      tree[i \u003e\u003e 1] = tree[i] + tree[i ^ 1];","      i \u003e\u003e= 1;","    }","  }","","  auto sumRange(int l, int r) -\u003e int {","    int res = default_val;","    l += n;","    r += n + 1;","","    while (l \u003c r) {","      if (l \u0026 1) {","        res = res + tree[l++];","      }","      if (r \u0026 1) {","        res = res + tree[--r];","      }","      l \u003e\u003e= 1;","      r \u003e\u003e= 1;","    }","    return res;","  }","};","```","#### 区间开闭和自定义点","","递归线段树：","- 对外接口：通常传 0-index 闭区间 `[l, r]`。","- 节点区间：`[start, end]`，也是闭区间。","- 分裂方式：左儿子 `[start, mid]`，右儿子 `[mid + 1, end]`。","- 判断覆盖：`l \u003c= start \u0026\u0026 end \u003c= r`。","- 判断进左儿子：`l \u003c= mid`；判断进右儿子：`r \u003e mid`。","- 如果题目输入是 1-index `[l, r]`，调用时改成 `[l - 1, r - 1]`。","","zkw / 迭代线段树：","- 对外接口：也可以设计成 0-index 闭区间 `[l, r]`。","- 内部会转成半开区间 `[left, right)`：","  ```cpp","  size_t left = l + base;","  size_t right = r + base + 1;","  while (left \u003c right) { ... }","  ```","- 如果本来就想传半开区间 `[l, r)`，则写成 `right = r + base`。","","可自定义的地方：","- `Type`：节点值和懒标记类型，可能要用 `long long`。","- `func`：左右儿子的合并方式，如 `sum / max / min / gcd`。","- `query_default`：查询单位元。`sum = 0`，`max = -inf`，`min = +inf`。","- `lazy_default`：空懒标记。区间加法通常是 `0`。","- `_apply`：整段更新如何影响 `tree[p]` 和 `lazy[p]`。","- `_push`：父节点懒标记如何下传给左右儿子。","- `_pull`：子节点变化后，如何重新计算父节点。","","常见 `_apply`：","```cpp","// 区间加 + 区间最大值：最大值整体加 value，不需要 len","tree[p] += value;","lazy[p] += value;","","// 区间加 + 区间和：整段和增加 value * len","tree[p] += value * len;","lazy[p] += value;","","// 区间赋值 + 区间和：懒标记是覆盖，不是累加","tree[p] = value * len;","lazy[p] = value;","has_lazy[p] = true;","```","","#### 区间加法+最大值查询 懒标记线段树","递归版，接口是 0-index 闭区间 `[l, r]`。","","```cpp","template \u003ctypename Type, typename Func\u003e class LazySegTree {","private:","  size_t n;","  Type default_val;","  Func func;","  std::vector\u003cType\u003e tree;","  std::vector\u003cType\u003e lazy;","  std::vector\u003cbool\u003e has_lazy;","","  auto _perc_down(size_t node, size_t start, size_t end) -\u003e void {","    if (has_lazy[node]) {","      const auto left = node \u003c\u003c 1;","      const auto right = node \u003c\u003c 1 | 1;","","      lazy[left] += lazy[node];","      has_lazy[left] = true;","      tree[left] += lazy[node];","","      lazy[right] += lazy[node];","      has_lazy[right] = true;","      tree[right] += lazy[node];","","      lazy[node] = default_val;","      has_lazy[node] = false;","    }","  }","","  auto _build(const std::vector\u003cType\u003e \u0026data, size_t node, size_t start,","              size_t end) -\u003e void {","    if (start == end) {","      tree[node] = data[start];","      return;","    }","","    const auto mid = start + ((end - start) \u003e\u003e 1);","    _build(data, node \u003c\u003c 1, start, mid);","    _build(data, node \u003c\u003c 1 | 1, mid + 1, end);","","    tree[node] = func(tree[node \u003c\u003c 1], tree[node \u003c\u003c 1 | 1]);","  }","","  auto _update_range(size_t node, size_t start, size_t end, size_t l, size_t r,","                     Type value) -\u003e void {","    if (l \u003c= start \u0026\u0026 end \u003c= r) {","      lazy[node] += value;","      has_lazy[node] = true;","      tree[node] += value;","      return;","    }","","    _perc_down(node, start, end);","","    const auto mid = start + ((end - start) \u003e\u003e 1);","    if (l \u003c= mid) {","      _update_range(node \u003c\u003c 1, start, mid, l, r, value);","    }","    if (r \u003e mid) {","      _update_range(node \u003c\u003c 1 | 1, mid + 1, end, l, r, value);","    }","","    tree[node] = func(tree[node \u003c\u003c 1], tree[node \u003c\u003c 1 | 1]);","  }","","  auto _query_range(size_t node, size_t start, size_t end, size_t l, size_t r)","      -\u003e Type {","    if (l \u003c= start \u0026\u0026 end \u003c= r) {","      return tree[node];","    }","","    _perc_down(node, start, end);","    const auto mid = start + ((end - start) \u003e\u003e 1);","    if (r \u003c= mid) {","      return _query_range(node \u003c\u003c 1, start, mid, l, r);","    }","    if (l \u003e mid) {","      return _query_range(node \u003c\u003c 1 | 1, mid + 1, end, l, r);","    }","","    return func(_query_range(node \u003c\u003c 1, start, mid, l, r),","                _query_range(node \u003c\u003c 1 | 1, mid + 1, end, l, r));","  }","","public:","  explicit LazySegTree(const std::vector\u003cType\u003e \u0026data, Func func = Func{},","                       const Type \u0026de = Type())","      : n(data.size()), default_val(de), func(func) {","    tree.assign(4 * n, default_val);","    lazy.assign(4 * n, default_val);","    has_lazy.assign(4 * n, false);","    _build(data, 1, 0, n - 1);","  }","","  auto update_range(size_t l, size_t r, Type value) -\u003e void {","    _update_range(1, 0, n - 1, l, r, value);","  }","","  auto query_range(size_t l, size_t r) -\u003e Type {","    return _query_range(1, 0, n - 1, l, r);","  }","};","```","","zkw 版，接口是 0-index 闭区间 `[l, r]`，内部转成半开区间 `[l + base, r + base + 1)`。","","```cpp","template \u003ctypename Type, typename Func\u003e class SegTree {","private:","  size_t size;","  size_t base;","  size_t height;","  Type query_default;","  Type lazy_default;","  Func func;","  std::vector\u003cType\u003e tree;","  std::vector\u003cType\u003e lazy;","  std::vector\u003cbool\u003e has_lazy;","","  auto _apply(size_t p, const Type \u0026value) -\u003e void {","    tree[p] += value;","    if (p \u003c base) {","      lazy[p] += value;","      has_lazy[p] = true;","    }","  }","","  auto _push(size_t p) -\u003e void {","    for (size_t s = height; s \u003e 0; --s) {","      const size_t i = p \u003e\u003e s;","      if (!has_lazy[i]) {","        continue;","      }","","      _apply(i \u003c\u003c 1, lazy[i]);","      _apply(i \u003c\u003c 1 | 1, lazy[i]);","      lazy[i] = lazy_default;","      has_lazy[i] = false;","    }","  }","","  auto _pull(size_t p) -\u003e void {","    for (p \u003e\u003e= 1; p \u003e 0; p \u003e\u003e= 1) {","      tree[p] = func(tree[p \u003c\u003c 1], tree[p \u003c\u003c 1 | 1]);","      if (has_lazy[p]) {","        tree[p] += lazy[p];","      }","    }","  }","","public:","  explicit SegTree(const std::vector\u003cType\u003e \u0026data, Func f = Func{},","                   const Type \u0026query_de = Type(),","                   const Type \u0026lazy_de = Type())","      : size(data.size()), query_default(query_de), lazy_default(lazy_de),","        func(f) {","    base = 1;","    height = 0;","    while (base \u003c size) {","      base \u003c\u003c= 1;","      ++height;","    }","","    tree.assign(base \u003c\u003c 1, query_default);","    lazy.assign(base \u003c\u003c 1, lazy_default);","    has_lazy.assign(base \u003c\u003c 1, false);","","    for (size_t i = 0; i \u003c size; ++i) {","      tree[base + i] = data[i];","    }","    for (size_t i = base - 1; i \u003e 0; --i) {","      tree[i] = func(tree[i \u003c\u003c 1], tree[i \u003c\u003c 1 | 1]);","    }","  }","","  auto add_range(size_t l, size_t r, const Type \u0026value) -\u003e void {","    if (size == 0 || l \u003e r || r \u003e= size) {","      return;","    }","","    size_t left = l + base;","    size_t right = r + base + 1;","    const size_t left_origin = left;","    const size_t right_origin = right;","","    _push(left_origin);","    _push(right_origin - 1);","","    while (left \u003c right) {","      if (left \u0026 1) {","        _apply(left++, value);","      }","      if (right \u0026 1) {","        _apply(--right, value);","      }","      left \u003e\u003e= 1;","      right \u003e\u003e= 1;","    }","","    _pull(left_origin);","    _pull(right_origin - 1);","  }","","  auto query_range(size_t l, size_t r) -\u003e Type {","    if (size == 0 || l \u003e r || r \u003e= size) {","      return query_default;","    }","","    size_t left = l + base;","    size_t right = r + base + 1;","    _push(left);","    _push(right - 1);","","    auto left_res = query_default;","    auto right_res = query_default;","    while (left \u003c right) {","      if (left \u0026 1) {","        left_res = func(left_res, tree[left++]);","      }","      if (right \u0026 1) {","        right_res = func(right_res, tree[--right]);","      }","      left \u003e\u003e= 1;","      right \u003e\u003e= 1;","    }","","    return func(left_res, right_res);","  }","};","","```","","## Graph","### 补图连通块","适用：给出一批“禁止边/权值为 1 的边”，需要在补图中找连通块。维护未访问集合；从点 `u` 扩展时，所有未访问且不是 `u` 原图邻居的点，都是补图邻居。","","```cpp","std::vector\u003cstd::unordered_set\u003cint\u003e\u003e edge(n + 1);","for (auto [u, v] : edges) {","  edge[u].insert(v);","  edge[v].insert(u);","}","","std::set\u003cint\u003e unvisited;","for (int i = 1; i \u003c= n; ++i)","  unvisited.insert(i);","","int component_count = 0;","std::queue\u003cint\u003e q;","while (!unvisited.empty()) {","  ++component_count;","  int start = *unvisited.begin();","  unvisited.erase(start);","  q.push(start);","","  while (!q.empty()) {","    int u = q.front();","    q.pop();","    for (auto it = unvisited.begin(); it != unvisited.end();) {","      int v = *it;","      if (!edge[u].contains(v)) {","        it = unvisited.erase(it);","        q.push(v);","      } else {","        ++it;","      }","    }","  }","}","```","","0/1 完全图 MST：输入边权为 `1`，未输入边权为 `0`。答案为 `补图连通块数 - 1`。","","### BFS 通配符桶优化","适用：单词接龙 / 只改一个字符的最短路。把单词按通配符模式分桶，如 `fool` 放入 `_ool, f_ol, fo_l, foo_`，同桶单词两两只差一个字符。","","```cpp","int n = static_cast\u003cint\u003e(words.size());","int len = static_cast\u003cint\u003e(words[0].size());","std::unordered_map\u003cstd::string, std::vector\u003cint\u003e\u003e bucket;","","for (int i = 0; i \u003c n; ++i) {","  for (int p = 0; p \u003c len; ++p) {","    std::string key = words[i];","    key[p] = '_';","    bucket[key].push_back(i);","  }","}","","std::vector\u003cint\u003e dist(n, -1);","std::queue\u003cint\u003e q;","dist[start] = 0;","q.push(start);","","while (!q.empty()) {","  int u = q.front();","  q.pop();","","  for (int p = 0; p \u003c len; ++p) {","    std::string key = words[u];","    key[p] = '_';","","    for (int v : bucket[key]) {","      if (dist[v] == -1) {","        dist[v] = dist[u] + 1;","        q.push(v);","      }","    }","    bucket[key].clear(); // 这个桶以后不用重复扫","  }","}","```","","复杂度：建桶 `O(n * len)` 个键；BFS 时每个桶最多展开一次，比暴力枚举两两比较 `O(n^2 * len)` 快很多。","","### 二分图染色 / 奇偶约束","无向图二分图判定：相邻点颜色必须不同。若遇到同色边，说明不是二分图。","```cpp","std::vector\u003cint\u003e color(n, -1);","bool ok = true;","for (int s = 0; s \u003c n \u0026\u0026 ok; ++s) {","  if (color[s] != -1)","    continue;","","  std::queue\u003cint\u003e q;","  color[s] = 0;","  q.push(s);","","  while (!q.empty() \u0026\u0026 ok) {","    int u = q.front();","    q.pop();","    for (int v : adj[u]) {","      if (color[v] == -1) {","        color[v] = color[u] ^ 1;","        q.push(v);","      } else if (color[v] == color[u]) {","        ok = false;","        break;","      }","    }","  }","}","```","带奇偶关系的动态合并通常用带权并查集，维护 `dist[x]` 到根的奇偶值。","","### DFS Warnsdorff 启发式","适用：骑士巡游、网格 DFS、精确覆盖类搜索。原则是：下一步优先走“后续可走选择最少”的点，尽早发现死路。","","```cpp","std::vector\u003cstd::pair\u003cint, int\u003e\u003e moves = {","    {1, 2}, {2, 1}, {-1, 2}, {-2, 1},","    {1, -2}, {2, -1}, {-1, -2}, {-2, -1}};","","auto inside = [\u0026](int x, int y) {","  return 0 \u003c= x \u0026\u0026 x \u003c n \u0026\u0026 0 \u003c= y \u0026\u0026 y \u003c m;","};","","auto degree = [\u0026](int x, int y) {","  int cnt = 0;","  for (auto [dx, dy] : moves) {","    int nx = x + dx, ny = y + dy;","    if (inside(nx, ny) \u0026\u0026 !visited[nx][ny])","      ++cnt;","  }","  return cnt;","};","","auto dfs = [\u0026](auto \u0026\u0026self, int x, int y, int step) -\u003e bool {","  if (step == n * m)","    return true;","","  std::vector\u003cstd::tuple\u003cint, int, int\u003e\u003e next;","  for (auto [dx, dy] : moves) {","    int nx = x + dx, ny = y + dy;","    if (inside(nx, ny) \u0026\u0026 !visited[nx][ny])","      next.emplace_back(degree(nx, ny), nx, ny);","  }","  std::sort(next.begin(), next.end()); // 可走出路少的先搜","","  return std::any_of(next.begin(), next.end(), [\u0026](auto item) {","    auto [deg, nx, ny] = item;","    visited[nx][ny] = true;","    path.emplace_back(nx, ny);","    if (self(self, nx, ny, step + 1))","      return true;","    path.pop_back();","    visited[nx][ny] = false;","    return false;","  });","};","```","","### 拓扑排序","#### Kahn 算法","数据以邻接表储存，输出为拓扑序。","```cpp","auto topo_sort_kahn(int n, const std::vector\u003cstd::vector\u003cint\u003e\u003e \u0026adj)","    -\u003e std::vector\u003cint\u003e {","  std::vector\u003cint\u003e indegree(n, 0);","  for (int u = 0; u \u003c n; ++u)","    for (auto v : adj[u])","      ++indegree[v];","  std::queue\u003cint\u003e q;","  for (int i = 0; i \u003c n; ++i)","    if (!indegree[i])","      q.emplace(i);","  std::vector\u003cint\u003e topo_order;","  while (!q.empty()) {","    int u = q.front();","    q.pop();","    topo_order.emplace_back(u);","    for (auto v : adj[u]) {","      --indegree[v];","      if (!indegree[v])","        q.emplace(v);","    }","  }","  return topo_order; // 若 topo_order.size() != n 说明有环","}","```","#### DFS 拓扑排序","原始输出为逆拓扑序，需要`reverse`。","```cpp","auto dfs_topo_sort(const std::vector\u003cstd::vector\u003cint\u003e\u003e \u0026adj) {","  int n = static_cast\u003cint\u003e(adj.size());","  std::vector\u003cint\u003e visited(n, false);","  std::vector\u003cint\u003e finish_order;","  auto dfs_visit = [\u0026](this auto \u0026\u0026self, int u) -\u003e bool {","    visited[u] = 1;","    for (auto v : adj[u]) {","      if (visited[v] == 0) {","        if (!self(v))","          return false;","      } else if (visited[v] == 1) {","        return false;","      }","    }","    visited[u] = 2;","    finish_order.emplace_back(u);","    return true;","  };","  for (int u = 0; u \u003c n; ++u) {","    if (visited[u] == 0) {","      if (!dfs_visit(u))","        return {};","    }","  }","  std::ranges::reverse(finish_order);","  return finish_order;","}","```","### 环检测","#### 无向图判环","##### 并查集","在函数`unite()`中判断：","```cpp","auto unite(int x, int y) -\u003e bool {","  int root_x = find(x);","  int root_y = find(y);","  if (root_x == root_y)","    return false; // 有环","  if (rank[root_x] \u003c rank[root_y])","    parent[root_x] = root_y;","  else if (rank[root_x] \u003e rank[root_y])","    parent[root_y] = root_x;","  else {","    parent[root_y] = root_x;","    ++rank[root_x];","  }","  return true;","}","```","存图时用边表示无向图：","```cpp","DisjSet dsu(n);","for (auto [u, v] : edges)","  if (!dsu.unite(u, v))","    return false;","```","##### DFS (parent 指针)","```cpp","auto has_cycle(int n, const std::vector\u003cstd::vector\u003cint\u003e\u003e \u0026adj) {","  std::vector\u003cbool\u003e visited(n, false);","  auto dfs = [\u0026](this auto \u0026\u0026self, int node, int parent) {","    visited[node] = true;","    for (auto v : adj[node]) {","      if (!visited[v]) {","        if (self(v, node))","          return true; // 有环","      } else if (v != parent) {","        return true;","      }","    }","    return false;","  };","  for (int u = 0; u \u003c n; ++u)","    if (!visited[u] \u0026\u0026 dfs(u, -1))","      return true;","  return false;","}","```","#### 有向图判环","见[拓扑排序](#拓扑排序).","### 无向图 Tarjan","Tarjan 可用于无向图求桥、割点、边双连通分量、点双连通分量。核心仍是 `dfn/low`，但判定条件和 SCC 不同。","","- 桥：`low[v] \u003e dfn[u]`，是边双连通分量分界线","- 割点：非根节点满足 `low[v] \u003e= dfn[u]`；根节点有至少两个 DFS 儿子，是点双连通分量分界线","- 有重边时必须用边编号跳过父边，不能只判断 `v == parent`","","```cpp","struct Edge {","  int to;","  int id;","};","","std::vector\u003cstd::vector\u003cEdge\u003e\u003e adj(n);","for (int id = 0; id \u003c m; ++id) {","  int u, v;","  std::cin \u003e\u003e u \u003e\u003e v;","  adj[u].push_back({v, id});","  adj[v].push_back({u, id});","}","","std::vector\u003cint\u003e dfn(n, -1), low(n), is_cut(n, false);","std::vector\u003cstd::pair\u003cint, int\u003e\u003e bridges;","int timer = 0;","","auto dfs = [\u0026](auto \u0026\u0026self, int u, int parent_edge) -\u003e void {","  dfn[u] = low[u] = timer++;","  int child_count = 0;","  for (auto [v, edge_id] : adj[u]) {","    if (edge_id == parent_edge)","      continue;","    if (dfn[v] == -1) {","      ++child_count;","      self(self, v, edge_id);","      low[u] = std::min(low[u], low[v]);","      if (low[v] \u003e dfn[u])","        bridges.push_back({u, v});","      if (parent_edge != -1 \u0026\u0026 low[v] \u003e= dfn[u])","        is_cut[u] = true;","    } else {","      low[u] = std::min(low[u], dfn[v]);","    }","  }","  if (parent_edge == -1 \u0026\u0026 child_count \u003e= 2)","    is_cut[u] = true;","};","","for (int u = 0; u \u003c n; ++u)","  if (dfn[u] == -1)","    dfs(dfs, u, -1);","```","### 强连通分量（SCC）","#### Tarjan 算法","```cpp","auto tarjan(const std::vector\u003cstd::vector\u003cint\u003e\u003e \u0026adj) {","  int n = adj.size();","  int timer = 0;","  std::vector\u003cint\u003e dfn(n, -1);","  std::vector\u003cint\u003e low(n, -1);","  std::vector\u003cint\u003e stack{};","  std::vector\u003cbool\u003e on_stack(n, false);","  std::vector\u003cstd::vector\u003cint\u003e\u003e sccs;","  auto dfs = [\u0026](auto \u0026\u0026self, int u) -\u003e void {","    dfn[u] = low[u] = timer++;","    stack.emplace_back(u);","    on_stack[u] = true;","    for (auto v : adj[u]) {","      if (dfn[v] == -1) {","        self(self, v);","        low[u] = std::min(low[u], low[v]);","      } else if (on_stack[v]) {","        low[u] = std::min(low[u], dfn[v]);","      }","    }","    if (low[u] == dfn[u]) {","      std::vector\u003cint\u003e component;","      while (true) {","        int node = stack.back();","        stack.pop_back();","        component.emplace_back(node);","        on_stack[node] = false;","        if (node == u) break;","      }","      sccs.emplace_back(component);","    }","  };","  for (int i = 0; i \u003c n; ++i)","    if (dfn[i] == -1) dfs(dfs, i);","  return sccs;","}","```","#### 缩点算法","`comp[u]` 表示点 `u` 属于哪个强连通分量。每个 SCC 缩成一个点后，原图变成 DAG。","","```cpp","std::vector\u003cint\u003e dfn(n, -1), low(n), stk, comp(n, -1);","std::vector\u003cbool\u003e in_stack(n, false);","int timer = 0, comp_count = 0;","auto dfs = [\u0026](auto \u0026\u0026self, int u) -\u003e void {","  dfn[u] = low[u] = timer++;","  stk.push_back(u);","  in_stack[u] = true;","  for (int v : g[u]) {","    if (dfn[v] == -1) {","      self(self, v);","      low[u] = std::min(low[u], low[v]);","    } else if (in_stack[v]) {","      low[u] = std::min(low[u], dfn[v]);","    }","  }","  if (dfn[u] == low[u]) {","    while (true) {","      int x = stk.back();","      stk.pop_back();","      in_stack[x] = false;","      comp[x] = comp_count;","      if (x == u)","        break;","    }","    ++comp_count;","  }","};","for (int i = 0; i \u003c n; ++i)","  if (dfn[i] == -1)","    dfs(dfs, i);","```","建缩点图：","```cpp","std::vector\u003cstd::vector\u003cint\u003e\u003e dag(comp_count);","std::vector\u003cint\u003e indegree(comp_count, 0);","","for (int u = 0; u \u003c n; ++u) {","  for (int v : g[u]) {","    int cu = comp[u], cv = comp[v];","    if (cu == cv)","      continue;","    dag[cu].push_back(cv);","  }","}","","// 去重，否则入度、DP 可能被重边影响","for (int u = 0; u \u003c comp_count; ++u) {","  std::sort(dag[u].begin(), dag[u].end());","  dag[u].erase(std::unique(dag[u].begin(), dag[u].end()), dag[u].end());","  for (int v : dag[u])","    ++indegree[v];","}","```","如果点有权值，缩点时汇总 SCC 权值：","```cpp","std::vector\u003clong long\u003e comp_weight(comp_count, 0);","for (int u = 0; u \u003c n; ++u) {","  comp_weight[comp[u]] += weight[u];","}","```","","缩点 DAG DP：有边 `u -\u003e v` 时，`u` 的答案可由 `v` 更新。先求拓扑序，再反向转移。","","```cpp","std::queue\u003cint\u003e q;","std::vector\u003cint\u003e topo;","for (int i = 0; i \u003c comp_count; ++i)","  if (indegree[i] == 0)","    q.push(i);","","while (!q.empty()) {","  int u = q.front();","  q.pop();","  topo.push_back(u);","  for (int v : dag[u])","    if (--indegree[v] == 0)","      q.push(v);","}","","std::vector\u003cint\u003e dp(comp_count);","for (int c = 0; c \u003c comp_count; ++c)","  dp[c] = comp_min_id[c]; // 或 comp_weight[c] 等 SCC 自身信息","","for (int i = static_cast\u003cint\u003e(topo.size()) - 1; i \u003e= 0; --i) {","  int u = topo[i];","  for (int v : dag[u])","    dp[u] = std::min(dp[u], dp[v]);","}","```","","### 欧拉路径 Hierholzer","适用：每条边恰好走一次。无向图要求奇度点为 `0` 或 `2` 个；有向图要求出入度差符合起终点条件，并且相关点连通。","","有向图模板，`adj[u]` 存边的终点，边会被弹出：","```cpp","std::vector\u003cstd::vector\u003cint\u003e\u003e adj(n);","std::vector\u003cint\u003e path;","","auto dfs = [\u0026](this auto \u0026\u0026self, int u) -\u003e void {","  while (!adj[u].empty()) {","    int v = adj[u].back();","    adj[u].pop_back();","    self(v);","  }","  path.push_back(u);","};","","dfs(start);","std::ranges::reverse(path); // path.size() == edge_count + 1 才用完所有边","```","字符串接龙 / Catenyms 类题常把单词看成边，首字母到尾字母建有向边；输出边时需要同时保存边编号或单词。","","### 最短路问题","#### Dijkstra （非负权单源最短路）","```cpp","auto dijkstra(int n, const std::vector\u003cstd::vector\u003cstd::pair\u003cint, int\u003e\u003e\u003e \u0026adj,","              int start) {","  const long long INF = 4e18;","  std::vector\u003clong long\u003e dist(n, INF);","  dist[start] = 0;","  std::priority_queue\u003cstd::pair\u003clong long, int\u003e,","                      std::vector\u003cstd::pair\u003clong long, int\u003e\u003e,","                      std::greater\u003c\u003e\u003e pq;","  pq.emplace(0, start);","  while (!pq.empty()) {","    auto [d, u] = pq.top();","    pq.pop();","    if (d \u003e dist[u]) continue;","    for (auto [v, weight] : adj[u])","      if (dist[u] + weight \u003c dist[v]) {","        dist[v] = dist[u] + weight;","        pq.emplace(dist[v], v);","      }","  }","  return dist;","}","```","#### Dijkstra 变形差异","只改状态、初值、转移和堆方向；其余框架沿用 Dijkstra。","","```cpp","// 同余最短路：dist[r] 是能达到余数 r 的最小值","int mod = static_cast\u003cint\u003e(*std::min_element(step.begin(), step.end()));","std::vector\u003clong long\u003e dist(mod, INF);","dist[0] = 0; // 若从 base 开始：dist[base % mod] = base","for (long long w : step) {","  int v = static_cast\u003cint\u003e((u + w) % mod);","  relax_min(v, du + w);","}","bool ok = dist[target % mod] \u003c= target;","","// 统计 [0, limit] 内可达数","if (dist[r] \u003c= limit)","  ans += (limit - dist[r]) / mod + 1;","```","","```cpp","// 最小瓶颈路：最小化路径最大边权，海拔差/最小体力","long long next = std::max(dist[u], w);","if (next \u003c dist[v])","  relax_min(v, next);","","// 最大瓶颈路：最大化路径最小边权，货车限重/最大带宽","dist[start] = INF;              // 其他点初值 -1","long long next = std::min(dist[u], w);","if (next \u003e dist[v])","  relax_max(v, next);           // 用大根堆","```","","```cpp","// 最大概率路：最大化边概率乘积","prob[start] = 1;                // 其他点初值 0","double next = prob[u] * p;","if (next \u003e prob[v])","  relax_max(v, next);           // 用大根堆","","// 状态/分层图：最多用一次道具、剩余次数、钥匙状态等","std::vector dist(n, std::array\u003clong long, 2\u003e{INF, INF});","// 状态为 (du, u, used)","if (!special)","  relax_min({v, used}, du + w);","else if (used == 0)","  relax_min({v, 1}, du + w);","```","","最小瓶颈路也可二分答案 + BFS，或 Kruskal 按边权从小到大加边；最大瓶颈路也可用最大生成树 + LCA 查询路径最小边。","","#### Bellman-Ford （有负权单源最短路）","适用：有负权边、判断负环、差分约束、限制边数的最短路。复杂度 `O(nm)`。","","```cpp","struct Edge {","  int from, to;","  long long weight;","};","","const long long INF = 4e18;","std::vector\u003clong long\u003e dist(n + 1, INF);","dist[start] = 0;","","for (int i = 1; i \u003c= n - 1; ++i) {","  bool relaxed = false;","  for (auto [u, v, w] : edges) {","    if (dist[u] != INF \u0026\u0026 dist[v] \u003e dist[u] + w) {","      dist[v] = dist[u] + w;","      relaxed = true;","    }","  }","  if (!relaxed)","    break;","}","```","","判断从 `start` 可达的负环：","","```cpp","bool has_negative_cycle = false;","for (auto [u, v, w] : edges) {","  if (dist[u] != INF \u0026\u0026 dist[v] \u003e dist[u] + w) {","    has_negative_cycle = true;","    break;","  }","}","```","","最多经过 `k` 条边的最短路：每一轮必须用上一轮的备份，避免同一轮连续松弛多条边。","","```cpp","std::vector\u003clong long\u003e dist(n + 1, INF);","dist[start] = 0;","","for (int step = 1; step \u003c= k; ++step) {","  auto prev = dist;","  for (auto [u, v, w] : edges) {","    if (prev[u] != INF)","      dist[v] = std::min(dist[v], prev[u] + w);","  }","}","```","","差分约束：","- `x_v \u003c= x_u + w` 建边 `u -\u003e v, w`","- 求一组可行解：加超级源 `0`，向所有点连 `0` 权边，再跑 Bellman-Ford","- 若存在负环，则约束无解","","```cpp","for (int i = 1; i \u003c= n; ++i)","  edges.push_back({0, i, 0});","dist.assign(n + 1, INF);","dist[0] = 0;","// 跑 Bellman-Ford；若还能松弛，说明差分约束无解","```","","#### SPFA","Bellman-Ford 的队列优化版。只把被更新的点入队，再用它继续松弛出边。最坏仍是 `O(nm)`，但稀疏图/差分约束中常用。SLF 优化：如果新点距离比队首更小，就放到队首。","","```cpp","const long long INF = 4e18;","std::vector\u003clong long\u003e dist(n + 1, INF);","std::vector\u003cbool\u003e in_queue(n + 1, false);","std::vector\u003cint\u003e count(n + 1, 0);","std::deque\u003cint\u003e q;","","dist[start] = 0;","q.push(start);","in_queue[start] = true;","count[start] = 1;","","bool has_negative_cycle = false;","while (!q.empty() \u0026\u0026 !has_negative_cycle) {","  int u = q.front();","  q.pop();","  in_queue[u] = false;","","  for (auto [v, w] : adj[u]) {","    if (dist[u] != INF \u0026\u0026 dist[v] \u003e dist[u] + w) {","      dist[v] = dist[u] + w;","      if (!in_queue[v]) {","        if (!q.empty() \u0026\u0026 dist[v] \u003c dist[q.front()])","          q.push_front(v);","        else","          q.push_back(v);","        in_queue[v] = true;","        if (++count[v] \u003e n) {","          has_negative_cycle = true;","          break;","        }","      }","    }","  }","}","```","","差分约束要检查全图负环时，加超级源后从 `0` 开始跑；或者一开始把所有点都入队：","","```cpp","for (int i = 1; i \u003c= n; ++i) {","  dist[i] = 0;","  q.push_back(i);","  in_queue[i] = true;","}","```","","#### Floyd-Warshall（全源最短路）","适用：点数较小的全源最短路，复杂度 `O(n^3)`。通常用 0-based 或 1-based 都可以，下面是 1-based。","","```cpp","const long long INF = 4e18;","std::vector dist(n + 1, std::vector\u003clong long\u003e(n + 1, INF));","","for (int i = 1; i \u003c= n; ++i)","  dist[i][i] = 0;","for (auto [u, v, w] : edges)","  dist[u][v] = std::min(dist[u][v], w); // 无向图再加 dist[v][u]","","for (int k = 1; k \u003c= n; ++k)","  for (int i = 1; i \u003c= n; ++i)","    for (int j = 1; j \u003c= n; ++j)","      if (dist[i][k] != INF \u0026\u0026 dist[k][j] != INF)","        dist[i][j] = std::min(dist[i][j], dist[i][k] + dist[k][j]);","```","","路径恢复：","","```cpp","std::vector next(n + 1, std::vector\u003cint\u003e(n + 1, -1));","for (int i = 1; i \u003c= n; ++i)","  next[i][i] = i;","for (auto [u, v, w] : edges) {","  if (w \u003c dist[u][v]) {","    dist[u][v] = w;","    next[u][v] = v;","  }","}","","for (int k = 1; k \u003c= n; ++k)","  for (int i = 1; i \u003c= n; ++i)","    for (int j = 1; j \u003c= n; ++j)","      if (dist[i][k] != INF \u0026\u0026 dist[k][j] != INF \u0026\u0026","          dist[i][j] \u003e dist[i][k] + dist[k][j]) {","        dist[i][j] = dist[i][k] + dist[k][j];","        next[i][j] = next[i][k];","      }","","std::vector\u003cint\u003e path;","for (int u = start; u != target; u = next[u][target])","  path.push_back(u);","path.push_back(target);","```","","传递闭包：判断任意两点是否可达。","","```cpp","std::vector reachable(n + 1, std::vector\u003cbool\u003e(n + 1, false));","for (int i = 1; i \u003c= n; ++i)","  reachable[i][i] = true;","for (auto [u, v] : edges)","  reachable[u][v] = true;","","for (int k = 1; k \u003c= n; ++k)","  for (int i = 1; i \u003c= n; ++i)","    for (int j = 1; j \u003c= n; ++j)","      reachable[i][j] = reachable[i][j] || (reachable[i][k] \u0026\u0026 reachable[k][j]);","```","","### 最小生成树（MST）","选型：","- 边集输入、稀疏图：Kruskal，`O(m log m)`，最好写。","- 邻接矩阵、完全图、稠密图：朴素 Prim，`O(n^2)`。","- 邻接表且边较多但不稠密：堆优化 Prim，`O(m log m)`。","","应用：","- 城市/网络/道路最小连接成本。","- 完全图坐标点 MST：通常用朴素 Prim，距离边用到时再算。","- “已存在免费边”：先把免费边权设为 `0`，或先用并查集合并。","- 最大生成树：把排序改成从大到小，或 Prim 选最大边。","","#### Kruskal","```cpp","struct Edge {","  int u, v;","  long long w;","  bool operator\u003c(const Edge \u0026other) const {","    return w \u003c other.w;","  }","};","","class DSU {","private:","  std::vector\u003cint\u003e parent, size;","","public:","  explicit DSU(int n) : parent(n + 1), size(n + 1, 1) {","    std::iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);","  }","","  auto find(int x) -\u003e int {","    return parent[x] == x ? x : parent[x] = find(parent[x]);","  }","","  auto unite(int x, int y) -\u003e bool {","    int rx = find(x), ry = find(y);","    if (rx == ry)","      return false;","    if (size[rx] \u003c size[ry])","      std::swap(rx, ry);","    parent[ry] = rx;","    size[rx] += size[ry];","    return true;","  }","};","","std::sort(edges.begin(), edges.end());","DSU dsu(n);","long long mst = 0;","int count = 0;","","for (auto [u, v, w] : edges) {","  if (dsu.unite(u, v)) {","    mst += w;","    if (++count == n - 1)","      break;","  }","}","","if (count != n - 1) {","  // 图不连通，不存在生成树","}","```","","#### Prim 邻接矩阵版","适合稠密图。`matrix[u][v]` 是边权，不连通边设为 `INF`。","","```cpp","const long long INF = 4e18;","std::vector\u003clong long\u003e min_dist(n, INF);","std::vector\u003cbool\u003e visited(n, false);","","min_dist[0] = 0;","long long mst = 0;","","for (int step = 0; step \u003c n; ++step) {","  int u = -1;","  for (int i = 0; i \u003c n; ++i)","    if (!visited[i] \u0026\u0026 (u == -1 || min_dist[i] \u003c min_dist[u]))","      u = i;","","  if (u == -1 || min_dist[u] == INF) {","    // 图不连通","    break;","  }","","  visited[u] = true;","  mst += min_dist[u];","","  for (int v = 0; v \u003c n; ++v)","    if (!visited[v] \u0026\u0026 matrix[u][v] \u003c min_dist[v])","      min_dist[v] = matrix[u][v];","}","```","","#### Prim 优先队列版","适合邻接表。","","```cpp","std::vector\u003cbool\u003e visited(n + 1, false);","std::priority_queue\u003cstd::pair\u003clong long, int\u003e,","                    std::vector\u003cstd::pair\u003clong long, int\u003e\u003e,","                    std::greater\u003c\u003e\u003e pq;","","pq.emplace(0, 1);","long long mst = 0;","int count = 0;","","while (!pq.empty() \u0026\u0026 count \u003c n) {","  auto [w, u] = pq.top();","  pq.pop();","  if (visited[u])","    continue;","","  visited[u] = true;","  mst += w;","  ++count;","","  for (auto [v, weight] : adj[u])","    if (!visited[v])","      pq.emplace(weight, v);","}","","if (count != n) {","  // 图不连通","}","```","","### 关键路径（Critical Path / AOE 网）","适用：有向无环图 DAG，边表示活动，边权表示活动耗时。求项目最短完成时间、关键活动、哪些任务不能延误。","","记号：","- `ve[u]`：事件 `u` 的最早发生时间","- `vl[u]`：事件 `u` 的最晚发生时间","- 边 `u -\u003e v, w` 的活动最早开始 `e = ve[u]`","- 边 `u -\u003e v, w` 的活动最晚开始 `l = vl[v] - w`","- 若 `e == l`，该活动是关键活动","","```cpp","struct Edge {","  int from, to, weight;","};","","std::vector\u003cstd::vector\u003cstd::pair\u003cint, int\u003e\u003e\u003e adj(n);","std::vector\u003cint\u003e indegree(n, 0);","std::vector\u003cEdge\u003e edges;","","for (auto [u, v, w] : edges) {","  adj[u].emplace_back(v, w);","  ++indegree[v];","}","","std::queue\u003cint\u003e q;","std::vector\u003cint\u003e topo;","std::vector\u003clong long\u003e ve(n, 0);","","for (int i = 0; i \u003c n; ++i)","  if (indegree[i] == 0)","    q.push(i);","","while (!q.empty()) {","  int u = q.front();","  q.pop();","  topo.push_back(u);","","  for (auto [v, w] : adj[u]) {","    ve[v] = std::max(ve[v], ve[u] + w);","    if (--indegree[v] == 0)","      q.push(v);","  }","}","","if (topo.size() != n) {","  // 有环，不是 AOE 网","}","```","","反向求最晚发生时间：","","```cpp","long long project_time = *std::ranges::max_element(ve);","","std::vector\u003clong long\u003e vl(n, project_time);","for (int i = n - 1; i \u003e= 0; --i) {","  int u = topo[i];","  for (auto [v, w] : adj[u]) {","    vl[u] = std::min(vl[u], vl[v] - w);","  }","}","```","","输出关键活动：","","```cpp","for (auto [u, v, w] : edges) {","  long long earliest = ve[u];","  long long latest = vl[v] - w;","  if (earliest == latest) {","    // u -\u003e v 是关键活动","  }","}","```","","应用：","- 项目最短完成时间：`project_time`","- 关键路径长度：`project_time`","- 活动可延误时间：`latest - earliest`","- 多条关键路径：所有 `earliest == latest` 的边组成的关键子图中可能有多条路径","","## 常用技巧","### 哈希表 / set","判重、计数、记录最早或最晚位置。`std::set` 有序，查找和插入 `O(log n)`；`std::unordered_set` 均摊 `O(1)`，但不能有序遍历。","","```cpp","std::unordered_map\u003cint, int\u003e count;","for (int x : a)","  ++count[x];","","std::unordered_set\u003cint\u003e seen;","for (int x : a) {","  if (seen.contains(target - x)) {","    // 找到一组和为 target 的数","  }","  seen.insert(x);","}","```","","值到下标列表，配合二分找最小合法下标：","","```cpp","std::vector\u003cstd::vector\u003cint\u003e\u003e pos(max_value + 1);","for (int i = 0; i \u003c n; ++i)","  pos[a[i]].push_back(i);","","auto it = std::upper_bound(pos[value].begin(), pos[value].end(), i);","if (it != pos[value].end()) {","  int j = *it; // 最小的 j \u003e i","}","```","","### 双指针 / 滑动窗口","双指针适用：数组有序、窗口性质随左右端点单调变化、每个元素最多进出窗口一次。","","有序数组二数和：","","```cpp","int l = 0, r = n - 1;","while (l \u003c r) {","  int sum = a[l] + a[r];","  if (sum \u003c target)","    ++l;","  else if (sum \u003e target)","    --r;","  else","    break;","}","```","","滑动窗口：","","```cpp","int l = 0;","long long sum = 0;","for (int r = 0; r \u003c n; ++r) {","  sum += a[r];","  while (l \u003c= r \u0026\u0026 !check_window(l, r, sum)) {","    sum -= a[l];","    ++l;","  }","  // [l, r] 是当前合法窗口","}","```","","### 队列 / deque","普通 BFS 用 `queue`；需要两端进出、维护窗口或 0-1 BFS 时用 `deque`。","","```cpp","std::queue\u003cint\u003e q;","dist[start] = 0;","q.push(start);","","while (!q.empty()) {","  int u = q.front();","  q.pop();","  for (int v : g[u]) {","    if (dist[v] != -1)","      continue;","    dist[v] = dist[u] + 1;","    q.push(v);","  }","}","```","","0-1 BFS：","","```cpp","std::deque\u003cint\u003e q;","dist[start] = 0;","q.push_front(start);","","while (!q.empty()) {","  int u = q.front();","  q.pop_front();","  for (auto [v, w] : g[u]) {","    if (dist[u] + w \u003c dist[v]) {","      dist[v] = dist[u] + w;","      if (w == 0)","        q.push_front(v);","      else","        q.push_back(v);","    }","  }","}","```","","### 撤销栈 / 状态历史","适用：编辑器撤销、版本回退、搜索中恢复状态。把每次修改前的旧值压栈，撤销时反向恢复。","","```cpp","struct Change {","  int index;","  int old_value;","};","","std::vector\u003cint\u003e a(n);","std::vector\u003cChange\u003e history;","","auto assign_value = [\u0026](int index, int value) {","  history.push_back({index, a[index]});","  a[index] = value;","};","","auto snapshot = [\u0026]() {","  return static_cast\u003cint\u003e(history.size());","};","","auto rollback = [\u0026](int checkpoint) {","  while (static_cast\u003cint\u003e(history.size()) \u003e checkpoint) {","    auto [index, old_value] = history.back();","    history.pop_back();","    a[index] = old_value;","  }","};","```","","### 堆 / 优先队列","默认是大根堆；小根堆用 `std::greater\u003c\u003e`。","```cpp","std::priority_queue\u003cint\u003e max_heap;","std::priority_queue\u003cint, std::vector\u003cint\u003e, std::greater\u003c\u003e\u003e min_heap;","```","自定义排序：比较器返回 `true` 表示优先级更低，会排到后面。","```cpp","struct Node {","  int value;","  int id;","};","","struct Compare {","  auto operator()(const Node \u0026a, const Node \u0026b) const -\u003e bool {","    if (a.value != b.value)","      return a.value \u003e b.value; // 小 value 优先","    return a.id \u003e b.id;","  }","};","","std::priority_queue\u003cNode, std::vector\u003cNode\u003e, Compare\u003e pq;","```","Dijkstra / Prim 里常用懒删除：弹出时如果状态已经过期，直接 `continue`。","","### 单调栈","适用：找每个元素左/右第一个更大或更小的元素、柱状图最大矩形、字典序删除字符。","","右侧第一个更大元素：","","```cpp","std::vector\u003cint\u003e next_greater(n, -1);","std::vector\u003cint\u003e st; // 栈内下标对应值单调递减","","for (int i = 0; i \u003c n; ++i) {","  while (!st.empty() \u0026\u0026 a[st.back()] \u003c a[i]) {","    next_greater[st.back()] = i;","    st.pop_back();","  }","  st.push_back(i);","}","```","","柱状图最大矩形：","","```cpp","a.push_back(0); // 哨兵，清空栈","std::vector\u003cint\u003e st;","long long ans = 0;","","for (int i = 0; i \u003c a.size(); ++i) {","  while (!st.empty() \u0026\u0026 a[st.back()] \u003e a[i]) {","    int h = a[st.back()];","    st.pop_back();","    int left = st.empty() ? -1 : st.back();","    ans = std::max(ans, 1LL * h * (i - left - 1));","  }","  st.push_back(i);","}","```","","### 单调队列","适用：滑动窗口最大/最小值、窗口内 DP 最值优化。队列里存下标，队首永远是当前窗口最优。","","滑动窗口最大值：","","```cpp","std::deque\u003cint\u003e q;","std::vector\u003cint\u003e ans;","","for (int i = 0; i \u003c n; ++i) {","  while (!q.empty() \u0026\u0026 q.front() \u003c= i - k)","    q.pop_front(); // 过期","  while (!q.empty() \u0026\u0026 a[q.back()] \u003c= a[i])","    q.pop_back(); // 保持递减","  q.push_back(i);","  if (i \u003e= k - 1)","    ans.push_back(a[q.front()]);","}","```","","DP 窗口最大值：","","```cpp","// dp[i] = value[i] + max(dp[j]), i - k \u003c= j \u003c i","std::deque\u003cint\u003e q;","for (int i = 0; i \u003c n; ++i) {","  while (!q.empty() \u0026\u0026 q.front() \u003c i - k)","    q.pop_front();","  if (!q.empty())","    dp[i] = value[i] + dp[q.front()];","  while (!q.empty() \u0026\u0026 dp[q.back()] \u003c= dp[i])","    q.pop_back();","  q.push_back(i);","}","```","","### 答案二分","把“求最优值”改成“判断答案 `x` 是否可行”。关键是判定函数 `check(x)` 必须单调。","","最大值最小化：找最小可行值，形如 `false false true true`。","","```cpp","auto check = [\u0026](long long x) {","  // 是否能让最大代价 \u003c= x","  return true;","};","","long long l = low, r = high;","while (l \u003c r) {","  long long mid = l + ((r - l) \u003e\u003e 1);","  if (check(mid))","    r = mid;","  else","    l = mid + 1;","}","// l 是最小可行值","```","","应用：分割数组最小化最大段和、运货最小容量、最小化最大距离。","","最小值最大化：找最大可行值，形如 `true true false false`。","","```cpp","auto check = [\u0026](long long x) {","  // 是否能让最小收益/间距 \u003e= x","  return true;","};","","long long l = low, r = high;","while (l \u003c r) {","  long long mid = l + ((r - l + 1) \u003e\u003e 1);","  if (check(mid))","    l = mid;","  else","    r = mid - 1;","}","// l 是最大可行值","```","","应用：最大化最小间距、最大化最小分数、选点/放置类问题。","","### 约数分解 / 最小质因数","质数筛法：","","埃氏筛，简单好写，复杂度 `O(n log log n)`。","","```cpp","std::vector\u003cbool\u003e is_prime(limit + 1, true);","is_prime[0] = is_prime[1] = false;","","for (int i = 2; i * i \u003c= limit; ++i) {","  if (!is_prime[i])","    continue;","  for (long long j = 1LL * i * i; j \u003c= limit; j += i)","    is_prime[j] = false;","}","","std::vector\u003cint\u003e primes;","for (int i = 2; i \u003c= limit; ++i)","  if (is_prime[i])","    primes.push_back(i);","```","","线性筛，每个合数只被最小质因数筛一次，复杂度 `O(n)`。","","```cpp","std::vector\u003cint\u003e primes;","std::vector\u003cbool\u003e is_composite(limit + 1, false);","","for (int i = 2; i \u003c= limit; ++i) {","  if (!is_composite[i])","    primes.push_back(i);","  for (int p : primes) {","    if (1LL * i * p \u003e limit)","      break;","    is_composite[i * p] = true;","    if (i % p == 0)","      break;","  }","}","```","","多次分解整数时先筛 `spf[x]`，`spf[x]` 表示 `x` 的最小质因数。复杂度 `O(M log log M)` 预处理，单次分解约 `O(质因数个数)`。","","```cpp","std::vector\u003cint\u003e spf(limit + 1, 0);","for (int i = 2; i \u003c= limit; ++i) {","  if (spf[i] != 0)","    continue;","  for (long long j = i; j \u003c= limit; j += i)","    if (spf[j] == 0)","      spf[j] = i;","}","","auto factorize = [\u0026](int x) {","  std::vector\u003cstd::pair\u003cint, int\u003e\u003e factors;","  while (x \u003e 1) {","    int p = spf[x], cnt = 0;","    while (x % p == 0) {","      x /= p;","      ++cnt;","    }","    factors.push_back({p, cnt});","  }","  return factors;","};","```","","生成所有约数：","","```cpp","std::vector\u003cint\u003e divisors{1};","for (auto [p, cnt] : factors) {","  int size = static_cast\u003cint\u003e(divisors.size());","  int power = 1;","  for (int e = 1; e \u003c= cnt; ++e) {","    power *= p;","    for (int i = 0; i \u003c size; ++i)","      divisors.push_back(divisors[i] * power);","  }","}","```","","若图的转移和质因数/约数有关，先预处理每个数的因子表，再 BFS，避免每次现场分解。","","### 剪枝搜索","适用：组合枚举、分组、因子拆分。核心是先排序，再用上下界、重复跳过、不可行提前返回。","","```cpp","std::sort(a.rbegin(), a.rend()); // 大元素优先，剪枝更强","","auto dfs = [\u0026](auto \u0026\u0026self, int index, int current) -\u003e void {","  if (current \u003e= best)","    return; // 最优性剪枝","  if (index == n) {","    best = std::min(best, current);","    return;","  }","","  for (int choice = 0; choice \u003c limit; ++choice) {","    if (!can_place(index, choice))","      continue; // 可行性剪枝","    place(index, choice);","    self(self, index + 1, current + cost(index, choice));","    undo(index, choice);","  }","};","```"],"stylingDirectives":[[[0,3,"pl-s"]],[[0,10,"pl-ent"]],[[4,15,"pl-s"]],[[0,3,"pl-s"]],[],[[0,19,"pl-mh"],[2,19,"pl-en"]],[[0,6,"pl-mh"],[3,6,"pl-en"]],[[0,9,"pl-mh"],[4,9,"pl-en"]],[[0,3,"pl-s"],[3,6,"pl-en"]],[[0,5,"pl-k"],[6,17,"pl-en"]],[],[],[[26,30,"pl-ent"],[31,35,"pl-e"]],[],[],[[40,41,"pl-s"],[41,56,"pl-corl"],[56,57,"pl-s"]],[[20,23,"pl-ent"]],[[33,36,"pl-ent"],[44,45,"pl-s"],[46,47,"pl-s"]],[[38,42,"pl-ent"],[43,47,"pl-e"]],[],[],[[15,16,"pl-s"],[17,18,"pl-s"],[18,19,"pl-s"],[19,20,"pl-en"],[20,21,"pl-s"],[31,32,"pl-s"],[37,38,"pl-s"],[38,39,"pl-s"],[39,40,"pl-en"],[40,41,"pl-s"],[51,52,"pl-s"],[53,54,"pl-s"],[54,55,"pl-s"],[55,60,"pl-en"],[60,61,"pl-s"]],[[31,32,"pl-s"],[37,38,"pl-s"],[38,39,"pl-s"],[39,44,"pl-en"],[44,45,"pl-s"],[54,55,"pl-s"],[60,61,"pl-s"],[61,62,"pl-s"],[62,67,"pl-en"],[67,68,"pl-s"]],[],[],[],[[18,19,"pl-s"],[25,26,"pl-s"],[26,27,"pl-s"],[27,33,"pl-en"],[33,34,"pl-s"],[44,45,"pl-s"],[47,48,"pl-s"],[48,49,"pl-s"],[49,55,"pl-en"],[55,56,"pl-s"]],[[18,19,"pl-s"],[25,26,"pl-s"],[26,27,"pl-s"],[27,29,"pl-en"],[29,30,"pl-s"],[40,41,"pl-s"],[43,44,"pl-s"],[44,45,"pl-s"],[45,47,"pl-en"],[47,48,"pl-s"]],[],[],[[0,3,"pl-s"],[3,3,"pl-c1"]],[[0,13,"pl-c1"]],[[0,6,"pl-c1"]],[[0,15,"pl-c1"]],[[0,8,"pl-c1"]],[[0,8,"pl-c1"]],[[0,24,"pl-c1"]],[[0,7,"pl-c1"]],[[0,51,"pl-c1"]],[[0,37,"pl-c1"]],[[0,20,"pl-c1"]],[[0,29,"pl-c1"]],[[0,20,"pl-c1"]],[[0,5,"pl-c1"]],[[0,3,"pl-c1"]],[[0,28,"pl-c1"]],[[0,16,"pl-c1"]],[[0,19,"pl-c1"]],[[0,36,"pl-c1"]],[[0,17,"pl-c1"]],[[0,5,"pl-c1"]],[[0,15,"pl-c1"]],[[0,3,"pl-c1"]],[[0,2,"pl-c1"]],[[0,0,"pl-c1"],[0,3,"pl-s"]],[[0,12,"pl-mh"],[4,12,"pl-en"]],[[5,6,"pl-s"],[6,13,"pl-c1"],[13,14,"pl-s"]],[[0,3,"pl-s"],[3,6,"pl-en"]],[[12,15,"pl-k"]],[[0,9,"pl-en"]],[],[[16,17,"pl-s"],[18,19,"pl-s"]],[[21,24,"pl-ent"]],[],[[0,3,"pl-s"],[3,3,"pl-c1"]],[[0,95,"pl-c1"]],[[0,6,"pl-c1"]],[[0,45,"pl-c1"]],[[0,18,"pl-c1"]],[[0,33,"pl-c1"]],[[0,57,"pl-c1"]],[[0,28,"pl-c1"]],[[0,26,"pl-c1"]],[[0,19,"pl-c1"]],[[0,1,"pl-c1"]],[[ <div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h1 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Final Cheat Sheet</h1><a id="user-content-final-cheat-sheet" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Final Cheat Sheet" href="#final-cheat-sheet"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">前缀和</h2><a id="user-content-前缀和" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 前缀和" href="#前缀和"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">二维前缀和</h3><a id="user-content-二维前缀和" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 二维前缀和" href="#二维前缀和"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="class PrefixSum2D {
private:
  int m{}, n{};
  std::vector&lt;std::vector&lt;long long&gt;&gt; pre_sum;

public:
  explicit PrefixSum2D(const std::vector&lt;std::vector&lt;int&gt;&gt; &amp;matrix) {
    m = static_cast&lt;int&gt;(matrix.size());
    n = m == 0 ? 0 : static_cast&lt;int&gt;(matrix[0].size());
    pre_sum.assign(m + 1, std::vector&lt;long long&gt;(n + 1, 0));
    for (int i = 1; i &lt;= m; ++i)
      for (int j = 1; j &lt;= n; ++j)
        pre_sum[i][j] = pre_sum[i - 1][j] + pre_sum[i][j - 1] -
                        pre_sum[i - 1][j - 1] + matrix[i - 1][j - 1];
  }

  auto query(int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2) -&gt; long long {
    return pre_sum[x2 + 1][y2 + 1] - pre_sum[x1][y2 + 1] -
           pre_sum[x2 + 1][y1] + pre_sum[x1][y1];
  }
};"><pre><span class="pl-k">class</span> <span class="pl-en">PrefixSum2D</span> {
<span class="pl-k">private:</span>
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> m{}, n{};
  std::vector&lt;std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span>&gt;&gt; pre_sum;

<span class="pl-k">public:</span>
  <span class="pl-k">explicit</span> <span class="pl-en">PrefixSum2D</span>(<span class="pl-k">const</span> std::vector&lt;std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;&gt; &amp;matrix) {
    m = <span class="pl-k">static_cast</span>&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;(matrix.<span class="pl-c1">size</span>());
    n = m == <span class="pl-c1">0</span> ? <span class="pl-c1">0</span> : <span class="pl-k">static_cast</span>&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;(matrix[<span class="pl-c1">0</span>].<span class="pl-c1">size</span>());
    pre_sum.<span class="pl-c1">assign</span>(m + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span>&gt;(n + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, <span class="pl-c1">0</span>));
    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; i &lt;= m; ++i)
      <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> j = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; j &lt;= n; ++j)
        pre_sum[i][j] = pre_sum[i - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>][j] + pre_sum[i][j - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>] -
                        pre_sum[i - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>][j - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>] + matrix[i - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>][j - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>];
  }

  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">query</span>(<span class="pl-k">int</span> x1, <span class="pl-k">int</span> y1, <span class="pl-k">int</span> x2, <span class="pl-k">int</span> y2) -&gt; long long {
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> pre_sum[x2 + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>][y2 + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>] - pre_sum[x1][y2 + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>] -
           pre_sum[x2 + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>][y1] + pre_sum[x1][y1];
  }
};</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">动态前缀和：BIT</h3><a id="user-content-动态前缀和bit" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 动态前缀和：BIT" href="#动态前缀和bit"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="class Fenwick {
private:
  int n;
  std::vector&lt;int&gt; tree;
public:
  explicit Fenwick(int n) : n(n), tree(n + 1, 0) {}
  auto update(int i, int v) -&gt; void {
    while (i &lt;= n) {
      tree[i] += v; // 单点增加 v
      i += (i &amp; -i);
    }
  }
  auto query(int i) -&gt; int {
    int sum = 0;
    while (i &gt; 0) {
      sum += tree[i]; // 查询前缀和[1, i]
      i &amp;= i - 1;
    }
    return sum;
  }
};"><pre><span class="pl-k">class</span> <span class="pl-en">Fenwick</span> {
<span class="pl-k">private:</span>
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> n;
  std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; tree;
<span class="pl-k">public:</span>
  <span class="pl-k">explicit</span> <span class="pl-en">Fenwick</span>(<span class="pl-k">int</span> n) : n(n), tree(n + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, <span class="pl-c1">0</span>) {}
  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">update</span>(<span class="pl-k">int</span> i, <span class="pl-k">int</span> v) -&gt; void {
    <span class="pl-k">while</span> (i &lt;= n) {
      tree[i] += v; <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 单点增加 v</span>
      i += (i &amp; -i);
    }
  }
  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">query</span>(<span class="pl-k">int</span> i) -&gt; int {
    <span class="pl-k">int</span> sum = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
    <span class="pl-k">while</span> (i &gt; <span class="pl-c1">0</span>) {
