      sum += tree[i]; <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 查询前缀和[1, i]</span>
      i &amp;= i - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
    }
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> sum;
  }
};</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">BIT 扫描方向</h3><a id="user-content-bit-扫描方向" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: BIT 扫描方向" href="#bit-扫描方向"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">离散化后 <code>rank(x)</code> 是 1-index；BIT 维护已经扫过的数的出现次数。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::vector&lt;int&gt; sorted = nums;
std::sort(sorted.begin(), sorted.end());
sorted.erase(std::unique(sorted.begin(), sorted.end()), sorted.end());
auto get_rank = [&amp;](int value) {
  return static_cast&lt;int&gt;(std::lower_bound(sorted.begin(), sorted.end(), value) - sorted.begin()) + 1;
};"><pre>std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; sorted = nums;
<span class="pl-en">std::sort</span>(sorted.begin(), sorted.end());
sorted.erase(std::unique(sorted.begin(), sorted.end()), sorted.end());
<span class="pl-k">auto</span> get_rank = [&amp;](<span class="pl-k">int</span> value) {
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-k">static_cast</span>&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;(<span class="pl-c1">std::lower_bound</span>(sorted.<span class="pl-c1">begin</span>(), sorted.<span class="pl-c1">end</span>(), value) - sorted.<span class="pl-c1">begin</span>()) + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
};</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">边界：<code>&lt; x = query(r - 1)</code>，<code>&lt;= x = query(r)</code>，<code>&gt; x = seen - query(r)</code>，<code>&gt;= x = seen - query(r - 1)</code>。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="Fenwick bit(static_cast&lt;int&gt;(sorted.size()));
long long ans = 0;
// 左 -&gt; 右：统计左侧信息，如逆序对左边 &gt; nums[i]
for (int i = 0; i &lt; static_cast&lt;int&gt;(nums.size()); ++i) {
  int r = get_rank(nums[i]);
  ans += i - bit.query(r);
  bit.update(r, 1);
}
// 右 -&gt; 左：统计右侧信息，如逆序对右边 &lt; nums[i]
bit = Fenwick(static_cast&lt;int&gt;(sorted.size()));
for (int i = static_cast&lt;int&gt;(nums.size()) - 1; i &gt;= 0; --i) {
  int r = get_rank(nums[i]);
  ans += bit.query(r - 1);
  bit.update(r, 1);
}"><pre>Fenwick <span class="pl-en">bit</span>(<span class="pl-k">static_cast</span>&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;(sorted.size()));
<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> ans = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 左 -&gt; 右：统计左侧信息，如逆序对左边 &gt; nums[i]</span>
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; i &lt; <span class="pl-k">static_cast</span>&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;(nums.size()); ++i) {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> r = <span class="pl-c1">get_rank</span>(nums[i]);
  ans += i - bit.<span class="pl-c1">query</span>(r);
  bit.<span class="pl-c1">update</span>(r, <span class="pl-c1">1</span>);
}
<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 右 -&gt; 左：统计右侧信息，如逆序对右边 &lt; nums[i]</span>
bit = Fenwick(<span class="pl-k">static_cast</span>&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;(sorted.size()));
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-k">static_cast</span>&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;(nums.size()) - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; i &gt;= <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; --i) {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> r = <span class="pl-c1">get_rank</span>(nums[i]);
  ans += bit.<span class="pl-c1">query</span>(r - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>);
  bit.<span class="pl-c1">update</span>(r, <span class="pl-c1">1</span>);
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">康托展开排名从右往左扫：</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="long long rank = 1;
for (int i = n - 1; i &gt;= 0; --i) {
  int smaller_on_right = bit.query(permutation[i] - 1);
  rank = (rank + smaller_on_right * fact[n - 1 - i]) % MOD;
  bit.update(permutation[i], 1);
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> rank = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = n - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; i &gt;= <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; --i) {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> smaller_on_right = bit.<span class="pl-c1">query</span>(permutation[i] - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>);
  rank = (rank + smaller_on_right * fact[n - <span class="pl-c1">1</span> - i]) % MOD;
  bit.<span class="pl-c1">update</span>(permutation[i], <span class="pl-c1">1</span>);
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">位运算 / 状态压缩</h2><a id="user-content-位运算--状态压缩" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 位运算 / 状态压缩" href="#位运算--状态压缩"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">位运算速记</h3><a id="user-content-位运算速记" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 位运算速记" href="#位运算速记"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="bool has = (mask &gt;&gt; i) &amp; 1;        // 第 i 位是否为 1
mask |= 1 &lt;&lt; i;                    // 把第 i 位设为 1
mask &amp;= ~(1 &lt;&lt; i);                 // 把第 i 位清 0
mask ^= 1 &lt;&lt; i;                    // 翻转第 i 位
int lowbit = x &amp; -x;               // 最低位的 1
int count = std::popcount(mask);   // C++20，1 的个数"><pre><span class="pl-k">bool</span> has = (mask &gt;&gt; i) &amp; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;        <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 第 i 位是否为 1</span>
mask |= <span class="pl-c1">1</span> &lt;&lt; i;                    <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 把第 i 位设为 1</span>
mask &amp;= ~(<span class="pl-c1">1</span> &lt;&lt; i);                 <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 把第 i 位清 0</span>
mask ^= <span class="pl-c1">1</span> &lt;&lt; i;                    <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 翻转第 i 位</span>
<span class="pl-k">int</span> lowbit = x &amp; -x;               <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 最低位的 1</span>
<span class="pl-k">int</span> count = std::popcount(mask);   <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> C++20，1 的个数</span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">枚举集合 <code>mask</code> 的非空子集：</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="for (int sub = mask; sub; sub = (sub - 1) &amp; mask) {
  // sub 是 mask 的一个非空子集
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> sub = mask; sub; sub = (sub - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>) &amp; mask) {
  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> sub 是 mask 的一个非空子集</span>
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">若要包含空集：</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="for (int sub = mask;; sub = (sub - 1) &amp; mask) {
  // use sub
  if (sub == 0)
    break;
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> sub = mask;; sub = (sub - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>) &amp; mask) {
  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> use sub</span>
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (sub == <span class="pl-c1">0</span>)
    <span class="pl-k">break</span>;
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">状态压缩 DP</h3><a id="user-content-状态压缩-dp" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 状态压缩 DP" href="#状态压缩-dp"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">适用：<code>n &lt;= 20</code> 左右，状态用二进制集合表示。常见转移是“从小集合扩展到大集合”。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="const long long INF = 4e18;
std::vector dp(1 &lt;&lt; n, std::vector&lt;long long&gt;(n, INF));
dp[1 &lt;&lt; start][start] = 0;

for (int mask = 0; mask &lt; (1 &lt;&lt; n); ++mask) {
  for (int u = 0; u &lt; n; ++u) {
    if (((mask &gt;&gt; u) &amp; 1) == 0 || dp[mask][u] == INF)
      continue;
    for (int v = 0; v &lt; n; ++v) {
      if ((mask &gt;&gt; v) &amp; 1)
        continue;
      int next_mask = mask | (1 &lt;&lt; v);
      dp[next_mask][v] = std::min(dp[next_mask][v], dp[mask][u] + cost[u][v]);
    }
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> INF = <span class="pl-c1">4e18</span>;
std::vector <span class="pl-en">dp</span>(<span class="pl-c1">1</span> &lt;&lt; n, std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span>&gt;(n, INF));
dp[<span class="pl-c1">1</span> &lt;&lt; start][start] = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;

<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> mask = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; mask &lt; (<span class="pl-c1">1</span> &lt;&lt; n); ++mask) {
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> u = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; u &lt; n; ++u) {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (((mask &gt;&gt; u) &amp; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>) == <span class="pl-c1">0</span> || dp[mask][u] == INF)
      <span class="pl-k">continue</span>;
    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> v = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; v &lt; n; ++v) {
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> ((mask &gt;&gt; v) &amp; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>)
        <span class="pl-k">continue</span>;
      <span class="pl-k">int</span> next_mask = mask | (<span class="pl-c1">1</span> &lt;&lt; v);
      dp[next_mask][v] = <span class="pl-c1">std::min</span>(dp[next_mask][v], dp[mask][u] + cost[u][v]);
    }
  }
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">排序 / 分治</h2><a id="user-content-排序--分治" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 排序 / 分治" href="#排序--分治"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">归并排序 + 逆序对</h3><a id="user-content-归并排序--逆序对" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 归并排序 + 逆序对" href="#归并排序--逆序对"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::vector&lt;int&gt; tmp(nums.size());
auto merge_sort = [&amp;](auto &amp;&amp;self, int l, int r) -&gt; long long {
  if (r - l &lt;= 1) return 0;
  int m = l + ((r - l) &gt;&gt; 1);
  long long inv = self(self, l, m) + self(self, m, r);
  int i = l, j = m, k = l;
  while (i &lt; m || j &lt; r) {
    if (j == r || (i &lt; m &amp;&amp; nums[i] &lt;= nums[j])) {
      tmp[k++] = nums[i++];
    } else {
      inv += m - i; // nums[i..m) 都 &gt; nums[j]
      tmp[k++] = nums[j++];
    }
  }
  for (int p = l; p &lt; r; ++p) nums[p] = tmp[p];
  return inv;
};
long long inversions = merge_sort(merge_sort, 0, static_cast&lt;int&gt;(nums.size()));"><pre>std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">tmp</span>(nums.size());
<span class="pl-k">auto</span> merge_sort = [&amp;](<span class="pl-k">auto</span> &amp;&amp;self, <span class="pl-k">int</span> l, <span class="pl-k">int</span> r) -&gt; <span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> {
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (r - l &lt;= <span class="pl-c1">1</span>) <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> m = l + ((r - l) &gt;&gt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>);
  <span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> inv = <span class="pl-c1">self</span>(self, l, m) + <span class="pl-c1">self</span>(self, m, r);
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> i = l, j = m, k = l;
  <span class="pl-k">while</span> (i &lt; m || j &lt; r) {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (j == r || (i &lt; m &amp;&amp; nums[i] &lt;= nums[j])) {
      tmp[k++] = nums[i++];
    } <span class="pl-k">else</span> {
      inv += m - i; <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> nums[i..m) 都 &gt; nums[j]</span>
      tmp[k++] = nums[j++];
    }
  }
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> p = l; p &lt; r; ++p) nums[p] = tmp[p];
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> inv;
};
<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> inversions = merge_sort(merge_sort, <span class="pl-c1">0</span>, <span class="pl-k">static_cast</span>&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;(nums.size()));</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">贪心速记</h3><a id="user-content-贪心速记" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 贪心速记" href="#贪心速记"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">适用：局部选择不会破坏全局最优，常和排序、优先队列、交换论证搭配。</p>
<p dir="auto">常见套路：</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>区间调度：按结束时间升序选，能选就选。</li>
<li>覆盖问题：在当前位置可选范围内，选能延伸最远的方案。</li>
<li>配对问题：排序后双指针，最小配最大或相邻配对。</li>
<li>反悔贪心：先接受选择，若超限制就用堆删掉代价最大或收益最小的选择。</li>
</ul>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::sort(intervals.begin(), intervals.end(),
          [](auto &amp;a, auto &amp;b) { return a.end &lt; b.end; });

int count = 0;
int last_end = std::numeric_limits&lt;int&gt;::min();
for (auto [start, end] : intervals) {
  if (start &gt;= last_end) {
    ++count;
    last_end = end;
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-en">std::sort</span>(intervals.begin(), intervals.end(),
          [](<span class="pl-k">auto</span> &amp;a, <span class="pl-k">auto</span> &amp;b) { <span class="pl-k">return</span> a.<span class="pl-smi">end</span> &lt; b.<span class="pl-smi">end</span>; });

<span class="pl-k">int</span> count = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
<span class="pl-k">int</span> last_end = std::numeric_limits&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;::min();
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> [start, end] : intervals) {
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (start &gt;= last_end) {
    ++count;
    last_end = end;
  }
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">动态规划</h2><a id="user-content-动态规划" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 动态规划" href="#动态规划"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">背包</h3><a id="user-content-背包" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 背包" href="#背包"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">0/1 背包：每个物品最多选一次，容量从大到小扫。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::vector&lt;long long&gt; dp(capacity + 1, 0);
for (int i = 0; i &lt; n; ++i)
  for (int c = capacity; c &gt;= weight[i]; --c)
    dp[c] = std::max(dp[c], dp[c - weight[i]] + value[i]);"><pre>std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">dp</span>(capacity + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, <span class="pl-c1">0</span>);
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; i &lt; n; ++i)
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> c = capacity; c &gt;= weight[i]; --c)
    dp[c] = std::max(dp[c], dp[c - weight[i]] + value[i]);</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">完全背包：每个物品可选多次，容量从小到大扫。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::vector&lt;long long&gt; dp(capacity + 1, 0);
for (int i = 0; i &lt; n; ++i)
  for (int c = weight[i]; c &lt;= capacity; ++c)
    dp[c] = std::max(dp[c], dp[c - weight[i]] + value[i]);"><pre>std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">dp</span>(capacity + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, <span class="pl-c1">0</span>);
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; i &lt; n; ++i)
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> c = weight[i]; c &lt;= capacity; ++c)
    dp[c] = std::max(dp[c], dp[c - weight[i]] + value[i]);</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">LIS</h3><a id="user-content-lis" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: LIS" href="#lis"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><code>tails[len]</code> 表示长度为 <code>len + 1</code> 的上升子序列的最小结尾。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::vector&lt;int&gt; tails;
for (int x : nums) {
  auto it = std::lower_bound(tails.begin(), tails.end(), x);
  if (it == tails.end())
    tails.push_back(x);
  else
    *it = x;
}
int lis = static_cast&lt;int&gt;(tails.size());"><pre>std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; tails;
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> x : nums) {
  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> it = <span class="pl-c1">std::lower_bound</span>(tails.<span class="pl-c1">begin</span>(), tails.<span class="pl-c1">end</span>(), x);
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (it == tails.<span class="pl-c1">end</span>())
    tails.<span class="pl-c1">push_back</span>(x);
  <span class="pl-k">else</span>
    *it = x;
}
<span class="pl-k">int</span> lis = <span class="pl-k">static_cast</span>&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;(tails.size());</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">严格上升用 <code>lower_bound</code>；非下降用 <code>upper_bound</code>。</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">网格 DP</h3><a id="user-content-网格-dp" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 网格 DP" href="#网格-dp"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::vector dp(m, std::vector&lt;long long&gt;(n, 0));
dp[0][0] = grid[0][0];
for (int i = 0; i &lt; m; ++i) {
  for (int j = 0; j &lt; n; ++j) {
    if (i &gt; 0)
      dp[i][j] = std::max(dp[i][j], dp[i - 1][j] + grid[i][j]);
    if (j &gt; 0)
      dp[i][j] = std::max(dp[i][j], dp[i][j - 1] + grid[i][j]);
  }
}"><pre>std::vector <span class="pl-en">dp</span>(m, std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span>&gt;(n, <span class="pl-c1">0</span>));
dp[<span class="pl-c1">0</span>][<span class="pl-c1">0</span>] = grid[<span class="pl-c1">0</span>][<span class="pl-c1">0</span>];
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; i &lt; m; ++i) {
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> j = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; j &lt; n; ++j) {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (i &gt; <span class="pl-c1">0</span>)
      dp[i][j] = <span class="pl-c1">std::max</span>(dp[i][j], dp[i - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>][j] + grid[i][j]);
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (j &gt; <span class="pl-c1">0</span>)
      dp[i][j] = <span class="pl-c1">std::max</span>(dp[i][j], dp[i][j - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>] + grid[i][j]);
  }
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">线性 DP / 滑动窗口 DP</h3><a id="user-content-线性-dp--滑动窗口-dp" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 线性 DP / 滑动窗口 DP" href="#线性-dp--滑动窗口-dp"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">线性 DP 通常只依赖前面若干状态：</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::vector&lt;long long&gt; dp(n, 0);
dp[0] = base;
for (int i = 1; i &lt; n; ++i) {
  dp[i] = std::max(dp[i - 1] + take[i], skip_value);
}"><pre>std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">dp</span>(n, <span class="pl-c1">0</span>);
dp[<span class="pl-c1">0</span>] = base;
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; i &lt; n; ++i) {
  dp[i] = <span class="pl-c1">std::max</span>(dp[i - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>] + take[i], skip_value);
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">若转移形如 <code>dp[i] = sum(dp[j]), i - k &lt;= j &lt; i</code>，用前缀和维护窗口和：</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::vector&lt;long long&gt; dp(n + 1, 0), prefix(n + 1, 0);
dp[0] = 1;
prefix[1] = 1;

for (int i = 1; i &lt;= n; ++i) {
  int left = std::max(0, i - k);
  dp[i] = prefix[i] - prefix[left];
  prefix[i + 1] = prefix[i] + dp[i];
}"><pre>std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">dp</span>(n + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, <span class="pl-c1">0</span>), prefix(n + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, <span class="pl-c1">0</span>);
dp[<span class="pl-c1">0</span>] = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
prefix[<span class="pl-c1">1</span>] = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;

<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; i &lt;= n; ++i) {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> left = <span class="pl-c1">std::max</span>(<span class="pl-c1">0</span>, i - k);
  dp[i] = prefix[i] - prefix[left];
  prefix[i + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>] = prefix[i] + dp[i];
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Manacher / 马拉车</h2><a id="user-content-manacher--马拉车" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Manacher / 马拉车" href="#manacher--马拉车"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><code>d1[i]</code> 是以 <code>i</code> 为中心的奇回文半径，长度为 <code>2 * d1[i] - 1</code>；<code>d2[i]</code> 是以 <code>i - 1</code> 和 <code>i</code> 中间为中心的偶回文半径，长度为 <code>2 * d2[i]</code>。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="int n = static_cast&lt;int&gt;(s.size());
std::vector&lt;int&gt; d1(n), d2(n);
// 奇回文：中心是 i，初始半径至少为 1，即 s[i] 本身
for (int i = 0, l = 0, r = -1; i &lt; n; ++i) {
  // [l, r] 是当前最靠右的回文区间，l + r - i 是 i 的镜像点
  int k = i &gt; r ? 1 : std::min(d1[l + r - i], r - i + 1);
  while (0 &lt;= i - k &amp;&amp; i + k &lt; n &amp;&amp; s[i - k] == s[i + k]) ++k;
  d1[i] = k;
  // 如果以 i 为中心的回文更靠右，就更新最右回文区间
  if (i + k - 1 &gt; r) {
    l = i - k + 1;
    r = i + k - 1;
  }
}
// 偶回文：中心在 i - 1 和 i 中间，初始半径可以为 0
for (int i = 0, l = 0, r = -1; i &lt; n; ++i) {
  int k = i &gt; r ? 0 : std::min(d2[l + r - i + 1], r - i + 1);
  while (0 &lt;= i - k - 1 &amp;&amp; i + k &lt; n &amp;&amp; s[i - k - 1] == s[i + k]) ++k;
  d2[i] = k;
  if (i + k - 1 &gt; r) {
    l = i - k;
    r = i + k - 1;
  }
}
int longest = 0;
for (int i = 0; i &lt; n; ++i) {
  // 奇长度 = 2 * d1[i] - 1，偶长度 = 2 * d2[i]
  longest = std::max({longest, 2 * d1[i] - 1, 2 * d2[i]});
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">int</span> n = <span class="pl-k">static_cast</span>&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;(s.size());
std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">d1</span>(n), d2(n);
<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 奇回文：中心是 i，初始半径至少为 1，即 s[i] 本身</span>
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>, l = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>, r = -<span class="pl-c1">1</span>; i &lt; n; ++i) {
  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> [l, r] 是当前最靠右的回文区间，l + r - i 是 i 的镜像点</span>
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> k = i &gt; r ? <span class="pl-c1">1</span> : <span class="pl-c1">std::min</span>(d1[l + r - i], r - i + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>);
  <span class="pl-k">while</span> (<span class="pl-c1">0</span> &lt;= i - k &amp;&amp; i + k &lt; n &amp;&amp; s[i - k] == s[i + k]) ++k;
  d1[i] = k;
  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 如果以 i 为中心的回文更靠右，就更新最右回文区间</span>
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (i + k - <span class="pl-c1">1</span> &gt; r) {
    l = i - k + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
    r = i + k - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
  }
}
<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 偶回文：中心在 i - 1 和 i 中间，初始半径可以为 0</span>
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>, l = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>, r = -<span class="pl-c1">1</span>; i &lt; n; ++i) {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> k = i &gt; r ? <span class="pl-c1">0</span> : <span class="pl-c1">std::min</span>(d2[l + r - i + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>], r - i + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>);
  <span class="pl-k">while</span> (<span class="pl-c1">0</span> &lt;= i - k - <span class="pl-c1">1</span> &amp;&amp; i + k &lt; n &amp;&amp; s[i - k - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>] == s[i + k]) ++k;
  d2[i] = k;
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (i + k - <span class="pl-c1">1</span> &gt; r) {
    l = i - k;
    r = i + k - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
  }
}
<span class="pl-k">int</span> longest = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; i &lt; n; ++i) {
  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 奇长度 = 2 * d1[i] - 1，偶长度 = 2 * d2[i]</span>
  longest = <span class="pl-c1">std::max</span>({longest, <span class="pl-c1">2</span> * d1[i] - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, <span class="pl-c1">2</span> * d2[i]});
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">KMP</h2><a id="user-content-kmp" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: KMP" href="#kmp"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">字符串匹配</h3><a id="user-content-字符串匹配" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 字符串匹配" href="#字符串匹配"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="auto compute_lps(const std::string &amp;s) -&gt; std::vector&lt;int&gt; {
  int n = static_cast&lt;int&gt;(s.length());
  std::vector&lt;int&gt; lps(n, 0);
  int length = 0;
  for (int i = 1; i &lt; n; ++i) {
    while (length &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; s[i] != s[length])
      length = lps[length - 1];
    if (s[i] == s[length])
      ++length;
    lps[i] = length;
  }
  return lps;
} // 计算pattern字符串的LPS(最长前缀后缀)表
auto kmp_search(const std::string &amp;text, const std::string &amp;s) -&gt; std::vector&lt;int&gt; {
  int n = static_cast&lt;int&gt;(text.length());
  int m = static_cast&lt;int&gt;(s.length());
  auto lps = compute_lps(s);
  std::vector&lt;int&gt; matches;
  int j = 0; // 模式串指针
  for (int i = 0; i &lt; n; ++i) { // 主串指针
    while (j &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; text[i] != s[j])
      j = lps[j - 1];
    if (text[i] == s[j])
      ++j;
    if (j == m) {
      matches.emplace_back(i - j + 1);
      j = lps[j - 1];
    }
  } // 统计text中匹配的s的第1位指针
  return matches;
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">compute_lps</span>(<span class="pl-k">const</span> std::string &amp;s) -&gt; std::vector&lt;int&gt; {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> n = <span class="pl-k">static_cast</span>&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;(s.<span class="pl-c1">length</span>());
  std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; <span class="pl-c1">lps</span>(n, <span class="pl-c1">0</span>);
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> length = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; i &lt; n; ++i) {
    <span class="pl-k">while</span> (length &gt; <span class="pl-c1">0</span> &amp;&amp; s[i] != s[length])
      length = lps[length - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>];
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (s[i] == s[length])
      ++length;
    lps[i] = length;
  }
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> lps;
} <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 计算pattern字符串的LPS(最长前缀后缀)表</span>
<span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">kmp_search</span>(<span class="pl-k">const</span> std::string &amp;text, <span class="pl-k">const</span> std::string &amp;s) -&gt; std::vector&lt;int&gt; {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> n = <span class="pl-k">static_cast</span>&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;(text.<span class="pl-c1">length</span>());
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> m = <span class="pl-k">static_cast</span>&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;(s.<span class="pl-c1">length</span>());
  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> lps = <span class="pl-c1">compute_lps</span>(s);
  std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; matches;
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> j = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 模式串指针</span>
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; i &lt; n; ++i) { <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 主串指针</span>
    <span class="pl-k">while</span> (j &gt; <span class="pl-c1">0</span> &amp;&amp; text[i] != s[j])
      j = lps[j - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>];
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (text[i] == s[j])
      ++j;
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (j == m) {
      matches.<span class="pl-c1">emplace_back</span>(i - j + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>);
      j = lps[j - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>];
    }
  } <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 统计text中匹配的s的第1位指针</span>
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> matches;
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">最小循环元引理</h3><a id="user-content-最小循环元引理" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 最小循环元引理" href="#最小循环元引理"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">假设一个字符串的长度为 <code>L</code>（<code>1-based</code> 计数），其对应的 LPS 数组最后一位为 <code>lps[L-1]</code>。 若满足 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$L\mod{(L - lps[L-1])} == 0$</math-renderer>，则：
该字符串由一个长度为 <code>d = L - lps[L-1]</code> 的子串重复构成，该子串即为<strong>最小循环元</strong>，重复次数 <code>K = L / d</code>。</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">调度场算法</h2><a id="user-content-调度场算法" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 调度场算法" href="#调度场算法"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">中缀表达式求值：数字入 <code>nums</code>，运算符入 <code>ops</code>；遇到低优先级运算符前，先结算栈顶高/同优先级运算符。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="auto priority = [](char op) {
  if (op == '+' || op == '-') return 1;
  if (op == '*' || op == '/') return 2;
  return 0;
};
std::vector&lt;long long&gt; nums;
std::vector&lt;char&gt; ops;
auto apply = [&amp;]() {
  long long b = nums.back(); nums.pop_back();
  long long a = nums.back(); nums.pop_back();
  char op = ops.back(); ops.pop_back();
  if (op == '+') nums.push_back(a + b);
  if (op == '-') nums.push_back(a - b);
  if (op == '*') nums.push_back(a * b);
  if (op == '/') nums.push_back(a / b);
};
bool need_num = true;
for (int i = 0; i &lt; s.size();) {
  if (std::isspace(s[i])) {
    ++i;
  } else if (std::isdigit(s[i]) ||
             (need_num &amp;&amp; (s[i] == '+' || s[i] == '-') &amp;&amp;
              i + 1 &lt; s.size() &amp;&amp; std::isdigit(s[i + 1]))) {
    int sign = 1;
    if (s[i] == '+' || s[i] == '-') sign = s[i++] == '-' ? -1 : 1;
    long long x = 0;
    while (i &lt; s.size() &amp;&amp; std::isdigit(s[i])) {
      x = x * 10 + s[i++] - '0';
    }
    nums.push_back(sign * x);
    need_num = false;
  } else if (s[i] == '(') {
    ops.push_back(s[i++]), need_num = true;
  } else if (s[i] == ')') {
    while (ops.back() != '(') apply();
    ops.pop_back(), ++i, need_num = false;
  } else {
    char op = s[i++];
    while (!ops.empty() &amp;&amp; ops.back() != '(' &amp;&amp;
           priority(ops.back()) &gt;= priority(op))
      apply();
    ops.push_back(op), need_num = true;
  }
}
while (!ops.empty()) apply();
long long ans = nums.back();"><pre><span class="pl-k">auto</span> priority = [](<span class="pl-k">char</span> op) {
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (op == <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>+<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span> || op == <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>-<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>) <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (op == <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>*<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span> || op == <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>/<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>) <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">2</span>;
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
};
std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span>&gt; nums;
std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">char</span>&gt; ops;
<span class="pl-k">auto</span> apply = [&amp;]() {
  <span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> b = nums.<span class="pl-c1">back</span>(); nums.<span class="pl-c1">pop_back</span>();
  <span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> a = nums.<span class="pl-c1">back</span>(); nums.<span class="pl-c1">pop_back</span>();
  <span class="pl-k">char</span> op = ops.<span class="pl-c1">back</span>(); ops.<span class="pl-c1">pop_back</span>();
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (op == <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>+<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>) nums.<span class="pl-c1">push_back</span>(a + b);
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (op == <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>-<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>) nums.<span class="pl-c1">push_back</span>(a - b);
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (op == <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>*<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>) nums.<span class="pl-c1">push_back</span>(a * b);
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (op == <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>/<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>) nums.<span class="pl-c1">push_back</span>(a / b);
};
<span class="pl-k">bool</span> need_num = <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; i &lt; s.size();) {
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (<span class="pl-c1">std::isspace</span>(s[i])) {
    ++i;
  } <span class="pl-k">else</span> <span class="pl-k">if</span> (<span class="pl-c1">std::isdigit</span>(s[i]) ||
             (need_num &amp;&amp; (s[i] == <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>+<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span> || s[i] == <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>-<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>) &amp;&amp;
              i + <span class="pl-c1">1</span> &lt; s.<span class="pl-c1">size</span>() &amp;&amp; <span class="pl-c1">std::isdigit</span>(s[i + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>]))) {
    <span class="pl-k">int</span> sign = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (s[i] == <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>+<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span> || s[i] == <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>-<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>) sign = s[i++] == <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>-<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span> ? -<span class="pl-c1">1</span> : <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
    <span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> x = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
    <span class="pl-k">while</span> (i &lt; s.<span class="pl-c1">size</span>() &amp;&amp; <span class="pl-c1">std::isdigit</span>(s[i])) {
      x = x * <span class="pl-c1">10</span> + s[i++] - <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>0<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>;
    }
    nums.<span class="pl-c1">push_back</span>(sign * x);
    need_num = <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;
  } <span class="pl-k">else</span> <span class="pl-k">if</span> (s[i] == <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>(<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>) {
    ops.<span class="pl-c1">push_back</span>(s[i++]), need_num = <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
  } <span class="pl-k">else</span> <span class="pl-k">if</span> (s[i] == <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>)<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>) {
    <span class="pl-k">while</span> (ops.<span class="pl-c1">back</span>() != <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>(<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>) <span class="pl-c1">apply</span>();
    ops.<span class="pl-c1">pop_back</span>(), ++i, need_num = <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;
  } <span class="pl-k">else</span> {
    <span class="pl-k">char</span> op = s[i++];
    <span class="pl-k">while</span> (!ops.<span class="pl-c1">empty</span>() &amp;&amp; ops.<span class="pl-c1">back</span>() != <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>(<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span> &amp;&amp;
           <span class="pl-c1">priority</span>(ops.<span class="pl-c1">back</span>()) &gt;= <span class="pl-c1">priority</span>(op))
      <span class="pl-c1">apply</span>();
    ops.<span class="pl-c1">push_back</span>(op), need_num = <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
  }
}
<span class="pl-k">while</span> (!ops.empty()) apply();
<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> ans = nums.back();</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">链表</h2><a id="user-content-链表" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 链表" href="#链表"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">反转链表</h3><a id="user-content-反转链表" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 反转链表" href="#反转链表"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="auto reverseList(ListNode *head) -&gt; ListNode * {
  ListNode *prev = nullptr;
  while (head) {
    auto next = head-&gt;next;
    head-&gt;next = prev;
    prev = head;
    head = next;
  }
  return prev;
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">reverseList</span>(ListNode *head) -&gt; ListNode * {
  ListNode *prev = <span class="pl-c1">nullptr</span>;
  <span class="pl-k">while</span> (head) {
    <span class="pl-k">auto</span> next = head-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">next</span>;
    head-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">next</span> = prev;
    prev = head;
    head = next;
  }
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> prev;
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">快慢指针</h3><a id="user-content-快慢指针" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 快慢指针" href="#快慢指针"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">找中点：循环结束后 <code>slow</code> 在中点；偶数长度时在右中点。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="auto middleNode(ListNode *head) -&gt; ListNode * {
  auto slow = head;
  auto fast = head;
  while (fast &amp;&amp; fast-&gt;next) {
    slow = slow-&gt;next;
    fast = fast-&gt;next-&gt;next;
  }
  return slow;
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">middleNode</span>(ListNode *head) -&gt; ListNode * {
  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> slow = head;
  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> fast = head;
  <span class="pl-k">while</span> (fast &amp;&amp; fast-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">next</span>) {
    slow = slow-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">next</span>;
    fast = fast-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">next</span>-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">next</span>;
  }
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> slow;
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">判环并找入环点：</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="auto detectCycle(ListNode *head) -&gt; ListNode * {
  auto slow = head;
  auto fast = head;
  while (fast &amp;&amp; fast-&gt;next) {
    slow = slow-&gt;next;
    fast = fast-&gt;next-&gt;next;
    if (slow == fast) {
      auto ptr = head;
      while (ptr != slow) {
        ptr = ptr-&gt;next;
        slow = slow-&gt;next;
      }
      return ptr;
    }
  }
  return nullptr;
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">detectCycle</span>(ListNode *head) -&gt; ListNode * {
  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> slow = head;
  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> fast = head;
  <span class="pl-k">while</span> (fast &amp;&amp; fast-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">next</span>) {
    slow = slow-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">next</span>;
    fast = fast-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">next</span>-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">next</span>;
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (slow == fast) {
      <span class="pl-k">auto</span> ptr = head;
      <span class="pl-k">while</span> (ptr != slow) {
        ptr = ptr-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">next</span>;
        slow = slow-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">next</span>;
      }
      <span class="pl-k">return</span> ptr;
    }
  }
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">nullptr</span>;
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Tree</h2><a id="user-content-tree" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Tree" href="#tree"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">树的读入和长子兄弟法</h3><a id="user-content-树的读入和长子兄弟法" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 树的读入和长子兄弟法" href="#树的读入和长子兄弟法"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="struct TreeNode {
  char id;
  TreeNode *first_child{};
  TreeNode *next_sibling{};
  explicit TreeNode(char id) : id(id) {}
};
struct Node {
  char id;
  int degree;
};
auto buildTree(const std::vector&lt;Node&gt; &amp;nodes) -&gt; TreeNode * {
  if (nodes.empty())
    return nullptr;

  auto root = new TreeNode(nodes[0].id);
  std::queue&lt;std::pair&lt;TreeNode *, int&gt;&gt; q;
  q.emplace(root, nodes[0].degree);

  size_t i = 1;
  while (!q.empty() &amp;&amp; i &lt; nodes.size()) {
    auto [parent, degree] = q.front();
    q.pop();

    auto first_child = parent-&gt;first_child;
    auto prev_child = first_child;
    while (degree-- &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; i &lt; nodes.size()) {
      auto child = new TreeNode(nodes[i].id);
      if (!first_child)
        first_child = child;
      else
        prev_child-&gt;next_sibling = child;

      prev_child = child;
      q.emplace(child, nodes[i].degree);
      ++i;
    }
    parent-&gt;first_child = first_child;
  }
  return root;
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">struct</span> <span class="pl-en">TreeNode</span> {
  <span class="pl-k">char</span> id;
  TreeNode *first_child{};
  TreeNode *next_sibling{};
  <span class="pl-k">explicit</span> <span class="pl-en">TreeNode</span>(<span class="pl-k">char</span> id) : id(id) {}
};
<span class="pl-k">struct</span> <span class="pl-en">Node</span> {
  <span class="pl-k">char</span> id;
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> degree;
};
<span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">buildTree</span>(<span class="pl-k">const</span> std::vector&lt;Node&gt; &amp;nodes) -&gt; TreeNode * {
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (nodes.<span class="pl-c1">empty</span>())
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">nullptr</span>;

  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> root = <span class="pl-k">new</span> <span class="pl-c1">TreeNode</span>(nodes[<span class="pl-c1">0</span>].<span class="pl-smi">id</span>);
  std::queue&lt;std::pair&lt;TreeNode *, <span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;&gt; q;
  q.<span class="pl-c1">emplace</span>(root, nodes[<span class="pl-c1">0</span>].<span class="pl-smi">degree</span>);

  <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
  <span class="pl-k">while</span> (!q.<span class="pl-c1">empty</span>() &amp;&amp; i &lt; nodes.<span class="pl-c1">size</span>()) {
    <span class="pl-k">auto</span> [parent, degree] = q.<span class="pl-c1">front</span>();
    q.<span class="pl-c1">pop</span>();

    <span class="pl-k">auto</span> first_child = parent-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">first_child</span>;
    <span class="pl-k">auto</span> prev_child = first_child;
    <span class="pl-k">while</span> (degree-- &gt; <span class="pl-c1">0</span> &amp;&amp; i &lt; nodes.<span class="pl-c1">size</span>()) {
      <span class="pl-k">auto</span> child = <span class="pl-k">new</span> <span class="pl-c1">TreeNode</span>(nodes[i].<span class="pl-smi">id</span>);
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!first_child)
        first_child = child;
      <span class="pl-k">else</span>
        prev_child-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">next_sibling</span> = child;

      prev_child = child;
      q.<span class="pl-c1">emplace</span>(child, nodes[i].<span class="pl-smi">degree</span>);
      ++i;
    }
    parent-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">first_child</span> = first_child;
  }
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> root;
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">嵌套括号树</h3><a id="user-content-嵌套括号树" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 嵌套括号树" href="#嵌套括号树"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="auto parseNode(const std::string &amp;data, size_t &amp;ptr) -&gt; TreeNode * {
  if (ptr &gt;= data.size())
    return nullptr;

  // 先读当前节点，如 A(B,C) 中的 A
  auto root = new TreeNode(data[ptr]);
  ++ptr;

  // 如果后面接 '('，说明当前节点有孩子列表
  if (ptr &lt; data.size() &amp;&amp; data[ptr] == '(') {
    ++ptr; // 跳过 '('
    TreeNode *prev = nullptr;

    // 逐个解析孩子，直到遇到 ')'；逗号只负责分隔兄弟
    while (ptr &lt; data.size() &amp;&amp; data[ptr] != ')') {
      auto child = parseNode(data, ptr);
      if (!root-&gt;first_child)
        root-&gt;first_child = child; // 第一个孩子挂到 first_child
      else
        prev-&gt;next_sibling = child; // 后续孩子接到上一个孩子的兄弟指针
      prev = child;
      if (ptr &lt; data.size() &amp;&amp; data[ptr] == ',')
        ++ptr; // 跳过 ','
    }
    if (ptr &lt; data.size() &amp;&amp; data[ptr] == ')')
      ++ptr; // 跳过 ')'
  }
  return root;
}
auto buildTree(const std::string &amp;data) -&gt; TreeNode * {
  if (data.empty())
    return nullptr;
  size_t ptr = 0;
  return parseNode(data, ptr);
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">parseNode</span>(<span class="pl-k">const</span> std::string &amp;data, <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> &amp;ptr) -&gt; TreeNode * {
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (ptr &gt;= data.<span class="pl-c1">size</span>())
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">nullptr</span>;

  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 先读当前节点，如 A(B,C) 中的 A</span>
  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> root = <span class="pl-k">new</span> <span class="pl-c1">TreeNode</span>(data[ptr]);
  ++ptr;

  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 如果后面接 '('，说明当前节点有孩子列表</span>
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (ptr &lt; data.<span class="pl-c1">size</span>() &amp;&amp; data[ptr] == <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>(<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>) {
    ++ptr; <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 跳过 '('</span>
    TreeNode *prev = <span class="pl-c1">nullptr</span>;

    <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 逐个解析孩子，直到遇到 ')'；逗号只负责分隔兄弟</span>
    <span class="pl-k">while</span> (ptr &lt; data.<span class="pl-c1">size</span>() &amp;&amp; data[ptr] != <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>)<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>) {
      <span class="pl-k">auto</span> child = <span class="pl-c1">parseNode</span>(data, ptr);
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!root-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">first_child</span>)
        root-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">first_child</span> = child; <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 第一个孩子挂到 first_child</span>
      <span class="pl-k">else</span>
        prev-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">next_sibling</span> = child; <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 后续孩子接到上一个孩子的兄弟指针</span>
      prev = child;
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (ptr &lt; data.<span class="pl-c1">size</span>() &amp;&amp; data[ptr] == <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>,<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>)
        ++ptr; <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 跳过 ','</span>
    }
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (ptr &lt; data.<span class="pl-c1">size</span>() &amp;&amp; data[ptr] == <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>)<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>)
      ++ptr; <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 跳过 ')'</span>
  }
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> root;
}
<span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">buildTree</span>(<span class="pl-k">const</span> std::string &amp;data) -&gt; TreeNode * {
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (data.<span class="pl-c1">empty</span>())
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">nullptr</span>;
  <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> ptr = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">parseNode</span>(data, ptr);
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">如果题目给的是二叉树括号表示：<code>A(B,C)</code>，逗号左边是左子树，右边是右子树；空子树可写成 <code>A(,B)</code> 或 <code>A(B,)</code>。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="auto parseBinary(const std::string &amp;s, size_t &amp;pos) -&gt; BinaryNode * {
  if (pos &gt;= s.size() || s[pos] == ')' || s[pos] == ',')
    return nullptr;
  // 先读根节点，如 A(B,C) 中的 A
  auto root = new BinaryNode(s[pos++]);
  // 如果后面接括号，括号内最多两棵子树：left,right
  if (pos &lt; s.size() &amp;&amp; s[pos] == '(') {
    ++pos; // 跳过 '('
    if (pos &lt; s.size() &amp;&amp; s[pos] != ',')
      root-&gt;left = parseBinary(s, pos);
    if (pos &lt; s.size() &amp;&amp; s[pos] == ',')
      ++pos; // 跳过 ','
    if (pos &lt; s.size() &amp;&amp; s[pos] != ')')
      root-&gt;right = parseBinary(s, pos);
    if (pos &lt; s.size() &amp;&amp; s[pos] == ')')
      ++pos; // 跳过 ')'
  }
  return root;
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">parseBinary</span>(<span class="pl-k">const</span> std::string &amp;s, <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> &amp;pos) -&gt; BinaryNode * {
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (pos &gt;= s.<span class="pl-c1">size</span>() || s[pos] == <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>)<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span> || s[pos] == <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>,<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>)
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">nullptr</span>;
  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 先读根节点，如 A(B,C) 中的 A</span>
  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> root = <span class="pl-k">new</span> <span class="pl-c1">BinaryNode</span>(s[pos++]);
  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 如果后面接括号，括号内最多两棵子树：left,right</span>
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (pos &lt; s.<span class="pl-c1">size</span>() &amp;&amp; s[pos] == <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>(<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>) {
    ++pos; <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 跳过 '('</span>
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (pos &lt; s.<span class="pl-c1">size</span>() &amp;&amp; s[pos] != <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>,<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>)
      root-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">left</span> = <span class="pl-c1">parseBinary</span>(s, pos);
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (pos &lt; s.<span class="pl-c1">size</span>() &amp;&amp; s[pos] == <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>,<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>)
      ++pos; <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 跳过 ','</span>
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (pos &lt; s.<span class="pl-c1">size</span>() &amp;&amp; s[pos] != <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>)<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>)
      root-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">right</span> = <span class="pl-c1">parseBinary</span>(s, pos);
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (pos &lt; s.<span class="pl-c1">size</span>() &amp;&amp; s[pos] == <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>)<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>)
      ++pos; <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 跳过 ')'</span>
  }
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> root;
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">LCA 倍增法</h3><a id="user-content-lca-倍增法" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: LCA 倍增法" href="#lca-倍增法"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">预处理 <code>up[u][k]</code> 表示 <code>u</code> 的第 <code>2^k</code> 级祖先。查询时先把两个点提到同一深度，再一起向上跳。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="int LOG = 1;
while ((1 &lt;&lt; LOG) &lt;= n) ++LOG;

std::vector&lt;int&gt; depth(n + 1, 0);
std::vector up(n + 1, std::vector&lt;int&gt;(LOG, 0));

auto dfs = [&amp;](auto &amp;&amp;self, int u, int parent) -&gt; void {
  up[u][0] = parent;
  for (int k = 1; k &lt; LOG; ++k)
    up[u][k] = up[up[u][k - 1]][k - 1];

  for (int v : tree[u]) {
    if (v == parent)
      continue;
    depth[v] = depth[u] + 1;
    self(self, v, u);
  }
};

auto lift = [&amp;](int u, int step) {
  for (int k = 0; k &lt; LOG; ++k)
    if ((step &gt;&gt; k) &amp; 1)
      u = up[u][k];
  return u;
};

auto lca = [&amp;](int u, int v) {
  if (depth[u] &lt; depth[v])
    std::swap(u, v);
  u = lift(u, depth[u] - depth[v]);
  if (u == v)
    return u;

  for (int k = LOG - 1; k &gt;= 0; --k) {
    if (up[u][k] != up[v][k]) {
      u = up[u][k];
      v = up[v][k];
    }
  }
  return up[u][0];
};

dfs(dfs, root, 0);"><pre><span class="pl-k">int</span> LOG = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
<span class="pl-k">while</span> ((<span class="pl-c1">1</span> &lt;&lt; LOG) &lt;= n) ++LOG;

std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">depth</span>(n + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, <span class="pl-c1">0</span>);
std::vector <span class="pl-en">up</span>(n + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;(LOG, <span class="pl-c1">0</span>));

<span class="pl-k">auto</span> dfs = [&amp;](<span class="pl-k">auto</span> &amp;&amp;self, <span class="pl-k">int</span> u, <span class="pl-k">int</span> parent) -&gt; <span class="pl-k">void</span> {
  up[u][<span class="pl-c1">0</span>] = parent;
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> k = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; k &lt; LOG; ++k)
    up[u][k] = up[up[u][k - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>]][k - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>];

  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> v : tree[u]) {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (v == parent)
      <span class="pl-k">continue</span>;
    depth[v] = depth[u] + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
    <span class="pl-c1">self</span>(self, v, u);
  }
};

<span class="pl-k">auto</span> lift = [&amp;](<span class="pl-k">int</span> u, <span class="pl-k">int</span> step) {
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> k = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; k &lt; LOG; ++k)
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> ((step &gt;&gt; k) &amp; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>)
      u = up[u][k];
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> u;
};

<span class="pl-k">auto</span> lca = [&amp;](<span class="pl-k">int</span> u, <span class="pl-k">int</span> v) {
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (depth[u] &lt; depth[v])
    <span class="pl-c1">std::swap</span>(u, v);
  u = <span class="pl-c1">lift</span>(u, depth[u] - depth[v]);
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (u == v)
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> u;

  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> k = LOG - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; k &gt;= <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; --k) {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (up[u][k] != up[v][k]) {
      u = up[u][k];
      v = up[v][k];
    }
  }
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> up[u][<span class="pl-c1">0</span>];
};

<span class="pl-en">dfs</span>(dfs, root, <span class="pl-c1">0</span>);</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">树上距离：</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="int ancestor = lca(u, v);
int distance = depth[u] + depth[v] - 2 * depth[ancestor];"><pre><span class="pl-k">int</span> ancestor = lca(u, v);
<span class="pl-k">int</span> distance = depth[u] + depth[v] - <span class="pl-c1">2</span> * depth[ancestor];</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">DFS 序 / 子树区间</h3><a id="user-content-dfs-序--子树区间" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: DFS 序 / 子树区间" href="#dfs-序--子树区间"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">DFS 进入时间把树映射成数组，任意子树对应连续区间 <code>[tin[u], tout[u]]</code>。适用：子树加、子树和、统计子树内信息。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::vector&lt;int&gt; tin(n + 1), tout(n + 1);
int timer = 0;

auto dfs_order = [&amp;](auto &amp;&amp;self, int u, int parent) -&gt; void {
  tin[u] = ++timer;
  for (int v : tree[u]) {
    if (v == parent)
      continue;
    self(self, v, u);
  }
  tout[u] = timer;
};

dfs_order(dfs_order, root, 0);
// subtree(u) -&gt; [tin[u], tout[u]]"><pre>std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">tin</span>(n + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>), tout(n + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>);
<span class="pl-k">int</span> timer = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;

<span class="pl-k">auto</span> dfs_order = [&amp;](<span class="pl-k">auto</span> &amp;&amp;self, <span class="pl-k">int</span> u, <span class="pl-k">int</span> parent) -&gt; <span class="pl-k">void</span> {
  tin[u] = ++timer;
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> v : tree[u]) {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (v == parent)
      <span class="pl-k">continue</span>;
    <span class="pl-c1">self</span>(self, v, u);
  }
  tout[u] = timer;
};

<span class="pl-en">dfs_order</span>(dfs_order, root, <span class="pl-c1">0</span>);
<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> subtree(u) -&gt; [tin[u], tout[u]]</span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">映射关系：</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>tin[u]</code>：树上点 <code>u</code> 对应 DFS 序数组位置。</li>
<li><code>order[pos]</code>：DFS 序位置 <code>pos</code> 对应树上哪个点。</li>
<li><code>flat[tin[u]] = weight[u]</code>：把树上点权映射到数组。</li>
</ul>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::vector&lt;int&gt; order(n + 1);
std::vector&lt;long long&gt; flat(n + 1);

auto dfs_flatten = [&amp;](auto &amp;&amp;self, int u, int parent) -&gt; void {
  tin[u] = ++timer;
  order[timer] = u;
  flat[timer] = weight[u];

  for (int v : tree[u]) {
    if (v == parent)
      continue;
    self(self, v, u);
  }

  tout[u] = timer;
};"><pre>std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">order</span>(n + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>);
std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">flat</span>(n + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>);

<span class="pl-k">auto</span> dfs_flatten = [&amp;](<span class="pl-k">auto</span> &amp;&amp;self, <span class="pl-k">int</span> u, <span class="pl-k">int</span> parent) -&gt; <span class="pl-k">void</span> {
  tin[u] = ++timer;
  order[timer] = u;
  flat[timer] = weight[u];

  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> v : tree[u]) {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (v == parent)
      <span class="pl-k">continue</span>;
    <span class="pl-c1">self</span>(self, v, u);
  }

  tout[u] = timer;
};</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">常用转换：单点 <code>u</code> 修改 -&gt; 修改 <code>tin[u]</code>；查询或修改 <code>u</code> 的整棵子树 -&gt; 区间 <code>[tin[u], tout[u]]</code>。</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">树上背包 DP</h3><a id="user-content-树上背包-dp" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 树上背包 DP" href="#树上背包-dp"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><code>dp[u][j]</code> 表示在 <code>u</code> 子树中选 <code>j</code> 个点的最优值。合并儿子时容量倒序，避免同一个儿子被重复用。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="const long long INF = 4e18;
std::vector dp(n + 1, std::vector&lt;long long&gt;(k + 1, -INF));
std::vector&lt;int&gt; size(n + 1, 0);

auto dfs_knapsack = [&amp;](auto &amp;&amp;self, int u, int parent) -&gt; void {
  dp[u][0] = 0;
  dp[u][1] = value[u];
  size[u] = 1;

  for (int v : tree[u]) {
    if (v == parent)
      continue;
    self(self, v, u);

    for (int i = std::min(size[u], k); i &gt;= 0; --i) {
      for (int j = 1; j &lt;= size[v] &amp;&amp; i + j &lt;= k; ++j) {
        dp[u][i + j] = std::max(dp[u][i + j], dp[u][i] + dp[v][j]);
      }
    }
    size[u] += size[v];
  }
};"><pre><span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> INF = <span class="pl-c1">4e18</span>;
std::vector <span class="pl-en">dp</span>(n + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span>&gt;(k + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, -INF));
std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">size</span>(n + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, <span class="pl-c1">0</span>);

<span class="pl-k">auto</span> dfs_knapsack = [&amp;](<span class="pl-k">auto</span> &amp;&amp;self, <span class="pl-k">int</span> u, <span class="pl-k">int</span> parent) -&gt; <span class="pl-k">void</span> {
  dp[u][<span class="pl-c1">0</span>] = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
  dp[u][<span class="pl-c1">1</span>] = value[u];
  size[u] = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;

  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> v : tree[u]) {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (v == parent)
      <span class="pl-k">continue</span>;
    <span class="pl-c1">self</span>(self, v, u);

    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">std::min</span>(size[u], k); i &gt;= <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; --i) {
      <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> j = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; j &lt;= size[v] &amp;&amp; i + j &lt;= k; ++j) {
        dp[u][i + j] = <span class="pl-c1">std::max</span>(dp[u][i + j], dp[u][i] + dp[v][j]);
      }
    }
    size[u] += size[v];
  }
};</pre></div>
