<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">卡特兰数</h3><a id="user-content-卡特兰数" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 卡特兰数" href="#卡特兰数"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Catalan数 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$𝐶_𝑛$</math-renderer> 的递推关系有着天然的递归结构：规模为 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$𝑛$</math-renderer> 的计数问题 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$𝐶_𝑛$</math-renderer> ，可以通过枚举分界点，分拆为两个规模分别为 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$𝑖$</math-renderer> 和 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$(𝑛−1-𝑖)$</math-renderer> 的子问题。这一递推关系使得Catalan数广泛出现于各类具有类似递归结构的问题中。
<strong>路径计数问题</strong>：有一个大小为 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$n\times n$</math-renderer> 的方格图，左下角为 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$(0,0)(0, 0)$</math-renderer>，右上角为 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$(𝑛,𝑛)(n, n)$</math-renderer> 。从左下角开始，每次都只能向右或者向上走一单位，不走到对角线 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$y=x$</math-renderer> 上方（但可以触碰）的情况下，到达右上角的路径总数为 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$C_n$</math-renderer> 。
<strong>圆内不相交弦计数问题</strong>：圆上有 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$2n$</math-renderer> 个点，将这些点成对连接起来且使得所得到的 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$n$</math-renderer> 条线段两两不交的方案数是 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$C_n$</math-renderer>。
<strong>三角剖分计数问题</strong>：对角线不相交的情况下，将一个凸 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$(n + 2)$</math-renderer> 边形区域分成三角形区域的方法数为 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$C_n$</math-renderer> 。
<strong>二叉树计数问题</strong>：含有 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$n$</math-renderer> 个结点的形态不同的二叉树数目为 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$C_n$</math-renderer> 。等价地，含有 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$n$</math-renderer> 个非叶结点的形态不同的满二叉树数目为 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$C_{n}$</math-renderer> 。
<strong>括号序列计数问题</strong>：由 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$n$</math-renderer> 对括号构成的合法括号序列数为 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$C_n$</math-renderer> 。
<strong>出栈序列计数问题</strong>：一个栈（无穷大）的进栈序列为 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$1,2,3, \ldots ,n$</math-renderer> ，合法出栈序列的数目为 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$C_n$</math-renderer> 。
<strong>数列计数问题</strong>：由 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$n$</math-renderer> 个 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$+1$</math-renderer> 和 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$n$</math-renderer> 个 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$-1$</math-renderer> 组成的数列 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$a_1,a_2, \ldots ,a_{2n}$</math-renderer> 中，部分和满足 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$a_1+a_2+ \ldots +a_k \geq 0~(k=1,2,3, \ldots ,2n)$</math-renderer> 的数列数目为 <math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$C_n$</math-renderer> 。</p>
<p dir="auto"><math-renderer class="js-inline-math" style="display: inline-block" data-run-id="141465396776e2e57c3a70319978d17f">$C_n = \frac{(4n - 2)}{n + 1} C_{n-1},\ n &amp;gt; 0,\ C_0 = 1.$</math-renderer></p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Huffman Tree</h3><a id="user-content-huffman-tree" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Huffman Tree" href="#huffman-tree"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="struct TreeNode {
  char ch;
  int freq;
  TreeNode *left{};
  TreeNode *right{};
  TreeNode() : ch(0), freq(0) {}
  TreeNode(char ch, int freq) : ch(ch), freq(freq) {}
  TreeNode(char ch, int freq, TreeNode *left, TreeNode *right)
      : ch(ch), freq(freq), left(left), right(right) {}
};
class HuffmanTree {
private:
  struct CompareNode {
    auto operator()(TreeNode *a, TreeNode *b) -&gt; bool {
      if (a-&gt;freq != b-&gt;freq) {
        return a-&gt;freq &gt; b-&gt;freq;
      }
      return a-&gt;ch &gt; b-&gt;ch;
    }
  };
  std::priority_queue&lt;TreeNode *, std::vector&lt;TreeNode *&gt;, CompareNode&gt; pq;
  TreeNode *root{};
public:
  auto build_huffman_tree(const std::vector&lt;std::pair&lt;char, int&gt;&gt; &amp;char_set)
      -&gt; TreeNode * {
    for (auto &amp;&amp;x : char_set) {
      pq.emplace(new TreeNode(x.first, x.second));
    }
    while (pq.size() &gt; 1) {
      auto left = pq.top();
      pq.pop();
      auto right = pq.top();
      pq.pop();
      auto node = new TreeNode('\0', left-&gt;freq + right-&gt;freq, left, right);
      pq.emplace(node);
    }
    root = pq.top();
    return root;
  }
};"><pre><span class="pl-k">struct</span> <span class="pl-en">TreeNode</span> {
  <span class="pl-k">char</span> ch;
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> freq;
  TreeNode *left{};
  TreeNode *right{};
  <span class="pl-en">TreeNode</span>() : ch(<span class="pl-c1">0</span>), freq(<span class="pl-c1">0</span>) {}
  <span class="pl-en">TreeNode</span>(<span class="pl-k">char</span> ch, <span class="pl-k">int</span> freq) : ch(ch), freq(freq) {}
  <span class="pl-en">TreeNode</span>(<span class="pl-k">char</span> ch, <span class="pl-k">int</span> freq, TreeNode *left, TreeNode *right)
      : ch(ch), freq(freq), left(left), right(right) {}
};
<span class="pl-k">class</span> <span class="pl-en">HuffmanTree</span> {
<span class="pl-k">private:</span>
  <span class="pl-k">struct</span> <span class="pl-en">CompareNode</span> {
    <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">operator</span>()(TreeNode *a, TreeNode *b) -&gt; bool {
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (a-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">freq</span> != b-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">freq</span>) {
        <span class="pl-k">return</span> a-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">freq</span> &gt; b-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">freq</span>;
      }
      <span class="pl-k">return</span> a-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">ch</span> &gt; b-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">ch</span>;
    }
  };
  std::priority_queue&lt;TreeNode *, std::vector&lt;TreeNode *&gt;, CompareNode&gt; pq;
  TreeNode *root{};
<span class="pl-k">public:</span>
  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">build_huffman_tree</span>(<span class="pl-k">const</span> std::vector&lt;std::pair&lt;<span class="pl-k">char</span>, <span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;&gt; &amp;char_set)
      -&gt; TreeNode * {
    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> &amp;&amp;x : char_set) {
      pq.<span class="pl-c1">emplace</span>(<span class="pl-k">new</span> <span class="pl-c1">TreeNode</span>(x.<span class="pl-smi">first</span>, x.<span class="pl-smi">second</span>));
    }
    <span class="pl-k">while</span> (pq.<span class="pl-c1">size</span>() &gt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>) {
      <span class="pl-k">auto</span> left = pq.<span class="pl-c1">top</span>();
      pq.<span class="pl-c1">pop</span>();
      <span class="pl-k">auto</span> right = pq.<span class="pl-c1">top</span>();
      pq.<span class="pl-c1">pop</span>();
      <span class="pl-k">auto</span> node = <span class="pl-k">new</span> <span class="pl-c1">TreeNode</span>(<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span><span class="pl-cce">\0</span><span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>, left-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">freq</span> + right-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">freq</span>, left, right);
      pq.<span class="pl-c1">emplace</span>(node);
    }
    root = pq.<span class="pl-c1">top</span>();
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> root;
  }
};</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">BST</h3><a id="user-content-bst" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: BST" href="#bst"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">二叉搜索树依赖于这样一个性质：小于父节点的键都在左子树中，大于父节点的键则都在右子树中。我们称这个性质为二叉搜索性。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="struct BSTNode {
  char value;
  BSTNode *left{};
  BSTNode *right{};
  explicit BSTNode(char value) : value(value) {}
};

class TreeUtils {
private:
  auto insertNode(BSTNode *root, char value) -&gt; BSTNode * {
    if (!root)
      return new BSTNode(value);
    if (value &lt; root-&gt;value)
      root-&gt;left = insertNode(root-&gt;left, value);
    else
      root-&gt;right = insertNode(root-&gt;right, value);
    return root;
  }
public:
  auto buildBST(const std::string &amp;leaves) -&gt; BSTNode * {
    if (leaves.empty())
      return nullptr;
    BSTNode *root = nullptr;
    for (int i = static_cast&lt;int&gt;(leaves.size()) - 1; i &gt;= 0; --i)
      root = insertNode(root, leaves[i]);
    return root;
  }
};"><pre><span class="pl-k">struct</span> <span class="pl-en">BSTNode</span> {
  <span class="pl-k">char</span> value;
  BSTNode *left{};
  BSTNode *right{};
  <span class="pl-k">explicit</span> <span class="pl-en">BSTNode</span>(<span class="pl-k">char</span> value) : value(value) {}
};

<span class="pl-k">class</span> <span class="pl-en">TreeUtils</span> {
<span class="pl-k">private:</span>
  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">insertNode</span>(BSTNode *root, <span class="pl-k">char</span> value) -&gt; BSTNode * {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!root)
      <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-k">new</span> <span class="pl-c1">BSTNode</span>(value);
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (value &lt; root-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">value</span>)
      root-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">left</span> = <span class="pl-c1">insertNode</span>(root-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">left</span>, value);
    <span class="pl-k">else</span>
      root-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">right</span> = <span class="pl-c1">insertNode</span>(root-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">right</span>, value);
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> root;
  }
<span class="pl-k">public:</span>
  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">buildBST</span>(<span class="pl-k">const</span> std::string &amp;leaves) -&gt; BSTNode * {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (leaves.<span class="pl-c1">empty</span>())
      <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">nullptr</span>;
    BSTNode *root = <span class="pl-c1">nullptr</span>;
    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-k">static_cast</span>&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;(leaves.<span class="pl-c1">size</span>()) - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; i &gt;= <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; --i)
      root = <span class="pl-c1">insertNode</span>(root, leaves[i]);
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> root;
  }
};</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">字典树 (Trie)</h3><a id="user-content-字典树-trie" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 字典树 (Trie)" href="#字典树-trie"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="class Trie {
private:
  struct TrieNode {
    std::array&lt;TrieNode *, 26&gt; children{};
    int word_count = 0;
    uint32_t child_mask = 0;
  };

  TrieNode *root{};

  auto _erase_recursive(TrieNode *current, const std::string &amp;word,
                        size_t index, bool &amp;erased) -&gt; bool {
    if (!current) {
      return false;
    }

    if (index == word.size()) {
      if (current-&gt;word_count == 0) {
        return false;
      }
      --current-&gt;word_count;
      erased = true;
      return current-&gt;word_count == 0 &amp;&amp; !current-&gt;child_mask;
    }

    const int char_idx = word[index] - 'a';
    auto node = current-&gt;children[char_idx];

    if (!node) {
      return false;
    }

    if (_erase_recursive(node, word, index + 1, erased)) {
      delete node;
      current-&gt;children[char_idx] = nullptr;
      current-&gt;child_mask &amp;= ~(1 &lt;&lt; char_idx);
      return current-&gt;word_count == 0 &amp;&amp; !current-&gt;child_mask;
    }

    return false;
  }

  auto _clean(TrieNode *node) -&gt; void {
    if (!node)
      return;

    auto mask = node-&gt;child_mask;
    while (mask) {
      _clean(node-&gt;children[__builtin_ctz(mask)]);
      mask &amp;= (mask - 1);
    }
    delete node;
  }

public:
  Trie() : root(new TrieNode()) {}

  ~Trie() { _clean(root); }

  auto insert(const std::string &amp;word) -&gt; void {
    auto current = root;

    for (auto &amp;&amp;c : word) {
      const int index = c - 'a';
      if (!current-&gt;children[index]) {
        current-&gt;children[index] = new TrieNode();
        current-&gt;child_mask |= (1 &lt;&lt; index);
      }
      current = current-&gt;children[index];
    }
    ++current-&gt;word_count;
  }

  auto search(const std::string &amp;word) -&gt; bool {
    if (!root)
      return false;

    auto current = root;

    for (auto &amp;&amp;c : word) {
      const int index = c - 'a';
      if (!current-&gt;children[index]) {
        return false;
      }
      current = current-&gt;children[index];
    }
    return current-&gt;word_count &gt; 0;
  }

  auto startsWith(const std::string &amp;prefix) -&gt; bool {
    if (!root)
      return false;

    auto current = root;

    for (auto &amp;&amp;c : prefix) {
      const int index = c - 'a';
      if (!current-&gt;children[index]) {
        return false;
      }
      current = current-&gt;children[index];
    }
    return true;
  }

  auto erase(const std::string &amp;word) -&gt; bool {
    bool erased = false;
    _erase_recursive(root, word, 0, erased);
    return erased;
  }
};"><pre><span class="pl-k">class</span> <span class="pl-en">Trie</span> {
<span class="pl-k">private:</span>
  <span class="pl-k">struct</span> <span class="pl-en">TrieNode</span> {
    std::array&lt;TrieNode *, <span class="pl-c1">26</span>&gt; children{};
    <span class="pl-k">int</span> word_count = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
    <span class="pl-c1">uint32_t</span> child_mask = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
  };

  TrieNode *root{};

  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">_erase_recursive</span>(TrieNode *current, <span class="pl-k">const</span> std::string &amp;word,
                        <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> index, <span class="pl-k">bool</span> &amp;erased) -&gt; bool {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!current) {
      <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;
    }

    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (index == word.<span class="pl-c1">size</span>()) {
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (current-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">word_count</span> == <span class="pl-c1">0</span>) {
        <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;
      }
      --current-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">word_count</span>;
      erased = <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
      <span class="pl-k">return</span> current-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">word_count</span> == <span class="pl-c1">0</span> &amp;&amp; !current-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">child_mask</span>;
    }

    <span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-k">int</span> char_idx = word[index] - <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>a<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>;
    <span class="pl-k">auto</span> node = current-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">children</span>[char_idx];

    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!node) {
      <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;
    }

    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (<span class="pl-c1">_erase_recursive</span>(node, word, index + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, erased)) {
      <span class="pl-k">delete</span> node;
      current-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">children</span>[char_idx] = <span class="pl-c1">nullptr</span>;
      current-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">child_mask</span> &amp;= ~(<span class="pl-c1">1</span> &lt;&lt; char_idx);
      <span class="pl-k">return</span> current-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">word_count</span> == <span class="pl-c1">0</span> &amp;&amp; !current-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">child_mask</span>;
    }

    <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;
  }

  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">_clean</span>(TrieNode *node) -&gt; void {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!node)
      <span class="pl-k">return</span>;

    <span class="pl-k">auto</span> mask = node-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">child_mask</span>;
    <span class="pl-k">while</span> (mask) {
      <span class="pl-c1">_clean</span>(node-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">children</span>[<span class="pl-c1">__builtin_ctz</span>(mask)]);
      mask &amp;= (mask - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>);
    }
    <span class="pl-k">delete</span> node;
  }

<span class="pl-k">public:</span>
  <span class="pl-en">Trie</span>() : root(<span class="pl-k">new</span> TrieNode()) {}

  <span class="pl-en">~Trie</span>() { <span class="pl-c1">_clean</span>(root); }

  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">insert</span>(<span class="pl-k">const</span> std::string &amp;word) -&gt; void {
    <span class="pl-k">auto</span> current = root;

    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> &amp;&amp;c : word) {
      <span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-k">int</span> index = c - <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>a<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>;
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!current-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">children</span>[index]) {
        current-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">children</span>[index] = <span class="pl-k">new</span> <span class="pl-c1">TrieNode</span>();
        current-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">child_mask</span> |= (<span class="pl-c1">1</span> &lt;&lt; index);
      }
      current = current-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">children</span>[index];
    }
    ++current-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">word_count</span>;
  }

  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">search</span>(<span class="pl-k">const</span> std::string &amp;word) -&gt; bool {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!root)
      <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;

    <span class="pl-k">auto</span> current = root;

    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> &amp;&amp;c : word) {
      <span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-k">int</span> index = c - <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>a<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>;
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!current-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">children</span>[index]) {
        <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;
      }
      current = current-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">children</span>[index];
    }
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> current-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">word_count</span> &gt; <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
  }

  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">startsWith</span>(<span class="pl-k">const</span> std::string &amp;prefix) -&gt; bool {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!root)
      <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;

    <span class="pl-k">auto</span> current = root;

    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> &amp;&amp;c : prefix) {
      <span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-k">int</span> index = c - <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>a<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>;
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!current-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">children</span>[index]) {
        <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;
      }
      current = current-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">children</span>[index];
    }
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
  }

  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">erase</span>(<span class="pl-k">const</span> std::string &amp;word) -&gt; bool {
    <span class="pl-k">bool</span> erased = <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;
    <span class="pl-c1">_erase_recursive</span>(root, word, <span class="pl-c1">0</span>, erased);
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> erased;
  }
};</pre></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>例：LC 421.数组中两个数的最大异或值</li>
</ul>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="class Solution {
  struct TrieNode {
    TrieNode *left{};
    TrieNode *right{};
    TrieNode() = default;
  };

  TrieNode *root = new TrieNode();
  constexpr static int HIGH_BIT = 30;

  auto add(int num) -&gt; void {
    auto curr = root;
    for (int k = HIGH_BIT; k &gt;= 0; --k) {
      int bit = (num &gt;&gt; k) &amp; 1;
      if (!bit) {
        if (!curr-&gt;left) {
          curr-&gt;left = new TrieNode();
        }
        curr = curr-&gt;left;
      } else {
        if (!curr-&gt;right) {
          curr-&gt;right = new TrieNode();
        }
        curr = curr-&gt;right;
      }
    }
  }

  auto check(int num) -&gt; int {
    int x = 0;
    auto curr = root;
    for (int k = HIGH_BIT; k &gt;= 0; --k) {
      int bit = (num &gt;&gt; k) &amp; 1;
      if (!bit) {
        if (curr-&gt;right) {
          curr = curr-&gt;right;
          x = x &lt;&lt; 1 | 1;
        } else {
          curr = curr-&gt;left;
          x &lt;&lt;= 1;
        }
      } else {
        if (curr-&gt;left) {
          curr = curr-&gt;left;
          x = x &lt;&lt; 1 | 1;
        } else {
          curr = curr-&gt;right;
          x &lt;&lt;= 1;
        }
      }
    }
    return x;
  }

public:
  auto findMaximumXOR(std::vector&lt;int&gt; &amp;nums) -&gt; int {
    int n = nums.size();
    int maxXOR = 0;
    for (int i = 1; i &lt; n; ++i) {
      add(nums[i - 1]);
      maxXOR = std::max(maxXOR, check(nums[i]));
    }
    return maxXOR;
  }
};"><pre><span class="pl-k">class</span> <span class="pl-en">Solution</span> {
  <span class="pl-k">struct</span> <span class="pl-en">TrieNode</span> {
    TrieNode *left{};
    TrieNode *right{};
    <span class="pl-en">TrieNode</span>() = <span class="pl-k">default</span>;
  };

  TrieNode *root = <span class="pl-k">new</span> TrieNode();
  <span class="pl-k">constexpr</span> <span class="pl-k">static</span> <span class="pl-k">int</span> HIGH_BIT = <span class="pl-c1">30</span>;

  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">add</span>(<span class="pl-k">int</span> num) -&gt; void {
    <span class="pl-k">auto</span> curr = root;
    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> k = HIGH_BIT; k &gt;= <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; --k) {
      <span class="pl-k">int</span> bit = (num &gt;&gt; k) &amp; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!bit) {
        <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!curr-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">left</span>) {
          curr-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">left</span> = <span class="pl-k">new</span> <span class="pl-c1">TrieNode</span>();
        }
        curr = curr-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">left</span>;
      } <span class="pl-k">else</span> {
        <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!curr-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">right</span>) {
          curr-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">right</span> = <span class="pl-k">new</span> <span class="pl-c1">TrieNode</span>();
        }
        curr = curr-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">right</span>;
      }
    }
  }

  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">check</span>(<span class="pl-k">int</span> num) -&gt; int {
    <span class="pl-k">int</span> x = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
    <span class="pl-k">auto</span> curr = root;
    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> k = HIGH_BIT; k &gt;= <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; --k) {
      <span class="pl-k">int</span> bit = (num &gt;&gt; k) &amp; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!bit) {
        <span class="pl-k">if</span> (curr-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">right</span>) {
          curr = curr-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">right</span>;
          x = x &lt;&lt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span> | <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
        } <span class="pl-k">else</span> {
          curr = curr-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">left</span>;
          x &lt;&lt;= <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
        }
      } <span class="pl-k">else</span> {
        <span class="pl-k">if</span> (curr-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">left</span>) {
          curr = curr-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">left</span>;
          x = x &lt;&lt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span> | <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
        } <span class="pl-k">else</span> {
          curr = curr-&gt;<span class="pl-smi">right</span>;
          x &lt;&lt;= <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
        }
      }
    }
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> x;
  }

<span class="pl-k">public:</span>
  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">findMaximumXOR</span>(std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; &amp;nums) -&gt; int {
    <span class="pl-k">int</span> n = nums.<span class="pl-c1">size</span>();
    <span class="pl-k">int</span> maxXOR = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; i &lt; n; ++i) {
      <span class="pl-c1">add</span>(nums[i - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>]);
      maxXOR = <span class="pl-c1">std::max</span>(maxXOR, <span class="pl-c1">check</span>(nums[i]));
    }
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> maxXOR;
  }
};</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">并查集</h3><a id="user-content-并查集" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 并查集" href="#并查集"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">模板</h4><a id="user-content-模板" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 模板" href="#模板"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="class DisjSet {
private:
  std::vector&lt;int&gt; parent;
  std::vector&lt;int&gt; rank;

public:
  explicit DisjSet(int n) : parent(n), rank(n, 0) {
    for (int i = 0; i &lt; n; ++i) {
      parent[i] = i;
    }
  }

  auto find(int x) -&gt; int {
    return parent[x] == x ? x : parent[x] = find(parent[x]);
  }

  auto unite(int x, int y) -&gt; bool {
    int root_x = find(x);
    int root_y = find(y);

    if (root_x == root_y) {
      return false;
    }

    if (rank[root_x] &gt; rank[root_y]) {
      parent[root_y] = root_x;
    } else if (rank[root_x] &lt; rank[root_y]) {
      parent[root_x] = root_y;
    } else {
      parent[root_y] = root_x;
      ++rank[root_x];
    }
    return true;
  }
};"><pre><span class="pl-k">class</span> <span class="pl-en">DisjSet</span> {
<span class="pl-k">private:</span>
  std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; parent;
  std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; rank;

<span class="pl-k">public:</span>
  <span class="pl-k">explicit</span> <span class="pl-en">DisjSet</span>(<span class="pl-k">int</span> n) : parent(n), rank(n, <span class="pl-c1">0</span>) {
    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; i &lt; n; ++i) {
      parent[i] = i;
    }
  }

  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">find</span>(<span class="pl-k">int</span> x) -&gt; int {
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> parent[x] == x ? x : parent[x] = <span class="pl-c1">find</span>(parent[x]);
  }

  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">unite</span>(<span class="pl-k">int</span> x, <span class="pl-k">int</span> y) -&gt; bool {
    <span class="pl-k">int</span> root_x = <span class="pl-c1">find</span>(x);
    <span class="pl-k">int</span> root_y = <span class="pl-c1">find</span>(y);

    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (root_x == root_y) {
      <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;
    }

    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (rank[root_x] &gt; rank[root_y]) {
      parent[root_y] = root_x;
    } <span class="pl-k">else</span> <span class="pl-k">if</span> (rank[root_x] &lt; rank[root_y]) {
      parent[root_x] = root_y;
    } <span class="pl-k">else</span> {
      parent[root_y] = root_x;
      ++rank[root_x];
    }
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
  }
};</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">扩展并查集</h4><a id="user-content-扩展并查集" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 扩展并查集" href="#扩展并查集"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="DisjSet dsu(3 * n);
auto self = [&amp;](int x) { return x; };
auto eat = [&amp;](int x) { return x + n; };
auto eaten = [&amp;](int x) { return x + 2 * n; };

// x 与 y 同类
if (dsu.find(eat(x)) == dsu.find(self(y)) ||
    dsu.find(self(x)) == dsu.find(eat(y))) {
  // 矛盾
} else {
  dsu.unite(self(x), self(y));
  dsu.unite(eat(x), eat(y));
  dsu.unite(eaten(x), eaten(y));
}

// x 吃 y
if (dsu.find(self(x)) == dsu.find(self(y)) ||
    dsu.find(eaten(x)) == dsu.find(self(y))) {
  // 矛盾
} else {
  dsu.unite(eat(x), self(y));
  dsu.unite(self(x), eaten(y));
  dsu.unite(eaten(x), eat(y));
}"><pre>DisjSet <span class="pl-en">dsu</span>(<span class="pl-c1">3</span> * n);
<span class="pl-k">auto</span> self = [&amp;](<span class="pl-k">int</span> x) { <span class="pl-k">return</span> x; };
<span class="pl-k">auto</span> eat = [&amp;](<span class="pl-k">int</span> x) { <span class="pl-k">return</span> x + n; };
<span class="pl-k">auto</span> eaten = [&amp;](<span class="pl-k">int</span> x) { <span class="pl-k">return</span> x + <span class="pl-c1">2</span> * n; };

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> x 与 y 同类</span>
<span class="pl-k">if</span> (dsu.find(eat(x)) == dsu.find(self(y)) ||
    dsu.find(self(x)) == dsu.find(eat(y))) {
  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 矛盾</span>
} <span class="pl-k">else</span> {
  dsu.<span class="pl-c1">unite</span>(<span class="pl-c1">self</span>(x), <span class="pl-c1">self</span>(y));
  dsu.<span class="pl-c1">unite</span>(<span class="pl-c1">eat</span>(x), <span class="pl-c1">eat</span>(y));
  dsu.<span class="pl-c1">unite</span>(<span class="pl-c1">eaten</span>(x), <span class="pl-c1">eaten</span>(y));
}

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> x 吃 y</span>
<span class="pl-k">if</span> (dsu.find(self(x)) == dsu.find(self(y)) ||
    dsu.find(eaten(x)) == dsu.find(self(y))) {
  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 矛盾</span>
} <span class="pl-k">else</span> {
  dsu.<span class="pl-c1">unite</span>(<span class="pl-c1">eat</span>(x), <span class="pl-c1">self</span>(y));
  dsu.<span class="pl-c1">unite</span>(<span class="pl-c1">self</span>(x), <span class="pl-c1">eaten</span>(y));
  dsu.<span class="pl-c1">unite</span>(<span class="pl-c1">eaten</span>(x), <span class="pl-c1">eat</span>(y));
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">扩展并查集应用：</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>三倍域：<code>x</code>、<code>x + n</code>、<code>x + 2n</code> 分别表示不同关系类。常用于食物链：同类、捕食、被捕食。</li>
<li>二倍域：<code>x</code> 和 <code>x + n</code> 表示相反关系。常用于敌友关系、二分图染色、奇偶约束。</li>
<li>带权并查集：维护 <code>dist[x] = x 到 parent[x] 的关系值</code>，适合关系可以用模数表示的题。</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">带权并查集</h4><a id="user-content-带权并查集" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 带权并查集" href="#带权并查集"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><code>dist[x]</code> 表示 <code>x</code> 到根的关系值，关系在 <code>mod</code> 下运算。若要加入约束 <code>x - y = w (mod mod)</code>：</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="class WeightedDSU {
private:
  int mod;
  std::vector&lt;int&gt; parent, dist; // dist[x]: x 到 parent[x] 的关系

public:
  explicit WeightedDSU(int n, int mod) : mod(mod), parent(n), dist(n, 0) {
    std::iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);
  }

  auto find(int x) -&gt; int {
    if (parent[x] == x)
      return x;
    int old_parent = parent[x];
    parent[x] = find(parent[x]);
    dist[x] = (dist[x] + dist[old_parent]) % mod;
    return parent[x];
  }

  auto unite(int x, int y, int w) -&gt; bool {
    int root_x = find(x), root_y = find(y);
    if (root_x == root_y)
      return ((dist[x] - dist[y] - w) % mod + mod) % mod == 0;

    parent[root_x] = root_y;
    dist[root_x] = ((w + dist[y] - dist[x]) % mod + mod) % mod;
    return true;
  }
};"><pre><span class="pl-k">class</span> <span class="pl-en">WeightedDSU</span> {
<span class="pl-k">private:</span>
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> mod;
  std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; parent, dist; <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> dist[x]: x 到 parent[x] 的关系</span>

<span class="pl-k">public:</span>
  <span class="pl-k">explicit</span> <span class="pl-en">WeightedDSU</span>(<span class="pl-k">int</span> n, <span class="pl-k">int</span> mod) : mod(mod), parent(n), dist(n, <span class="pl-c1">0</span>) {
    <span class="pl-c1">std::iota</span>(parent.<span class="pl-c1">begin</span>(), parent.<span class="pl-c1">end</span>(), <span class="pl-c1">0</span>);
  }

  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">find</span>(<span class="pl-k">int</span> x) -&gt; int {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (parent[x] == x)
      <span class="pl-k">return</span> x;
    <span class="pl-k">int</span> old_parent = parent[x];
    parent[x] = <span class="pl-c1">find</span>(parent[x]);
    dist[x] = (dist[x] + dist[old_parent]) % mod;
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> parent[x];
  }

  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">unite</span>(<span class="pl-k">int</span> x, <span class="pl-k">int</span> y, <span class="pl-k">int</span> w) -&gt; bool {
    <span class="pl-k">int</span> root_x = <span class="pl-c1">find</span>(x), root_y = <span class="pl-c1">find</span>(y);
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (root_x == root_y)
      <span class="pl-k">return</span> ((dist[x] - dist[y] - w) % mod + mod) % mod == <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;

    parent[root_x] = root_y;
    dist[root_x] = ((w + dist[y] - dist[x]) % mod + mod) % mod;
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
  }
};</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">应用换算：</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>奇偶/二分关系：<code>mod = 2</code>，同色 <code>w = 0</code>，异色 <code>w = 1</code>。</li>
<li>食物链：<code>mod = 3</code>，同类 <code>w = 0</code>，<code>x</code> 吃 <code>y</code> 可设 <code>w = 1</code>，<code>x</code> 被 <code>y</code> 吃可设 <code>w = 2</code>。</li>
<li>距离差约束：不用取模时，把 <code>% mod</code> 去掉，<code>dist</code> 用 <code>long long</code>。</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">线段树</h3><a id="user-content-线段树" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 线段树" href="#线段树"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">模板</h4><a id="user-content-模板-1" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 模板" href="#模板-1"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="class SegTree {
private:
  int n;
  const int default_val = 0;
  std::vector&lt;int&gt; tree;

public:
  SegTree(const std::vector&lt;int&gt; &amp;data)
      : n(data.size()), tree(2 * n, 0) {
    for (int i = 0; i &lt; n; ++i) {
      tree[i + n] = data[i];
    }
    for (int i = n - 1; i &gt; 0; --i) {
      tree[i] = tree[i &lt;&lt; 1] + tree[i &lt;&lt; 1 | 1];
    }
  }

  auto update(int i, int value) -&gt; void {
    i += n;
    tree[i] = value;

    while (i &gt; 1) {
      tree[i &gt;&gt; 1] = tree[i] + tree[i ^ 1];
      i &gt;&gt;= 1;
    }
  }

  auto sumRange(int l, int r) -&gt; int {
    int res = default_val;
    l += n;
    r += n + 1;

    while (l &lt; r) {
      if (l &amp; 1) {
        res = res + tree[l++];
      }
      if (r &amp; 1) {
        res = res + tree[--r];
      }
      l &gt;&gt;= 1;
      r &gt;&gt;= 1;
    }
    return res;
  }
};"><pre><span class="pl-k">class</span> <span class="pl-en">SegTree</span> {
<span class="pl-k">private:</span>
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> n;
  <span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-k">int</span> default_val = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
  std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; tree;

<span class="pl-k">public:</span>
  <span class="pl-en">SegTree</span>(<span class="pl-k">const</span> std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; &amp;data)
      : n(data.size()), tree(<span class="pl-c1">2</span> * n, <span class="pl-c1">0</span>) {
    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; i &lt; n; ++i) {
      tree[i + n] = data[i];
    }
    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = n - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; i &gt; <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; --i) {
      tree[i] = tree[i &lt;&lt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>] + tree[i &lt;&lt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span> | <span class="pl-c1">1</span>];
    }
  }

  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">update</span>(<span class="pl-k">int</span> i, <span class="pl-k">int</span> value) -&gt; void {
    i += n;
    tree[i] = value;

    <span class="pl-k">while</span> (i &gt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>) {
      tree[i &gt;&gt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>] = tree[i] + tree[i ^ <span class="pl-c1">1</span>];
      i &gt;&gt;= <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
    }
  }

  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">sumRange</span>(<span class="pl-k">int</span> l, <span class="pl-k">int</span> r) -&gt; int {
    <span class="pl-k">int</span> res = default_val;
    l += n;
    r += n + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;

    <span class="pl-k">while</span> (l &lt; r) {
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (l &amp; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>) {
        res = res + tree[l++];
      }
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (r &amp; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>) {
        res = res + tree[--r];
      }
      l &gt;&gt;= <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
      r &gt;&gt;= <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
    }
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> res;
  }
};</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">区间开闭和自定义点</h4><a id="user-content-区间开闭和自定义点" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 区间开闭和自定义点" href="#区间开闭和自定义点"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">递归线段树：</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>对外接口：通常传 0-index 闭区间 <code>[l, r]</code>。</li>
<li>节点区间：<code>[start, end]</code>，也是闭区间。</li>
<li>分裂方式：左儿子 <code>[start, mid]</code>，右儿子 <code>[mid + 1, end]</code>。</li>
<li>判断覆盖：<code>l &lt;= start &amp;&amp; end &lt;= r</code>。</li>
<li>判断进左儿子：<code>l &lt;= mid</code>；判断进右儿子：<code>r &gt; mid</code>。</li>
<li>如果题目输入是 1-index <code>[l, r]</code>，调用时改成 <code>[l - 1, r - 1]</code>。</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">zkw / 迭代线段树：</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>对外接口：也可以设计成 0-index 闭区间 <code>[l, r]</code>。</li>
<li>内部会转成半开区间 <code>[left, right)</code>：
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="size_t left = l + base;
size_t right = r + base + 1;
while (left &lt; right) { ... }"><pre><span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> left = l + base;
<span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> right = r + base + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
<span class="pl-k">while</span> (left &lt; right) { ... }</pre></div>
</li>
<li>如果本来就想传半开区间 <code>[l, r)</code>，则写成 <code>right = r + base</code>。</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">可自定义的地方：</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Type</code>：节点值和懒标记类型，可能要用 <code>long long</code>。</li>
<li><code>func</code>：左右儿子的合并方式，如 <code>sum / max / min / gcd</code>。</li>
<li><code>query_default</code>：查询单位元。<code>sum = 0</code>，<code>max = -inf</code>，<code>min = +inf</code>。</li>
<li><code>lazy_default</code>：空懒标记。区间加法通常是 <code>0</code>。</li>
<li><code>_apply</code>：整段更新如何影响 <code>tree[p]</code> 和 <code>lazy[p]</code>。</li>
<li><code>_push</code>：父节点懒标记如何下传给左右儿子。</li>
<li><code>_pull</code>：子节点变化后，如何重新计算父节点。</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">常见 <code>_apply</code>：</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="// 区间加 + 区间最大值：最大值整体加 value，不需要 len
tree[p] += value;
lazy[p] += value;

// 区间加 + 区间和：整段和增加 value * len
tree[p] += value * len;
lazy[p] += value;

// 区间赋值 + 区间和：懒标记是覆盖，不是累加
tree[p] = value * len;
lazy[p] = value;
has_lazy[p] = true;"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 区间加 + 区间最大值：最大值整体加 value，不需要 len</span>
tree[p] += value;
lazy[p] += value;

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 区间加 + 区间和：整段和增加 value * len</span>
tree[p] += value * len;
lazy[p] += value;

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 区间赋值 + 区间和：懒标记是覆盖，不是累加</span>
tree[p] = value * len;
lazy[p] = value;
has_lazy[p] = <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">区间加法+最大值查询 懒标记线段树</h4><a id="user-content-区间加法最大值查询-懒标记线段树" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 区间加法+最大值查询 懒标记线段树" href="#区间加法最大值查询-懒标记线段树"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">递归版，接口是 0-index 闭区间 <code>[l, r]</code>。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="template &lt;typename Type, typename Func&gt; class LazySegTree {
private:
  size_t n;
  Type default_val;
  Func func;
  std::vector&lt;Type&gt; tree;
  std::vector&lt;Type&gt; lazy;
  std::vector&lt;bool&gt; has_lazy;

  auto _perc_down(size_t node, size_t start, size_t end) -&gt; void {
    if (has_lazy[node]) {
      const auto left = node &lt;&lt; 1;
      const auto right = node &lt;&lt; 1 | 1;

      lazy[left] += lazy[node];
      has_lazy[left] = true;
      tree[left] += lazy[node];

      lazy[right] += lazy[node];
      has_lazy[right] = true;
      tree[right] += lazy[node];

      lazy[node] = default_val;
      has_lazy[node] = false;
    }
  }

  auto _build(const std::vector&lt;Type&gt; &amp;data, size_t node, size_t start,
              size_t end) -&gt; void {
    if (start == end) {
      tree[node] = data[start];
      return;
    }

    const auto mid = start + ((end - start) &gt;&gt; 1);
    _build(data, node &lt;&lt; 1, start, mid);
    _build(data, node &lt;&lt; 1 | 1, mid + 1, end);

    tree[node] = func(tree[node &lt;&lt; 1], tree[node &lt;&lt; 1 | 1]);
  }

  auto _update_range(size_t node, size_t start, size_t end, size_t l, size_t r,
                     Type value) -&gt; void {
    if (l &lt;= start &amp;&amp; end &lt;= r) {
      lazy[node] += value;
      has_lazy[node] = true;
      tree[node] += value;
      return;
    }

    _perc_down(node, start, end);

    const auto mid = start + ((end - start) &gt;&gt; 1);
    if (l &lt;= mid) {
      _update_range(node &lt;&lt; 1, start, mid, l, r, value);
    }
    if (r &gt; mid) {
      _update_range(node &lt;&lt; 1 | 1, mid + 1, end, l, r, value);
    }

    tree[node] = func(tree[node &lt;&lt; 1], tree[node &lt;&lt; 1 | 1]);
  }

  auto _query_range(size_t node, size_t start, size_t end, size_t l, size_t r)
      -&gt; Type {
    if (l &lt;= start &amp;&amp; end &lt;= r) {
      return tree[node];
    }

    _perc_down(node, start, end);
    const auto mid = start + ((end - start) &gt;&gt; 1);
    if (r &lt;= mid) {
      return _query_range(node &lt;&lt; 1, start, mid, l, r);
    }
    if (l &gt; mid) {
      return _query_range(node &lt;&lt; 1 | 1, mid + 1, end, l, r);
    }

    return func(_query_range(node &lt;&lt; 1, start, mid, l, r),
                _query_range(node &lt;&lt; 1 | 1, mid + 1, end, l, r));
  }

public:
  explicit LazySegTree(const std::vector&lt;Type&gt; &amp;data, Func func = Func{},
                       const Type &amp;de = Type())
      : n(data.size()), default_val(de), func(func) {
    tree.assign(4 * n, default_val);
    lazy.assign(4 * n, default_val);
    has_lazy.assign(4 * n, false);
    _build(data, 1, 0, n - 1);
  }

  auto update_range(size_t l, size_t r, Type value) -&gt; void {
    _update_range(1, 0, n - 1, l, r, value);
  }

  auto query_range(size_t l, size_t r) -&gt; Type {
    return _query_range(1, 0, n - 1, l, r);
  }
};"><pre><span class="pl-k">template </span>&lt;<span class="pl-k">typename</span> Type, <span class="pl-k">typename</span> Func&gt; <span class="pl-k">class</span> <span class="pl-en">LazySegTree</span> {
<span class="pl-k">private:</span>
  <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> n;
  Type default_val;
  Func func;
  std::vector&lt;Type&gt; tree;
  std::vector&lt;Type&gt; lazy;
  std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">bool</span>&gt; has_lazy;

  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">_perc_down</span>(<span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> node, <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> start, <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> end) -&gt; void {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (has_lazy[node]) {
      <span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-k">auto</span> left = node &lt;&lt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
      <span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-k">auto</span> right = node &lt;&lt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span> | <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;

      lazy[left] += lazy[node];
      has_lazy[left] = <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
      tree[left] += lazy[node];

      lazy[right] += lazy[node];
      has_lazy[right] = <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
      tree[right] += lazy[node];

      lazy[node] = default_val;
      has_lazy[node] = <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;
    }
  }

  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">_build</span>(<span class="pl-k">const</span> std::vector&lt;Type&gt; &amp;data, <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> node, <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> start,
              <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> end) -&gt; void {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (start == end) {
      tree[node] = data[start];
      <span class="pl-k">return</span>;
    }

    <span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-k">auto</span> mid = start + ((end - start) &gt;&gt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>);
    <span class="pl-c1">_build</span>(data, node &lt;&lt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, start, mid);
    <span class="pl-c1">_build</span>(data, node &lt;&lt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span> | <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, mid + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, end);

    tree[node] = <span class="pl-c1">func</span>(tree[node &lt;&lt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>], tree[node &lt;&lt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span> | <span class="pl-c1">1</span>]);
  }

  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">_update_range</span>(<span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> node, <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> start, <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> end, <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> l, <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> r,
                     Type value) -&gt; void {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (l &lt;= start &amp;&amp; end &lt;= r) {
      lazy[node] += value;
      has_lazy[node] = <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
      tree[node] += value;
      <span class="pl-k">return</span>;
    }

    <span class="pl-c1">_perc_down</span>(node, start, end);

    <span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-k">auto</span> mid = start + ((end - start) &gt;&gt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>);
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (l &lt;= mid) {
      <span class="pl-c1">_update_range</span>(node &lt;&lt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, start, mid, l, r, value);
    }
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (r &gt; mid) {
      <span class="pl-c1">_update_range</span>(node &lt;&lt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span> | <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, mid + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, end, l, r, value);
    }

    tree[node] = <span class="pl-c1">func</span>(tree[node &lt;&lt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>], tree[node &lt;&lt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span> | <span class="pl-c1">1</span>]);
  }

  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">_query_range</span>(<span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> node, <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> start, <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> end, <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> l, <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> r)
      -&gt; Type {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (l &lt;= start &amp;&amp; end &lt;= r) {
      <span class="pl-k">return</span> tree[node];
    }

    <span class="pl-c1">_perc_down</span>(node, start, end);
    <span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-k">auto</span> mid = start + ((end - start) &gt;&gt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>);
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (r &lt;= mid) {
      <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">_query_range</span>(node &lt;&lt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, start, mid, l, r);
    }
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (l &gt; mid) {
      <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">_query_range</span>(node &lt;&lt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span> | <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, mid + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, end, l, r);
    }

    <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">func</span>(<span class="pl-c1">_query_range</span>(node &lt;&lt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, start, mid, l, r),
                <span class="pl-c1">_query_range</span>(node &lt;&lt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span> | <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, mid + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, end, l, r));
  }

<span class="pl-k">public:</span>
  <span class="pl-k">explicit</span> <span class="pl-en">LazySegTree</span>(<span class="pl-k">const</span> std::vector&lt;Type&gt; &amp;data, Func func = Func{},
                       <span class="pl-k">const</span> Type &amp;de = Type())
      : n(data.size()), default_val(de), func(func) {
    tree.<span class="pl-c1">assign</span>(<span class="pl-c1">4</span> * n, default_val);
    lazy.<span class="pl-c1">assign</span>(<span class="pl-c1">4</span> * n, default_val);
    has_lazy.<span class="pl-c1">assign</span>(<span class="pl-c1">4</span> * n, <span class="pl-c1">false</span>);
    <span class="pl-c1">_build</span>(data, <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, <span class="pl-c1">0</span>, n - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>);
  }

  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">update_range</span>(<span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> l, <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> r, Type value) -&gt; void {
    <span class="pl-c1">_update_range</span>(<span class="pl-c1">1</span>, <span class="pl-c1">0</span>, n - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, l, r, value);
  }

  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">query_range</span>(<span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> l, <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> r) -&gt; Type {
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">_query_range</span>(<span class="pl-c1">1</span>, <span class="pl-c1">0</span>, n - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, l, r);
  }
};</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">zkw 版，接口是 0-index 闭区间 <code>[l, r]</code>，内部转成半开区间 <code>[l + base, r + base + 1)</code>。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="template &lt;typename Type, typename Func&gt; class SegTree {
private:
  size_t size;
  size_t base;
  size_t height;
  Type query_default;
  Type lazy_default;
  Func func;
  std::vector&lt;Type&gt; tree;
  std::vector&lt;Type&gt; lazy;
  std::vector&lt;bool&gt; has_lazy;

  auto _apply(size_t p, const Type &amp;value) -&gt; void {
    tree[p] += value;
    if (p &lt; base) {
      lazy[p] += value;
      has_lazy[p] = true;
    }
  }

  auto _push(size_t p) -&gt; void {
    for (size_t s = height; s &gt; 0; --s) {
      const size_t i = p &gt;&gt; s;
      if (!has_lazy[i]) {
        continue;
      }

      _apply(i &lt;&lt; 1, lazy[i]);
      _apply(i &lt;&lt; 1 | 1, lazy[i]);
      lazy[i] = lazy_default;
      has_lazy[i] = false;
    }
  }

  auto _pull(size_t p) -&gt; void {
    for (p &gt;&gt;= 1; p &gt; 0; p &gt;&gt;= 1) {
      tree[p] = func(tree[p &lt;&lt; 1], tree[p &lt;&lt; 1 | 1]);
      if (has_lazy[p]) {
        tree[p] += lazy[p];
      }
    }
  }

public:
  explicit SegTree(const std::vector&lt;Type&gt; &amp;data, Func f = Func{},
                   const Type &amp;query_de = Type(),
                   const Type &amp;lazy_de = Type())
      : size(data.size()), query_default(query_de), lazy_default(lazy_de),
        func(f) {
    base = 1;
    height = 0;
    while (base &lt; size) {
      base &lt;&lt;= 1;
      ++height;
    }

    tree.assign(base &lt;&lt; 1, query_default);
    lazy.assign(base &lt;&lt; 1, lazy_default);
    has_lazy.assign(base &lt;&lt; 1, false);

    for (size_t i = 0; i &lt; size; ++i) {
      tree[base + i] = data[i];
    }
    for (size_t i = base - 1; i &gt; 0; --i) {
      tree[i] = func(tree[i &lt;&lt; 1], tree[i &lt;&lt; 1 | 1]);
    }
  }

  auto add_range(size_t l, size_t r, const Type &amp;value) -&gt; void {
    if (size == 0 || l &gt; r || r &gt;= size) {
      return;
    }

    size_t left = l + base;
    size_t right = r + base + 1;
    const size_t left_origin = left;
    const size_t right_origin = right;

    _push(left_origin);
    _push(right_origin - 1);

    while (left &lt; right) {
      if (left &amp; 1) {
        _apply(left++, value);
      }
      if (right &amp; 1) {
        _apply(--right, value);
      }
      left &gt;&gt;= 1;
      right &gt;&gt;= 1;
    }

    _pull(left_origin);
    _pull(right_origin - 1);
  }

  auto query_range(size_t l, size_t r) -&gt; Type {
    if (size == 0 || l &gt; r || r &gt;= size) {
      return query_default;
    }

    size_t left = l + base;
    size_t right = r + base + 1;
    _push(left);
    _push(right - 1);

    auto left_res = query_default;
    auto right_res = query_default;
    while (left &lt; right) {
      if (left &amp; 1) {
        left_res = func(left_res, tree[left++]);
      }
      if (right &amp; 1) {
        right_res = func(right_res, tree[--right]);
      }
      left &gt;&gt;= 1;
      right &gt;&gt;= 1;
    }

    return func(left_res, right_res);
  }
};
"><pre><span class="pl-k">template </span>&lt;<span class="pl-k">typename</span> Type, <span class="pl-k">typename</span> Func&gt; <span class="pl-k">class</span> <span class="pl-en">SegTree</span> {
<span class="pl-k">private:</span>
  <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> size;
  <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> base;
  <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> height;
  Type query_default;
  Type lazy_default;
  Func func;
  std::vector&lt;Type&gt; tree;
  std::vector&lt;Type&gt; lazy;
  std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">bool</span>&gt; has_lazy;

  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">_apply</span>(<span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> p, <span class="pl-k">const</span> Type &amp;value) -&gt; void {
    tree[p] += value;
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (p &lt; base) {
      lazy[p] += value;
      has_lazy[p] = <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
    }
  }

  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">_push</span>(<span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> p) -&gt; void {
    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> s = height; s &gt; <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; --s) {
      <span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> i = p &gt;&gt; s;
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!has_lazy[i]) {
        <span class="pl-k">continue</span>;
      }

      <span class="pl-c1">_apply</span>(i &lt;&lt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, lazy[i]);
      <span class="pl-c1">_apply</span>(i &lt;&lt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span> | <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, lazy[i]);
      lazy[i] = lazy_default;
      has_lazy[i] = <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;
    }
  }

  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">_pull</span>(<span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> p) -&gt; void {
    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (p &gt;&gt;= <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; p &gt; <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; p &gt;&gt;= <span class="pl-c1">1</span>) {
      tree[p] = <span class="pl-c1">func</span>(tree[p &lt;&lt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>], tree[p &lt;&lt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span> | <span class="pl-c1">1</span>]);
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (has_lazy[p]) {
        tree[p] += lazy[p];
      }
    }
  }

<span class="pl-k">public:</span>
  <span class="pl-k">explicit</span> <span class="pl-en">SegTree</span>(<span class="pl-k">const</span> std::vector&lt;Type&gt; &amp;data, Func f = Func{},
                   <span class="pl-k">const</span> Type &amp;query_de = Type(),
                   <span class="pl-k">const</span> Type &amp;lazy_de = Type())
      : size(data.size()), query_default(query_de), lazy_default(lazy_de),
        func(f) {
    base = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
    height = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
    <span class="pl-k">while</span> (base &lt; size) {
      base &lt;&lt;= <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
      ++height;
    }

    tree.<span class="pl-c1">assign</span>(base &lt;&lt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, query_default);
    lazy.<span class="pl-c1">assign</span>(base &lt;&lt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, lazy_default);
    has_lazy.<span class="pl-c1">assign</span>(base &lt;&lt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, <span class="pl-c1">false</span>);

    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; i &lt; size; ++i) {
      tree[base + i] = data[i];
    }
    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> i = base - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; i &gt; <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; --i) {
      tree[i] = <span class="pl-c1">func</span>(tree[i &lt;&lt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>], tree[i &lt;&lt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span> | <span class="pl-c1">1</span>]);
    }
  }

  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">add_range</span>(<span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> l, <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> r, <span class="pl-k">const</span> Type &amp;value) -&gt; void {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (size == <span class="pl-c1">0</span> || l &gt; r || r &gt;= size) {
      <span class="pl-k">return</span>;
    }

    <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> left = l + base;
    <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> right = r + base + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
    <span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> left_origin = left;
    <span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> right_origin = right;

    <span class="pl-c1">_push</span>(left_origin);
    <span class="pl-c1">_push</span>(right_origin - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>);

    <span class="pl-k">while</span> (left &lt; right) {
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (left &amp; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>) {
        <span class="pl-c1">_apply</span>(left++, value);
      }
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (right &amp; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>) {
        <span class="pl-c1">_apply</span>(--right, value);
      }
      left &gt;&gt;= <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
      right &gt;&gt;= <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
    }

    <span class="pl-c1">_pull</span>(left_origin);
    <span class="pl-c1">_pull</span>(right_origin - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>);
  }

  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">query_range</span>(<span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> l, <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> r) -&gt; Type {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (size == <span class="pl-c1">0</span> || l &gt; r || r &gt;= size) {
      <span class="pl-k">return</span> query_default;
    }

    <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> left = l + base;
    <span class="pl-c1">size_t</span> right = r + base + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
    <span class="pl-c1">_push</span>(left);
    <span class="pl-c1">_push</span>(right - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>);

    <span class="pl-k">auto</span> left_res = query_default;
    <span class="pl-k">auto</span> right_res = query_default;
    <span class="pl-k">while</span> (left &lt; right) {
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (left &amp; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>) {
        left_res = <span class="pl-c1">func</span>(left_res, tree[left++]);
      }
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (right &amp; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>) {
        right_res = <span class="pl-c1">func</span>(right_res, tree[--right]);
      }
      left &gt;&gt;= <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
      right &gt;&gt;= <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
    }

    <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">func</span>(left_res, right_res);
  }
};
</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Graph</h2><a id="user-content-graph" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Graph" href="#graph"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">补图连通块</h3><a id="user-content-补图连通块" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 补图连通块" href="#补图连通块"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">适用：给出一批“禁止边/权值为 1 的边”，需要在补图中找连通块。维护未访问集合；从点 <code>u</code> 扩展时，所有未访问且不是 <code>u</code> 原图邻居的点，都是补图邻居。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::vector&lt;std::unordered_set&lt;int&gt;&gt; edge(n + 1);
for (auto [u, v] : edges) {
  edge[u].insert(v);
  edge[v].insert(u);
}

std::set&lt;int&gt; unvisited;
for (int i = 1; i &lt;= n; ++i)
  unvisited.insert(i);

int component_count = 0;
std::queue&lt;int&gt; q;
while (!unvisited.empty()) {
  ++component_count;
  int start = *unvisited.begin();
  unvisited.erase(start);
  q.push(start);

  while (!q.empty()) {
    int u = q.front();
    q.pop();
    for (auto it = unvisited.begin(); it != unvisited.end();) {
      int v = *it;
      if (!edge[u].contains(v)) {
        it = unvisited.erase(it);
        q.push(v);
      } else {
        ++it;
      }
    }
  }
}"><pre>std::vector&lt;std::unordered_set&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;&gt; <span class="pl-en">edge</span>(n + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>);
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> [u, v] : edges) {
  edge[u].<span class="pl-c1">insert</span>(v);
  edge[v].<span class="pl-c1">insert</span>(u);
}

std::set&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; unvisited;
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; i &lt;= n; ++i)
  unvisited.insert(i);

<span class="pl-k">int</span> component_count = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
std::queue&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; q;
<span class="pl-k">while</span> (!unvisited.empty()) {
  ++component_count;
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> start = *unvisited.<span class="pl-c1">begin</span>();
  unvisited.<span class="pl-c1">erase</span>(start);
  q.<span class="pl-c1">push</span>(start);

  <span class="pl-k">while</span> (!q.<span class="pl-c1">empty</span>()) {
    <span class="pl-k">int</span> u = q.<span class="pl-c1">front</span>();
    q.<span class="pl-c1">pop</span>();
    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> it = unvisited.<span class="pl-c1">begin</span>(); it != unvisited.<span class="pl-c1">end</span>();) {
      <span class="pl-k">int</span> v = *it;
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!edge[u].<span class="pl-c1">contains</span>(v)) {
        it = unvisited.<span class="pl-c1">erase</span>(it);
        q.<span class="pl-c1">push</span>(v);
      } <span class="pl-k">else</span> {
        ++it;
      }
    }
  }
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">0/1 完全图 MST：输入边权为 <code>1</code>，未输入边权为 <code>0</code>。答案为 <code>补图连通块数 - 1</code>。</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">BFS 通配符桶优化</h3><a id="user-content-bfs-通配符桶优化" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: BFS 通配符桶优化" href="#bfs-通配符桶优化"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">适用：单词接龙 / 只改一个字符的最短路。把单词按通配符模式分桶，如 <code>fool</code> 放入 <code>_ool, f_ol, fo_l, foo_</code>，同桶单词两两只差一个字符。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="int n = static_cast&lt;int&gt;(words.size());
int len = static_cast&lt;int&gt;(words[0].size());
std::unordered_map&lt;std::string, std::vector&lt;int&gt;&gt; bucket;

for (int i = 0; i &lt; n; ++i) {
  for (int p = 0; p &lt; len; ++p) {
    std::string key = words[i];
    key[p] = '_';
    bucket[key].push_back(i);
  }
}

std::vector&lt;int&gt; dist(n, -1);
std::queue&lt;int&gt; q;
dist[start] = 0;
q.push(start);

while (!q.empty()) {
  int u = q.front();
  q.pop();

  for (int p = 0; p &lt; len; ++p) {
    std::string key = words[u];
    key[p] = '_';

    for (int v : bucket[key]) {
      if (dist[v] == -1) {
        dist[v] = dist[u] + 1;
        q.push(v);
      }
    }
    bucket[key].clear(); // 这个桶以后不用重复扫
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">int</span> n = <span class="pl-k">static_cast</span>&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;(words.size());
<span class="pl-k">int</span> len = <span class="pl-k">static_cast</span>&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;(words[<span class="pl-c1">0</span>].size());
std::unordered_map&lt;std::string, std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;&gt; bucket;

<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; i &lt; n; ++i) {
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> p = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; p &lt; len; ++p) {
    std::string key = words[i];
    key[p] = <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>_<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>;
    bucket[key].<span class="pl-c1">push_back</span>(i);
  }
}

std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">dist</span>(n, -<span class="pl-c1">1</span>);
std::queue&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; q;
dist[start] = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
q.push(start);

<span class="pl-k">while</span> (!q.empty()) {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> u = q.<span class="pl-c1">front</span>();
  q.<span class="pl-c1">pop</span>();

  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> p = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; p &lt; len; ++p) {
    std::string key = words[u];
    key[p] = <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>_<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>;

    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> v : bucket[key]) {
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (dist[v] == -<span class="pl-c1">1</span>) {
        dist[v] = dist[u] + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
        q.<span class="pl-c1">push</span>(v);
      }
    }
    bucket[key].<span class="pl-c1">clear</span>(); <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 这个桶以后不用重复扫</span>
  }
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">复杂度：建桶 <code>O(n * len)</code> 个键；BFS 时每个桶最多展开一次，比暴力枚举两两比较 <code>O(n^2 * len)</code> 快很多。</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">二分图染色 / 奇偶约束</h3><a id="user-content-二分图染色--奇偶约束" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 二分图染色 / 奇偶约束" href="#二分图染色--奇偶约束"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">无向图二分图判定：相邻点颜色必须不同。若遇到同色边，说明不是二分图。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::vector&lt;int&gt; color(n, -1);
bool ok = true;
for (int s = 0; s &lt; n &amp;&amp; ok; ++s) {
  if (color[s] != -1)
    continue;

  std::queue&lt;int&gt; q;
  color[s] = 0;
  q.push(s);

  while (!q.empty() &amp;&amp; ok) {
    int u = q.front();
    q.pop();
    for (int v : adj[u]) {
      if (color[v] == -1) {
        color[v] = color[u] ^ 1;
        q.push(v);
