      } else if (color[v] == color[u]) {
        ok = false;
        break;
      }
    }
  }
}"><pre>std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">color</span>(n, -<span class="pl-c1">1</span>);
<span class="pl-k">bool</span> ok = <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> s = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; s &lt; n &amp;&amp; ok; ++s) {
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (color[s] != -<span class="pl-c1">1</span>)
    <span class="pl-k">continue</span>;

  std::queue&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; q;
  color[s] = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
  q.<span class="pl-c1">push</span>(s);

  <span class="pl-k">while</span> (!q.<span class="pl-c1">empty</span>() &amp;&amp; ok) {
    <span class="pl-k">int</span> u = q.<span class="pl-c1">front</span>();
    q.<span class="pl-c1">pop</span>();
    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> v : adj[u]) {
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (color[v] == -<span class="pl-c1">1</span>) {
        color[v] = color[u] ^ <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
        q.<span class="pl-c1">push</span>(v);
      } <span class="pl-k">else</span> <span class="pl-k">if</span> (color[v] == color[u]) {
        ok = <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;
        <span class="pl-k">break</span>;
      }
    }
  }
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">带奇偶关系的动态合并通常用带权并查集，维护 <code>dist[x]</code> 到根的奇偶值。</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">DFS Warnsdorff 启发式</h3><a id="user-content-dfs-warnsdorff-启发式" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: DFS Warnsdorff 启发式" href="#dfs-warnsdorff-启发式"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">适用：骑士巡游、网格 DFS、精确覆盖类搜索。原则是：下一步优先走“后续可走选择最少”的点，尽早发现死路。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::vector&lt;std::pair&lt;int, int&gt;&gt; moves = {
    {1, 2}, {2, 1}, {-1, 2}, {-2, 1},
    {1, -2}, {2, -1}, {-1, -2}, {-2, -1}};

auto inside = [&amp;](int x, int y) {
  return 0 &lt;= x &amp;&amp; x &lt; n &amp;&amp; 0 &lt;= y &amp;&amp; y &lt; m;
};

auto degree = [&amp;](int x, int y) {
  int cnt = 0;
  for (auto [dx, dy] : moves) {
    int nx = x + dx, ny = y + dy;
    if (inside(nx, ny) &amp;&amp; !visited[nx][ny])
      ++cnt;
  }
  return cnt;
};

auto dfs = [&amp;](auto &amp;&amp;self, int x, int y, int step) -&gt; bool {
  if (step == n * m)
    return true;

  std::vector&lt;std::tuple&lt;int, int, int&gt;&gt; next;
  for (auto [dx, dy] : moves) {
    int nx = x + dx, ny = y + dy;
    if (inside(nx, ny) &amp;&amp; !visited[nx][ny])
      next.emplace_back(degree(nx, ny), nx, ny);
  }
  std::sort(next.begin(), next.end()); // 可走出路少的先搜

  return std::any_of(next.begin(), next.end(), [&amp;](auto item) {
    auto [deg, nx, ny] = item;
    visited[nx][ny] = true;
    path.emplace_back(nx, ny);
    if (self(self, nx, ny, step + 1))
      return true;
    path.pop_back();
    visited[nx][ny] = false;
    return false;
  });
};"><pre>std::vector&lt;std::pair&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>, <span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;&gt; moves = {
    {<span class="pl-c1">1</span>, <span class="pl-c1">2</span>}, {<span class="pl-c1">2</span>, <span class="pl-c1">1</span>}, {-<span class="pl-c1">1</span>, <span class="pl-c1">2</span>}, {-<span class="pl-c1">2</span>, <span class="pl-c1">1</span>},
    {<span class="pl-c1">1</span>, -<span class="pl-c1">2</span>}, {<span class="pl-c1">2</span>, -<span class="pl-c1">1</span>}, {-<span class="pl-c1">1</span>, -<span class="pl-c1">2</span>}, {-<span class="pl-c1">2</span>, -<span class="pl-c1">1</span>}};

<span class="pl-k">auto</span> inside = [&amp;](<span class="pl-k">int</span> x, <span class="pl-k">int</span> y) {
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">0</span> &lt;= x &amp;&amp; x &lt; n &amp;&amp; <span class="pl-c1">0</span> &lt;= y &amp;&amp; y &lt; m;
};

<span class="pl-k">auto</span> degree = [&amp;](<span class="pl-k">int</span> x, <span class="pl-k">int</span> y) {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> cnt = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> [dx, dy] : moves) {
    <span class="pl-k">int</span> nx = x + dx, ny = y + dy;
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (<span class="pl-c1">inside</span>(nx, ny) &amp;&amp; !visited[nx][ny])
      ++cnt;
  }
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> cnt;
};

<span class="pl-k">auto</span> dfs = [&amp;](<span class="pl-k">auto</span> &amp;&amp;self, <span class="pl-k">int</span> x, <span class="pl-k">int</span> y, <span class="pl-k">int</span> step) -&gt; <span class="pl-k">bool</span> {
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (step == n * m)
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;

  std::vector&lt;std::tuple&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>, <span class="pl-k">int</span>, <span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;&gt; next;
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> [dx, dy] : moves) {
    <span class="pl-k">int</span> nx = x + dx, ny = y + dy;
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (<span class="pl-c1">inside</span>(nx, ny) &amp;&amp; !visited[nx][ny])
      next.<span class="pl-c1">emplace_back</span>(<span class="pl-c1">degree</span>(nx, ny), nx, ny);
  }
  <span class="pl-c1">std::sort</span>(next.<span class="pl-c1">begin</span>(), next.<span class="pl-c1">end</span>()); <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 可走出路少的先搜</span>

  <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">std::any_of</span>(next.<span class="pl-c1">begin</span>(), next.<span class="pl-c1">end</span>(), [&amp;](<span class="pl-k">auto</span> item) {
    <span class="pl-k">auto</span> [deg, nx, ny] = item;
    visited[nx][ny] = <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
    path.<span class="pl-c1">emplace_back</span>(nx, ny);
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (<span class="pl-c1">self</span>(self, nx, ny, step + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>))
      <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
    path.<span class="pl-c1">pop_back</span>();
    visited[nx][ny] = <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;
  });
};</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">拓扑排序</h3><a id="user-content-拓扑排序" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 拓扑排序" href="#拓扑排序"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Kahn 算法</h4><a id="user-content-kahn-算法" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Kahn 算法" href="#kahn-算法"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">数据以邻接表储存，输出为拓扑序。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="auto topo_sort_kahn(int n, const std::vector&lt;std::vector&lt;int&gt;&gt; &amp;adj)
    -&gt; std::vector&lt;int&gt; {
  std::vector&lt;int&gt; indegree(n, 0);
  for (int u = 0; u &lt; n; ++u)
    for (auto v : adj[u])
      ++indegree[v];
  std::queue&lt;int&gt; q;
  for (int i = 0; i &lt; n; ++i)
    if (!indegree[i])
      q.emplace(i);
  std::vector&lt;int&gt; topo_order;
  while (!q.empty()) {
    int u = q.front();
    q.pop();
    topo_order.emplace_back(u);
    for (auto v : adj[u]) {
      --indegree[v];
      if (!indegree[v])
        q.emplace(v);
    }
  }
  return topo_order; // 若 topo_order.size() != n 说明有环
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">topo_sort_kahn</span>(<span class="pl-k">int</span> n, <span class="pl-k">const</span> std::vector&lt;std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;&gt; &amp;adj)
    -&gt; std::vector&lt;int&gt; {
  std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; <span class="pl-c1">indegree</span>(n, <span class="pl-c1">0</span>);
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> u = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; u &lt; n; ++u)
    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> v : adj[u])
      ++indegree[v];
  std::queue&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; q;
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; i &lt; n; ++i)
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!indegree[i])
      q.<span class="pl-c1">emplace</span>(i);
  std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; topo_order;
  <span class="pl-k">while</span> (!q.<span class="pl-c1">empty</span>()) {
    <span class="pl-k">int</span> u = q.<span class="pl-c1">front</span>();
    q.<span class="pl-c1">pop</span>();
    topo_order.<span class="pl-c1">emplace_back</span>(u);
    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> v : adj[u]) {
      --indegree[v];
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!indegree[v])
        q.<span class="pl-c1">emplace</span>(v);
    }
  }
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> topo_order; <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 若 topo_order.size() != n 说明有环</span>
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">DFS 拓扑排序</h4><a id="user-content-dfs-拓扑排序" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: DFS 拓扑排序" href="#dfs-拓扑排序"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">原始输出为逆拓扑序，需要<code>reverse</code>。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="auto dfs_topo_sort(const std::vector&lt;std::vector&lt;int&gt;&gt; &amp;adj) {
  int n = static_cast&lt;int&gt;(adj.size());
  std::vector&lt;int&gt; visited(n, false);
  std::vector&lt;int&gt; finish_order;
  auto dfs_visit = [&amp;](this auto &amp;&amp;self, int u) -&gt; bool {
    visited[u] = 1;
    for (auto v : adj[u]) {
      if (visited[v] == 0) {
        if (!self(v))
          return false;
      } else if (visited[v] == 1) {
        return false;
      }
    }
    visited[u] = 2;
    finish_order.emplace_back(u);
    return true;
  };
  for (int u = 0; u &lt; n; ++u) {
    if (visited[u] == 0) {
      if (!dfs_visit(u))
        return {};
    }
  }
  std::ranges::reverse(finish_order);
  return finish_order;
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">dfs_topo_sort</span>(<span class="pl-k">const</span> std::vector&lt;std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;&gt; &amp;adj) {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> n = <span class="pl-k">static_cast</span>&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;(adj.<span class="pl-c1">size</span>());
  std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; <span class="pl-c1">visited</span>(n, <span class="pl-c1">false</span>);
  std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; finish_order;
  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> dfs_visit = [&amp;](<span class="pl-c1">this</span> <span class="pl-k">auto</span> &amp;&amp;self, <span class="pl-k">int</span> u) -&gt; <span class="pl-k">bool</span> {
    visited[u] = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> v : adj[u]) {
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (visited[v] == <span class="pl-c1">0</span>) {
        <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!<span class="pl-c1">self</span>(v))
          <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;
      } <span class="pl-k">else</span> <span class="pl-k">if</span> (visited[v] == <span class="pl-c1">1</span>) {
        <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;
      }
    }
    visited[u] = <span class="pl-c1">2</span>;
    finish_order.<span class="pl-c1">emplace_back</span>(u);
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
  };
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> u = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; u &lt; n; ++u) {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (visited[u] == <span class="pl-c1">0</span>) {
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!<span class="pl-c1">dfs_visit</span>(u))
        <span class="pl-k">return</span> {};
    }
  }
  <span class="pl-c1">std::ranges::reverse</span>(finish_order);
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> finish_order;
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">环检测</h3><a id="user-content-环检测" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 环检测" href="#环检测"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">无向图判环</h4><a id="user-content-无向图判环" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 无向图判环" href="#无向图判环"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">并查集</h5><a id="user-content-并查集-1" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 并查集" href="#并查集-1"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">在函数<code>unite()</code>中判断：</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="auto unite(int x, int y) -&gt; bool {
  int root_x = find(x);
  int root_y = find(y);
  if (root_x == root_y)
    return false; // 有环
  if (rank[root_x] &lt; rank[root_y])
    parent[root_x] = root_y;
  else if (rank[root_x] &gt; rank[root_y])
    parent[root_y] = root_x;
  else {
    parent[root_y] = root_x;
    ++rank[root_x];
  }
  return true;
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">unite</span>(<span class="pl-k">int</span> x, <span class="pl-k">int</span> y) -&gt; bool {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> root_x = <span class="pl-c1">find</span>(x);
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> root_y = <span class="pl-c1">find</span>(y);
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (root_x == root_y)
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">false</span>; <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 有环</span>
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (rank[root_x] &lt; rank[root_y])
    parent[root_x] = root_y;
  <span class="pl-k">else</span> <span class="pl-k">if</span> (rank[root_x] &gt; rank[root_y])
    parent[root_y] = root_x;
  <span class="pl-k">else</span> {
    parent[root_y] = root_x;
    ++rank[root_x];
  }
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">存图时用边表示无向图：</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="DisjSet dsu(n);
for (auto [u, v] : edges)
  if (!dsu.unite(u, v))
    return false;"><pre>DisjSet <span class="pl-en">dsu</span>(n);
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> [u, v] : edges)
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!dsu.unite(u, v))
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h5 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">DFS (parent 指针)</h5><a id="user-content-dfs-parent-指针" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: DFS (parent 指针)" href="#dfs-parent-指针"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="auto has_cycle(int n, const std::vector&lt;std::vector&lt;int&gt;&gt; &amp;adj) {
  std::vector&lt;bool&gt; visited(n, false);
  auto dfs = [&amp;](this auto &amp;&amp;self, int node, int parent) {
    visited[node] = true;
    for (auto v : adj[node]) {
      if (!visited[v]) {
        if (self(v, node))
          return true; // 有环
      } else if (v != parent) {
        return true;
      }
    }
    return false;
  };
  for (int u = 0; u &lt; n; ++u)
    if (!visited[u] &amp;&amp; dfs(u, -1))
      return true;
  return false;
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">has_cycle</span>(<span class="pl-k">int</span> n, <span class="pl-k">const</span> std::vector&lt;std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;&gt; &amp;adj) {
  std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">bool</span>&gt; <span class="pl-c1">visited</span>(n, <span class="pl-c1">false</span>);
  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> dfs = [&amp;](<span class="pl-c1">this</span> <span class="pl-k">auto</span> &amp;&amp;self, <span class="pl-k">int</span> node, <span class="pl-k">int</span> parent) {
    visited[node] = <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> v : adj[node]) {
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!visited[v]) {
        <span class="pl-k">if</span> (<span class="pl-c1">self</span>(v, node))
          <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">true</span>; <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 有环</span>
      } <span class="pl-k">else</span> <span class="pl-k">if</span> (v != parent) {
        <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
      }
    }
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;
  };
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> u = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; u &lt; n; ++u)
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!visited[u] &amp;&amp; <span class="pl-c1">dfs</span>(u, -<span class="pl-c1">1</span>))
      <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">有向图判环</h4><a id="user-content-有向图判环" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 有向图判环" href="#有向图判环"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">见<a href="#%E6%8B%93%E6%89%91%E6%8E%92%E5%BA%8F">拓扑排序</a>.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">无向图 Tarjan</h3><a id="user-content-无向图-tarjan" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 无向图 Tarjan" href="#无向图-tarjan"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Tarjan 可用于无向图求桥、割点、边双连通分量、点双连通分量。核心仍是 <code>dfn/low</code>，但判定条件和 SCC 不同。</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>桥：<code>low[v] &gt; dfn[u]</code>，是边双连通分量分界线</li>
<li>割点：非根节点满足 <code>low[v] &gt;= dfn[u]</code>；根节点有至少两个 DFS 儿子，是点双连通分量分界线</li>
<li>有重边时必须用边编号跳过父边，不能只判断 <code>v == parent</code></li>
</ul>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="struct Edge {
  int to;
  int id;
};

std::vector&lt;std::vector&lt;Edge&gt;&gt; adj(n);
for (int id = 0; id &lt; m; ++id) {
  int u, v;
  std::cin &gt;&gt; u &gt;&gt; v;
  adj[u].push_back({v, id});
  adj[v].push_back({u, id});
}

std::vector&lt;int&gt; dfn(n, -1), low(n), is_cut(n, false);
std::vector&lt;std::pair&lt;int, int&gt;&gt; bridges;
int timer = 0;

auto dfs = [&amp;](auto &amp;&amp;self, int u, int parent_edge) -&gt; void {
  dfn[u] = low[u] = timer++;
  int child_count = 0;
  for (auto [v, edge_id] : adj[u]) {
    if (edge_id == parent_edge)
      continue;
    if (dfn[v] == -1) {
      ++child_count;
      self(self, v, edge_id);
      low[u] = std::min(low[u], low[v]);
      if (low[v] &gt; dfn[u])
        bridges.push_back({u, v});
      if (parent_edge != -1 &amp;&amp; low[v] &gt;= dfn[u])
        is_cut[u] = true;
    } else {
      low[u] = std::min(low[u], dfn[v]);
    }
  }
  if (parent_edge == -1 &amp;&amp; child_count &gt;= 2)
    is_cut[u] = true;
};

for (int u = 0; u &lt; n; ++u)
  if (dfn[u] == -1)
    dfs(dfs, u, -1);"><pre><span class="pl-k">struct</span> <span class="pl-en">Edge</span> {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> to;
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> id;
};

std::vector&lt;std::vector&lt;Edge&gt;&gt; <span class="pl-en">adj</span>(n);
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> id = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; id &lt; m; ++id) {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> u, v;
  std::cin &gt;&gt; u &gt;&gt; v;
  adj[u].<span class="pl-c1">push_back</span>({v, id});
  adj[v].<span class="pl-c1">push_back</span>({u, id});
}

std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">dfn</span>(n, -<span class="pl-c1">1</span>), low(n), is_cut(n, <span class="pl-c1">false</span>);
std::vector&lt;std::pair&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>, <span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;&gt; bridges;
<span class="pl-k">int</span> timer = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;

<span class="pl-k">auto</span> dfs = [&amp;](<span class="pl-k">auto</span> &amp;&amp;self, <span class="pl-k">int</span> u, <span class="pl-k">int</span> parent_edge) -&gt; <span class="pl-k">void</span> {
  dfn[u] = low[u] = timer++;
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> child_count = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> [v, edge_id] : adj[u]) {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (edge_id == parent_edge)
      <span class="pl-k">continue</span>;
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (dfn[v] == -<span class="pl-c1">1</span>) {
      ++child_count;
      <span class="pl-c1">self</span>(self, v, edge_id);
      low[u] = <span class="pl-c1">std::min</span>(low[u], low[v]);
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (low[v] &gt; dfn[u])
        bridges.<span class="pl-c1">push_back</span>({u, v});
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (parent_edge != -<span class="pl-c1">1</span> &amp;&amp; low[v] &gt;= dfn[u])
        is_cut[u] = <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
    } <span class="pl-k">else</span> {
      low[u] = <span class="pl-c1">std::min</span>(low[u], dfn[v]);
    }
  }
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (parent_edge == -<span class="pl-c1">1</span> &amp;&amp; child_count &gt;= <span class="pl-c1">2</span>)
    is_cut[u] = <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
};

<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> u = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; u &lt; n; ++u)
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (dfn[u] == -<span class="pl-c1">1</span>)
    <span class="pl-en">dfs</span>(dfs, u, -<span class="pl-c1">1</span>);</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">强连通分量（SCC）</h3><a id="user-content-强连通分量scc" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 强连通分量（SCC）" href="#强连通分量scc"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Tarjan 算法</h4><a id="user-content-tarjan-算法" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Tarjan 算法" href="#tarjan-算法"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="auto tarjan(const std::vector&lt;std::vector&lt;int&gt;&gt; &amp;adj) {
  int n = adj.size();
  int timer = 0;
  std::vector&lt;int&gt; dfn(n, -1);
  std::vector&lt;int&gt; low(n, -1);
  std::vector&lt;int&gt; stack{};
  std::vector&lt;bool&gt; on_stack(n, false);
  std::vector&lt;std::vector&lt;int&gt;&gt; sccs;
  auto dfs = [&amp;](auto &amp;&amp;self, int u) -&gt; void {
    dfn[u] = low[u] = timer++;
    stack.emplace_back(u);
    on_stack[u] = true;
    for (auto v : adj[u]) {
      if (dfn[v] == -1) {
        self(self, v);
        low[u] = std::min(low[u], low[v]);
      } else if (on_stack[v]) {
        low[u] = std::min(low[u], dfn[v]);
      }
    }
    if (low[u] == dfn[u]) {
      std::vector&lt;int&gt; component;
      while (true) {
        int node = stack.back();
        stack.pop_back();
        component.emplace_back(node);
        on_stack[node] = false;
        if (node == u) break;
      }
      sccs.emplace_back(component);
    }
  };
  for (int i = 0; i &lt; n; ++i)
    if (dfn[i] == -1) dfs(dfs, i);
  return sccs;
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">tarjan</span>(<span class="pl-k">const</span> std::vector&lt;std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;&gt; &amp;adj) {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> n = adj.<span class="pl-c1">size</span>();
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> timer = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
  std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; <span class="pl-c1">dfn</span>(n, -<span class="pl-c1">1</span>);
  std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; <span class="pl-c1">low</span>(n, -<span class="pl-c1">1</span>);
  std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; stack{};
  std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">bool</span>&gt; <span class="pl-c1">on_stack</span>(n, <span class="pl-c1">false</span>);
  std::vector&lt;std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;&gt; sccs;
  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> dfs = [&amp;](<span class="pl-k">auto</span> &amp;&amp;self, <span class="pl-k">int</span> u) -&gt; <span class="pl-k">void</span> {
    dfn[u] = low[u] = timer++;
    stack.<span class="pl-c1">emplace_back</span>(u);
    on_stack[u] = <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> v : adj[u]) {
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (dfn[v] == -<span class="pl-c1">1</span>) {
        <span class="pl-c1">self</span>(self, v);
        low[u] = <span class="pl-c1">std::min</span>(low[u], low[v]);
      } <span class="pl-k">else</span> <span class="pl-k">if</span> (on_stack[v]) {
        low[u] = <span class="pl-c1">std::min</span>(low[u], dfn[v]);
      }
    }
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (low[u] == dfn[u]) {
      std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; component;
      <span class="pl-k">while</span> (<span class="pl-c1">true</span>) {
        <span class="pl-k">int</span> node = stack.<span class="pl-c1">back</span>();
        stack.<span class="pl-c1">pop_back</span>();
        component.<span class="pl-c1">emplace_back</span>(node);
        on_stack[node] = <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;
        <span class="pl-k">if</span> (node == u) <span class="pl-k">break</span>;
      }
      sccs.<span class="pl-c1">emplace_back</span>(component);
    }
  };
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; i &lt; n; ++i)
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (dfn[i] == -<span class="pl-c1">1</span>) <span class="pl-c1">dfs</span>(dfs, i);
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> sccs;
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">缩点算法</h4><a id="user-content-缩点算法" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 缩点算法" href="#缩点算法"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><code>comp[u]</code> 表示点 <code>u</code> 属于哪个强连通分量。每个 SCC 缩成一个点后，原图变成 DAG。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::vector&lt;int&gt; dfn(n, -1), low(n), stk, comp(n, -1);
std::vector&lt;bool&gt; in_stack(n, false);
int timer = 0, comp_count = 0;
auto dfs = [&amp;](auto &amp;&amp;self, int u) -&gt; void {
  dfn[u] = low[u] = timer++;
  stk.push_back(u);
  in_stack[u] = true;
  for (int v : g[u]) {
    if (dfn[v] == -1) {
      self(self, v);
      low[u] = std::min(low[u], low[v]);
    } else if (in_stack[v]) {
      low[u] = std::min(low[u], dfn[v]);
    }
  }
  if (dfn[u] == low[u]) {
    while (true) {
      int x = stk.back();
      stk.pop_back();
      in_stack[x] = false;
      comp[x] = comp_count;
      if (x == u)
        break;
    }
    ++comp_count;
  }
};
for (int i = 0; i &lt; n; ++i)
  if (dfn[i] == -1)
    dfs(dfs, i);"><pre>std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">dfn</span>(n, -<span class="pl-c1">1</span>), low(n), stk, comp(n, -<span class="pl-c1">1</span>);
std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">bool</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">in_stack</span>(n, <span class="pl-c1">false</span>);
<span class="pl-k">int</span> timer = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>, comp_count = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
<span class="pl-k">auto</span> dfs = [&amp;](<span class="pl-k">auto</span> &amp;&amp;self, <span class="pl-k">int</span> u) -&gt; <span class="pl-k">void</span> {
  dfn[u] = low[u] = timer++;
  stk.<span class="pl-c1">push_back</span>(u);
  in_stack[u] = <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> v : g[u]) {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (dfn[v] == -<span class="pl-c1">1</span>) {
      <span class="pl-c1">self</span>(self, v);
      low[u] = <span class="pl-c1">std::min</span>(low[u], low[v]);
    } <span class="pl-k">else</span> <span class="pl-k">if</span> (in_stack[v]) {
      low[u] = <span class="pl-c1">std::min</span>(low[u], dfn[v]);
    }
  }
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (dfn[u] == low[u]) {
    <span class="pl-k">while</span> (<span class="pl-c1">true</span>) {
      <span class="pl-k">int</span> x = stk.<span class="pl-c1">back</span>();
      stk.<span class="pl-c1">pop_back</span>();
      in_stack[x] = <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;
      comp[x] = comp_count;
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (x == u)
        <span class="pl-k">break</span>;
    }
    ++comp_count;
  }
};
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; i &lt; n; ++i)
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (dfn[i] == -<span class="pl-c1">1</span>)
    <span class="pl-en">dfs</span>(dfs, i);</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">建缩点图：</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::vector&lt;std::vector&lt;int&gt;&gt; dag(comp_count);
std::vector&lt;int&gt; indegree(comp_count, 0);

for (int u = 0; u &lt; n; ++u) {
  for (int v : g[u]) {
    int cu = comp[u], cv = comp[v];
    if (cu == cv)
      continue;
    dag[cu].push_back(cv);
  }
}

// 去重，否则入度、DP 可能被重边影响
for (int u = 0; u &lt; comp_count; ++u) {
  std::sort(dag[u].begin(), dag[u].end());
  dag[u].erase(std::unique(dag[u].begin(), dag[u].end()), dag[u].end());
  for (int v : dag[u])
    ++indegree[v];
}"><pre>std::vector&lt;std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;&gt; <span class="pl-en">dag</span>(comp_count);
std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">indegree</span>(comp_count, <span class="pl-c1">0</span>);

<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> u = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; u &lt; n; ++u) {
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> v : g[u]) {
    <span class="pl-k">int</span> cu = comp[u], cv = comp[v];
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (cu == cv)
      <span class="pl-k">continue</span>;
    dag[cu].<span class="pl-c1">push_back</span>(cv);
  }
}

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 去重，否则入度、DP 可能被重边影响</span>
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> u = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; u &lt; comp_count; ++u) {
  <span class="pl-c1">std::sort</span>(dag[u].<span class="pl-c1">begin</span>(), dag[u].<span class="pl-c1">end</span>());
  dag[u].<span class="pl-c1">erase</span>(<span class="pl-c1">std::unique</span>(dag[u].<span class="pl-c1">begin</span>(), dag[u].<span class="pl-c1">end</span>()), dag[u].<span class="pl-c1">end</span>());
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> v : dag[u])
    ++indegree[v];
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">如果点有权值，缩点时汇总 SCC 权值：</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::vector&lt;long long&gt; comp_weight(comp_count, 0);
for (int u = 0; u &lt; n; ++u) {
  comp_weight[comp[u]] += weight[u];
}"><pre>std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">comp_weight</span>(comp_count, <span class="pl-c1">0</span>);
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> u = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; u &lt; n; ++u) {
  comp_weight[comp[u]] += weight[u];
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">缩点 DAG DP：有边 <code>u -&gt; v</code> 时，<code>u</code> 的答案可由 <code>v</code> 更新。先求拓扑序，再反向转移。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::queue&lt;int&gt; q;
std::vector&lt;int&gt; topo;
for (int i = 0; i &lt; comp_count; ++i)
  if (indegree[i] == 0)
    q.push(i);

while (!q.empty()) {
  int u = q.front();
  q.pop();
  topo.push_back(u);
  for (int v : dag[u])
    if (--indegree[v] == 0)
      q.push(v);
}

std::vector&lt;int&gt; dp(comp_count);
for (int c = 0; c &lt; comp_count; ++c)
  dp[c] = comp_min_id[c]; // 或 comp_weight[c] 等 SCC 自身信息

for (int i = static_cast&lt;int&gt;(topo.size()) - 1; i &gt;= 0; --i) {
  int u = topo[i];
  for (int v : dag[u])
    dp[u] = std::min(dp[u], dp[v]);
}"><pre>std::queue&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; q;
std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; topo;
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; i &lt; comp_count; ++i)
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (indegree[i] == <span class="pl-c1">0</span>)
    q.push(i);

<span class="pl-k">while</span> (!q.empty()) {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> u = q.<span class="pl-c1">front</span>();
  q.<span class="pl-c1">pop</span>();
  topo.<span class="pl-c1">push_back</span>(u);
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> v : dag[u])
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (--indegree[v] == <span class="pl-c1">0</span>)
      q.<span class="pl-c1">push</span>(v);
}

std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">dp</span>(comp_count);
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> c = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; c &lt; comp_count; ++c)
  dp[c] = comp_min_id[c]; <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 或 comp_weight[c] 等 SCC 自身信息</span>

<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-k">static_cast</span>&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;(topo.size()) - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; i &gt;= <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; --i) {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> u = topo[i];
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> v : dag[u])
    dp[u] = <span class="pl-c1">std::min</span>(dp[u], dp[v]);
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">欧拉路径 Hierholzer</h3><a id="user-content-欧拉路径-hierholzer" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 欧拉路径 Hierholzer" href="#欧拉路径-hierholzer"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">适用：每条边恰好走一次。无向图要求奇度点为 <code>0</code> 或 <code>2</code> 个；有向图要求出入度差符合起终点条件，并且相关点连通。</p>
<p dir="auto">有向图模板，<code>adj[u]</code> 存边的终点，边会被弹出：</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::vector&lt;std::vector&lt;int&gt;&gt; adj(n);
std::vector&lt;int&gt; path;

auto dfs = [&amp;](this auto &amp;&amp;self, int u) -&gt; void {
  while (!adj[u].empty()) {
    int v = adj[u].back();
    adj[u].pop_back();
    self(v);
  }
  path.push_back(u);
};

dfs(start);
std::ranges::reverse(path); // path.size() == edge_count + 1 才用完所有边"><pre>std::vector&lt;std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;&gt; <span class="pl-en">adj</span>(n);
std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; path;

<span class="pl-k">auto</span> dfs = [&amp;](<span class="pl-c1">this</span> <span class="pl-k">auto</span> &amp;&amp;self, <span class="pl-k">int</span> u) -&gt; <span class="pl-k">void</span> {
  <span class="pl-k">while</span> (!adj[u].<span class="pl-c1">empty</span>()) {
    <span class="pl-k">int</span> v = adj[u].<span class="pl-c1">back</span>();
    adj[u].<span class="pl-c1">pop_back</span>();
    <span class="pl-c1">self</span>(v);
  }
  path.<span class="pl-c1">push_back</span>(u);
};

<span class="pl-en">dfs</span>(start);
<span class="pl-en">std::ranges::reverse</span>(path); <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> path.size() == edge_count + 1 才用完所有边</span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">字符串接龙 / Catenyms 类题常把单词看成边，首字母到尾字母建有向边；输出边时需要同时保存边编号或单词。</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">最短路问题</h3><a id="user-content-最短路问题" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 最短路问题" href="#最短路问题"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Dijkstra （非负权单源最短路）</h4><a id="user-content-dijkstra-非负权单源最短路" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Dijkstra （非负权单源最短路）" href="#dijkstra-非负权单源最短路"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="auto dijkstra(int n, const std::vector&lt;std::vector&lt;std::pair&lt;int, int&gt;&gt;&gt; &amp;adj,
              int start) {
  const long long INF = 4e18;
  std::vector&lt;long long&gt; dist(n, INF);
  dist[start] = 0;
  std::priority_queue&lt;std::pair&lt;long long, int&gt;,
                      std::vector&lt;std::pair&lt;long long, int&gt;&gt;,
                      std::greater&lt;&gt;&gt; pq;
  pq.emplace(0, start);
  while (!pq.empty()) {
    auto [d, u] = pq.top();
    pq.pop();
    if (d &gt; dist[u]) continue;
    for (auto [v, weight] : adj[u])
      if (dist[u] + weight &lt; dist[v]) {
        dist[v] = dist[u] + weight;
        pq.emplace(dist[v], v);
      }
  }
  return dist;
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">dijkstra</span>(<span class="pl-k">int</span> n, <span class="pl-k">const</span> std::vector&lt;std::vector&lt;std::pair&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>, <span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;&gt;&gt; &amp;adj,
              <span class="pl-k">int</span> start) {
  <span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> INF = <span class="pl-c1">4e18</span>;
  std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span>&gt; <span class="pl-c1">dist</span>(n, INF);
  dist[start] = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
  std::priority_queue&lt;std::pair&lt;<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span>, <span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;,
                      std::vector&lt;std::pair&lt;<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span>, <span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;&gt;,
                      std::greater&lt;&gt;&gt; pq;
  pq.<span class="pl-c1">emplace</span>(<span class="pl-c1">0</span>, start);
  <span class="pl-k">while</span> (!pq.<span class="pl-c1">empty</span>()) {
    <span class="pl-k">auto</span> [d, u] = pq.<span class="pl-c1">top</span>();
    pq.<span class="pl-c1">pop</span>();
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (d &gt; dist[u]) <span class="pl-k">continue</span>;
    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> [v, weight] : adj[u])
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (dist[u] + weight &lt; dist[v]) {
        dist[v] = dist[u] + weight;
        pq.<span class="pl-c1">emplace</span>(dist[v], v);
      }
  }
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> dist;
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Dijkstra 变形差异</h4><a id="user-content-dijkstra-变形差异" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Dijkstra 变形差异" href="#dijkstra-变形差异"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">只改状态、初值、转移和堆方向；其余框架沿用 Dijkstra。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="// 同余最短路：dist[r] 是能达到余数 r 的最小值
int mod = static_cast&lt;int&gt;(*std::min_element(step.begin(), step.end()));
std::vector&lt;long long&gt; dist(mod, INF);
dist[0] = 0; // 若从 base 开始：dist[base % mod] = base
for (long long w : step) {
  int v = static_cast&lt;int&gt;((u + w) % mod);
  relax_min(v, du + w);
}
bool ok = dist[target % mod] &lt;= target;

// 统计 [0, limit] 内可达数
if (dist[r] &lt;= limit)
  ans += (limit - dist[r]) / mod + 1;"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 同余最短路：dist[r] 是能达到余数 r 的最小值</span>
<span class="pl-k">int</span> mod = <span class="pl-k">static_cast</span>&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;(*<span class="pl-en">std::min_element</span>(step.begin(), step.end()));
std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">dist</span>(mod, INF);
dist[<span class="pl-c1">0</span>] = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 若从 base 开始：dist[base % mod] = base</span>
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> w : step) {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> v = <span class="pl-k">static_cast</span>&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;((u + w) % mod);
  <span class="pl-c1">relax_min</span>(v, du + w);
}
<span class="pl-k">bool</span> ok = dist[target % mod] &lt;= target;

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 统计 [0, limit] 内可达数</span>
<span class="pl-k">if</span> (dist[r] &lt;= limit)
  ans += (limit - dist[r]) / mod + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;</pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="// 最小瓶颈路：最小化路径最大边权，海拔差/最小体力
long long next = std::max(dist[u], w);
if (next &lt; dist[v])
  relax_min(v, next);

// 最大瓶颈路：最大化路径最小边权，货车限重/最大带宽
dist[start] = INF;              // 其他点初值 -1
long long next = std::min(dist[u], w);
if (next &gt; dist[v])
  relax_max(v, next);           // 用大根堆"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 最小瓶颈路：最小化路径最大边权，海拔差/最小体力</span>
<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> next = std::max(dist[u], w);
<span class="pl-k">if</span> (next &lt; dist[v])
  <span class="pl-en">relax_min</span>(v, next);

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 最大瓶颈路：最大化路径最小边权，货车限重/最大带宽</span>
dist[start] = INF;              <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 其他点初值 -1</span>
<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> next = std::min(dist[u], w);
<span class="pl-k">if</span> (next &gt; dist[v])
  <span class="pl-en">relax_max</span>(v, next);           <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 用大根堆</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="// 最大概率路：最大化边概率乘积
prob[start] = 1;                // 其他点初值 0
double next = prob[u] * p;
if (next &gt; prob[v])
  relax_max(v, next);           // 用大根堆

// 状态/分层图：最多用一次道具、剩余次数、钥匙状态等
std::vector dist(n, std::array&lt;long long, 2&gt;{INF, INF});
// 状态为 (du, u, used)
if (!special)
  relax_min({v, used}, du + w);
else if (used == 0)
  relax_min({v, 1}, du + w);"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 最大概率路：最大化边概率乘积</span>
prob[start] = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;                <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 其他点初值 0</span>
<span class="pl-k">double</span> next = prob[u] * p;
<span class="pl-k">if</span> (next &gt; prob[v])
  <span class="pl-en">relax_max</span>(v, next);           <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 用大根堆</span>

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 状态/分层图：最多用一次道具、剩余次数、钥匙状态等</span>
std::vector <span class="pl-en">dist</span>(n, std::array&lt;<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span>, <span class="pl-c1">2</span>&gt;{INF, INF});
<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 状态为 (du, u, used)</span>
<span class="pl-k">if</span> (!special)
  <span class="pl-en">relax_min</span>({v, used}, du + w);
<span class="pl-k">else</span> <span class="pl-k">if</span> (used == <span class="pl-c1">0</span>)
  <span class="pl-en">relax_min</span>({v, <span class="pl-c1">1</span>}, du + w);</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">最小瓶颈路也可二分答案 + BFS，或 Kruskal 按边权从小到大加边；最大瓶颈路也可用最大生成树 + LCA 查询路径最小边。</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Bellman-Ford （有负权单源最短路）</h4><a id="user-content-bellman-ford-有负权单源最短路" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Bellman-Ford （有负权单源最短路）" href="#bellman-ford-有负权单源最短路"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">适用：有负权边、判断负环、差分约束、限制边数的最短路。复杂度 <code>O(nm)</code>。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="struct Edge {
  int from, to;
  long long weight;
};

const long long INF = 4e18;
std::vector&lt;long long&gt; dist(n + 1, INF);
dist[start] = 0;

for (int i = 1; i &lt;= n - 1; ++i) {
  bool relaxed = false;
  for (auto [u, v, w] : edges) {
    if (dist[u] != INF &amp;&amp; dist[v] &gt; dist[u] + w) {
      dist[v] = dist[u] + w;
      relaxed = true;
    }
  }
  if (!relaxed)
    break;
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">struct</span> <span class="pl-en">Edge</span> {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> from, to;
  <span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> weight;
};

<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> INF = <span class="pl-c1">4e18</span>;
std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">dist</span>(n + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, INF);
dist[start] = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;

<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; i &lt;= n - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; ++i) {
  <span class="pl-k">bool</span> relaxed = <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> [u, v, w] : edges) {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (dist[u] != INF &amp;&amp; dist[v] &gt; dist[u] + w) {
      dist[v] = dist[u] + w;
      relaxed = <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
    }
  }
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!relaxed)
    <span class="pl-k">break</span>;
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">判断从 <code>start</code> 可达的负环：</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="bool has_negative_cycle = false;
for (auto [u, v, w] : edges) {
  if (dist[u] != INF &amp;&amp; dist[v] &gt; dist[u] + w) {
    has_negative_cycle = true;
    break;
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">bool</span> has_negative_cycle = <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> [u, v, w] : edges) {
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (dist[u] != INF &amp;&amp; dist[v] &gt; dist[u] + w) {
    has_negative_cycle = <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
    <span class="pl-k">break</span>;
  }
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">最多经过 <code>k</code> 条边的最短路：每一轮必须用上一轮的备份，避免同一轮连续松弛多条边。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::vector&lt;long long&gt; dist(n + 1, INF);
dist[start] = 0;

for (int step = 1; step &lt;= k; ++step) {
  auto prev = dist;
  for (auto [u, v, w] : edges) {
    if (prev[u] != INF)
      dist[v] = std::min(dist[v], prev[u] + w);
  }
}"><pre>std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">dist</span>(n + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, INF);
dist[start] = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;

<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> step = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; step &lt;= k; ++step) {
  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> prev = dist;
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> [u, v, w] : edges) {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (prev[u] != INF)
      dist[v] = <span class="pl-c1">std::min</span>(dist[v], prev[u] + w);
  }
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">差分约束：</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>x_v &lt;= x_u + w</code> 建边 <code>u -&gt; v, w</code></li>
<li>求一组可行解：加超级源 <code>0</code>，向所有点连 <code>0</code> 权边，再跑 Bellman-Ford</li>
<li>若存在负环，则约束无解</li>
</ul>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="for (int i = 1; i &lt;= n; ++i)
  edges.push_back({0, i, 0});
dist.assign(n + 1, INF);
dist[0] = 0;
// 跑 Bellman-Ford；若还能松弛，说明差分约束无解"><pre><span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; i &lt;= n; ++i)
  edges.push_back({<span class="pl-c1">0</span>, i, <span class="pl-c1">0</span>});
dist.assign(n + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, INF);
dist[<span class="pl-c1">0</span>] = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 跑 Bellman-Ford；若还能松弛，说明差分约束无解</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">SPFA</h4><a id="user-content-spfa" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: SPFA" href="#spfa"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Bellman-Ford 的队列优化版。只把被更新的点入队，再用它继续松弛出边。最坏仍是 <code>O(nm)</code>，但稀疏图/差分约束中常用。SLF 优化：如果新点距离比队首更小，就放到队首。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="const long long INF = 4e18;
std::vector&lt;long long&gt; dist(n + 1, INF);
std::vector&lt;bool&gt; in_queue(n + 1, false);
std::vector&lt;int&gt; count(n + 1, 0);
std::deque&lt;int&gt; q;

dist[start] = 0;
q.push(start);
in_queue[start] = true;
count[start] = 1;

bool has_negative_cycle = false;
while (!q.empty() &amp;&amp; !has_negative_cycle) {
  int u = q.front();
  q.pop();
  in_queue[u] = false;

  for (auto [v, w] : adj[u]) {
    if (dist[u] != INF &amp;&amp; dist[v] &gt; dist[u] + w) {
      dist[v] = dist[u] + w;
      if (!in_queue[v]) {
        if (!q.empty() &amp;&amp; dist[v] &lt; dist[q.front()])
          q.push_front(v);
        else
          q.push_back(v);
        in_queue[v] = true;
        if (++count[v] &gt; n) {
          has_negative_cycle = true;
          break;
        }
      }
    }
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> INF = <span class="pl-c1">4e18</span>;
std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">dist</span>(n + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, INF);
std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">bool</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">in_queue</span>(n + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, <span class="pl-c1">false</span>);
std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">count</span>(n + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, <span class="pl-c1">0</span>);
std::deque&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; q;

dist[start] = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
q.push(start);
in_queue[start] = <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
count[start] = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;

<span class="pl-k">bool</span> has_negative_cycle = <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;
<span class="pl-k">while</span> (!q.empty() &amp;&amp; !has_negative_cycle) {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> u = q.<span class="pl-c1">front</span>();
  q.<span class="pl-c1">pop</span>();
  in_queue[u] = <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;

  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> [v, w] : adj[u]) {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (dist[u] != INF &amp;&amp; dist[v] &gt; dist[u] + w) {
      dist[v] = dist[u] + w;
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!in_queue[v]) {
        <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!q.<span class="pl-c1">empty</span>() &amp;&amp; dist[v] &lt; dist[q.<span class="pl-c1">front</span>()])
          q.<span class="pl-c1">push_front</span>(v);
        <span class="pl-k">else</span>
          q.<span class="pl-c1">push_back</span>(v);
        in_queue[v] = <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
        <span class="pl-k">if</span> (++count[v] &gt; n) {
          has_negative_cycle = <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
          <span class="pl-k">break</span>;
        }
      }
    }
  }
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">差分约束要检查全图负环时，加超级源后从 <code>0</code> 开始跑；或者一开始把所有点都入队：</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="for (int i = 1; i &lt;= n; ++i) {
  dist[i] = 0;
  q.push_back(i);
  in_queue[i] = true;
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; i &lt;= n; ++i) {
  dist[i] = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
  q.<span class="pl-c1">push_back</span>(i);
  in_queue[i] = <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Floyd-Warshall（全源最短路）</h4><a id="user-content-floyd-warshall全源最短路" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Floyd-Warshall（全源最短路）" href="#floyd-warshall全源最短路"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">适用：点数较小的全源最短路，复杂度 <code>O(n^3)</code>。通常用 0-based 或 1-based 都可以，下面是 1-based。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="const long long INF = 4e18;
std::vector dist(n + 1, std::vector&lt;long long&gt;(n + 1, INF));

for (int i = 1; i &lt;= n; ++i)
  dist[i][i] = 0;
for (auto [u, v, w] : edges)
  dist[u][v] = std::min(dist[u][v], w); // 无向图再加 dist[v][u]

for (int k = 1; k &lt;= n; ++k)
  for (int i = 1; i &lt;= n; ++i)
    for (int j = 1; j &lt;= n; ++j)
      if (dist[i][k] != INF &amp;&amp; dist[k][j] != INF)
        dist[i][j] = std::min(dist[i][j], dist[i][k] + dist[k][j]);"><pre><span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> INF = <span class="pl-c1">4e18</span>;
std::vector <span class="pl-en">dist</span>(n + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span>&gt;(n + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, INF));

<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; i &lt;= n; ++i)
  dist[i][i] = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> [u, v, w] : edges)
  dist[u][v] = std::min(dist[u][v], w); <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 无向图再加 dist[v][u]</span>

<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> k = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; k &lt;= n; ++k)
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; i &lt;= n; ++i)
    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> j = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; j &lt;= n; ++j)
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (dist[i][k] != INF &amp;&amp; dist[k][j] != INF)
        dist[i][j] = std::min(dist[i][j], dist[i][k] + dist[k][j]);</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">路径恢复：</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::vector next(n + 1, std::vector&lt;int&gt;(n + 1, -1));
for (int i = 1; i &lt;= n; ++i)
  next[i][i] = i;
for (auto [u, v, w] : edges) {
  if (w &lt; dist[u][v]) {
    dist[u][v] = w;
    next[u][v] = v;
  }
}

for (int k = 1; k &lt;= n; ++k)
  for (int i = 1; i &lt;= n; ++i)
    for (int j = 1; j &lt;= n; ++j)
      if (dist[i][k] != INF &amp;&amp; dist[k][j] != INF &amp;&amp;
          dist[i][j] &gt; dist[i][k] + dist[k][j]) {
        dist[i][j] = dist[i][k] + dist[k][j];
        next[i][j] = next[i][k];
      }

std::vector&lt;int&gt; path;
for (int u = start; u != target; u = next[u][target])
  path.push_back(u);
path.push_back(target);"><pre>std::vector <span class="pl-en">next</span>(n + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;(n + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, -<span class="pl-c1">1</span>));
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; i &lt;= n; ++i)
  next[i][i] = i;
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> [u, v, w] : edges) {
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (w &lt; dist[u][v]) {
    dist[u][v] = w;
    next[u][v] = v;
  }
}

<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> k = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; k &lt;= n; ++k)
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; i &lt;= n; ++i)
    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> j = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; j &lt;= n; ++j)
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (dist[i][k] != INF &amp;&amp; dist[k][j] != INF &amp;&amp;
          dist[i][j] &gt; dist[i][k] + dist[k][j]) {
        dist[i][j] = dist[i][k] + dist[k][j];
        next[i][j] = next[i][k];
      }

std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; path;
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> u = start; u != target; u = next[u][target])
  path.push_back(u);
path.push_back(target);</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">传递闭包：判断任意两点是否可达。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::vector reachable(n + 1, std::vector&lt;bool&gt;(n + 1, false));
for (int i = 1; i &lt;= n; ++i)
  reachable[i][i] = true;
for (auto [u, v] : edges)
  reachable[u][v] = true;

for (int k = 1; k &lt;= n; ++k)
  for (int i = 1; i &lt;= n; ++i)
    for (int j = 1; j &lt;= n; ++j)
      reachable[i][j] = reachable[i][j] || (reachable[i][k] &amp;&amp; reachable[k][j]);"><pre>std::vector <span class="pl-en">reachable</span>(n + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">bool</span>&gt;(n + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, <span class="pl-c1">false</span>));
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; i &lt;= n; ++i)
  reachable[i][i] = <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> [u, v] : edges)
  reachable[u][v] = <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;

<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> k = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; k &lt;= n; ++k)
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; i &lt;= n; ++i)
    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> j = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; j &lt;= n; ++j)
      reachable[i][j] = reachable[i][j] || (reachable[i][k] &amp;&amp; reachable[k][j]);</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">最小生成树（MST）</h3><a id="user-content-最小生成树mst" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 最小生成树（MST）" href="#最小生成树mst"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">选型：</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>边集输入、稀疏图：Kruskal，<code>O(m log m)</code>，最好写。</li>
<li>邻接矩阵、完全图、稠密图：朴素 Prim，<code>O(n^2)</code>。</li>
<li>邻接表且边较多但不稠密：堆优化 Prim，<code>O(m log m)</code>。</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">应用：</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>城市/网络/道路最小连接成本。</li>
<li>完全图坐标点 MST：通常用朴素 Prim，距离边用到时再算。</li>
<li>“已存在免费边”：先把免费边权设为 <code>0</code>，或先用并查集合并。</li>
<li>最大生成树：把排序改成从大到小，或 Prim 选最大边。</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Kruskal</h4><a id="user-content-kruskal" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Kruskal" href="#kruskal"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="struct Edge {
  int u, v;
  long long w;
  bool operator&lt;(const Edge &amp;other) const {
    return w &lt; other.w;
  }
};

class DSU {
private:
  std::vector&lt;int&gt; parent, size;

public:
  explicit DSU(int n) : parent(n + 1), size(n + 1, 1) {
    std::iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);
  }

  auto find(int x) -&gt; int {
    return parent[x] == x ? x : parent[x] = find(parent[x]);
  }

  auto unite(int x, int y) -&gt; bool {
    int rx = find(x), ry = find(y);
    if (rx == ry)
      return false;
    if (size[rx] &lt; size[ry])
      std::swap(rx, ry);
    parent[ry] = rx;
    size[rx] += size[ry];
    return true;
  }
};

std::sort(edges.begin(), edges.end());
DSU dsu(n);
long long mst = 0;
int count = 0;

for (auto [u, v, w] : edges) {
  if (dsu.unite(u, v)) {
    mst += w;
    if (++count == n - 1)
      break;
  }
}

if (count != n - 1) {
  // 图不连通，不存在生成树
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">struct</span> <span class="pl-en">Edge</span> {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> u, v;
  <span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> w;
  <span class="pl-k">bool</span> <span class="pl-k">operator</span>&lt;(<span class="pl-k">const</span> Edge &amp;other) <span class="pl-k">const</span> {
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> w &lt; other.<span class="pl-smi">w</span>;
  }
};

<span class="pl-k">class</span> <span class="pl-en">DSU</span> {
<span class="pl-k">private:</span>
  std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; parent, size;

<span class="pl-k">public:</span>
  <span class="pl-k">explicit</span> <span class="pl-en">DSU</span>(<span class="pl-k">int</span> n) : parent(n + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>), size(n + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, <span class="pl-c1">1</span>) {
    <span class="pl-c1">std::iota</span>(parent.<span class="pl-c1">begin</span>(), parent.<span class="pl-c1">end</span>(), <span class="pl-c1">0</span>);
  }

  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">find</span>(<span class="pl-k">int</span> x) -&gt; int {
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> parent[x] == x ? x : parent[x] = <span class="pl-c1">find</span>(parent[x]);
  }

  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">unite</span>(<span class="pl-k">int</span> x, <span class="pl-k">int</span> y) -&gt; bool {
    <span class="pl-k">int</span> rx = <span class="pl-c1">find</span>(x), ry = <span class="pl-c1">find</span>(y);
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (rx == ry)
      <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (size[rx] &lt; size[ry])
      <span class="pl-c1">std::swap</span>(rx, ry);
    parent[ry] = rx;
    size[rx] += size[ry];
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
  }
};

<span class="pl-en">std::sort</span>(edges.begin(), edges.end());
DSU <span class="pl-en">dsu</span>(n);
<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> mst = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
<span class="pl-k">int</span> count = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;

<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> [u, v, w] : edges) {
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (dsu.<span class="pl-c1">unite</span>(u, v)) {
    mst += w;
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (++count == n - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>)
      <span class="pl-k">break</span>;
  }
}

<span class="pl-k">if</span> (count != n - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>) {
  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 图不连通，不存在生成树</span>
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Prim 邻接矩阵版</h4><a id="user-content-prim-邻接矩阵版" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Prim 邻接矩阵版" href="#prim-邻接矩阵版"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">适合稠密图。<code>matrix[u][v]</code> 是边权，不连通边设为 <code>INF</code>。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="const long long INF = 4e18;
std::vector&lt;long long&gt; min_dist(n, INF);
std::vector&lt;bool&gt; visited(n, false);

min_dist[0] = 0;
long long mst = 0;

for (int step = 0; step &lt; n; ++step) {
  int u = -1;
  for (int i = 0; i &lt; n; ++i)
    if (!visited[i] &amp;&amp; (u == -1 || min_dist[i] &lt; min_dist[u]))
      u = i;

  if (u == -1 || min_dist[u] == INF) {
    // 图不连通
    break;
  }

  visited[u] = true;
  mst += min_dist[u];

  for (int v = 0; v &lt; n; ++v)
    if (!visited[v] &amp;&amp; matrix[u][v] &lt; min_dist[v])
      min_dist[v] = matrix[u][v];
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> INF = <span class="pl-c1">4e18</span>;
std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">min_dist</span>(n, INF);
std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">bool</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">visited</span>(n, <span class="pl-c1">false</span>);

min_dist[<span class="pl-c1">0</span>] = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> mst = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;

<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> step = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; step &lt; n; ++step) {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> u = -<span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; i &lt; n; ++i)
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!visited[i] &amp;&amp; (u == -<span class="pl-c1">1</span> || min_dist[i] &lt; min_dist[u]))
      u = i;

  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (u == -<span class="pl-c1">1</span> || min_dist[u] == INF) {
    <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 图不连通</span>
    <span class="pl-k">break</span>;
  }

  visited[u] = <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
  mst += min_dist[u];

  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> v = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; v &lt; n; ++v)
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!visited[v] &amp;&amp; matrix[u][v] &lt; min_dist[v])
      min_dist[v] = matrix[u][v];
}</pre></div>
