<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Prim 优先队列版</h4><a id="user-content-prim-优先队列版" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Prim 优先队列版" href="#prim-优先队列版"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">适合邻接表。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::vector&lt;bool&gt; visited(n + 1, false);
std::priority_queue&lt;std::pair&lt;long long, int&gt;,
                    std::vector&lt;std::pair&lt;long long, int&gt;&gt;,
                    std::greater&lt;&gt;&gt; pq;

pq.emplace(0, 1);
long long mst = 0;
int count = 0;

while (!pq.empty() &amp;&amp; count &lt; n) {
  auto [w, u] = pq.top();
  pq.pop();
  if (visited[u])
    continue;

  visited[u] = true;
  mst += w;
  ++count;

  for (auto [v, weight] : adj[u])
    if (!visited[v])
      pq.emplace(weight, v);
}

if (count != n) {
  // 图不连通
}"><pre>std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">bool</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">visited</span>(n + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, <span class="pl-c1">false</span>);
std::priority_queue&lt;std::pair&lt;<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span>, <span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;,
                    std::vector&lt;std::pair&lt;<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span>, <span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;&gt;,
                    std::greater&lt;&gt;&gt; pq;

pq.emplace(<span class="pl-c1">0</span>, <span class="pl-c1">1</span>);
<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> mst = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
<span class="pl-k">int</span> count = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;

<span class="pl-k">while</span> (!pq.empty() &amp;&amp; count &lt; n) {
  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> [w, u] = pq.<span class="pl-c1">top</span>();
  pq.<span class="pl-c1">pop</span>();
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (visited[u])
    <span class="pl-k">continue</span>;

  visited[u] = <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
  mst += w;
  ++count;

  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> [v, weight] : adj[u])
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!visited[v])
      pq.<span class="pl-c1">emplace</span>(weight, v);
}

<span class="pl-k">if</span> (count != n) {
  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 图不连通</span>
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">关键路径（Critical Path / AOE 网）</h3><a id="user-content-关键路径critical-path--aoe-网" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 关键路径（Critical Path / AOE 网）" href="#关键路径critical-path--aoe-网"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">适用：有向无环图 DAG，边表示活动，边权表示活动耗时。求项目最短完成时间、关键活动、哪些任务不能延误。</p>
<p dir="auto">记号：</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>ve[u]</code>：事件 <code>u</code> 的最早发生时间</li>
<li><code>vl[u]</code>：事件 <code>u</code> 的最晚发生时间</li>
<li>边 <code>u -&gt; v, w</code> 的活动最早开始 <code>e = ve[u]</code></li>
<li>边 <code>u -&gt; v, w</code> 的活动最晚开始 <code>l = vl[v] - w</code></li>
<li>若 <code>e == l</code>，该活动是关键活动</li>
</ul>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="struct Edge {
  int from, to, weight;
};

std::vector&lt;std::vector&lt;std::pair&lt;int, int&gt;&gt;&gt; adj(n);
std::vector&lt;int&gt; indegree(n, 0);
std::vector&lt;Edge&gt; edges;

for (auto [u, v, w] : edges) {
  adj[u].emplace_back(v, w);
  ++indegree[v];
}

std::queue&lt;int&gt; q;
std::vector&lt;int&gt; topo;
std::vector&lt;long long&gt; ve(n, 0);

for (int i = 0; i &lt; n; ++i)
  if (indegree[i] == 0)
    q.push(i);

while (!q.empty()) {
  int u = q.front();
  q.pop();
  topo.push_back(u);

  for (auto [v, w] : adj[u]) {
    ve[v] = std::max(ve[v], ve[u] + w);
    if (--indegree[v] == 0)
      q.push(v);
  }
}

if (topo.size() != n) {
  // 有环，不是 AOE 网
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">struct</span> <span class="pl-en">Edge</span> {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> from, to, weight;
};

std::vector&lt;std::vector&lt;std::pair&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>, <span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;&gt;&gt; <span class="pl-en">adj</span>(n);
std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">indegree</span>(n, <span class="pl-c1">0</span>);
std::vector&lt;Edge&gt; edges;

<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> [u, v, w] : edges) {
  adj[u].<span class="pl-c1">emplace_back</span>(v, w);
  ++indegree[v];
}

std::queue&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; q;
std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; topo;
std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">ve</span>(n, <span class="pl-c1">0</span>);

<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; i &lt; n; ++i)
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (indegree[i] == <span class="pl-c1">0</span>)
    q.push(i);

<span class="pl-k">while</span> (!q.empty()) {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> u = q.<span class="pl-c1">front</span>();
  q.<span class="pl-c1">pop</span>();
  topo.<span class="pl-c1">push_back</span>(u);

  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> [v, w] : adj[u]) {
    ve[v] = <span class="pl-c1">std::max</span>(ve[v], ve[u] + w);
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (--indegree[v] == <span class="pl-c1">0</span>)
      q.<span class="pl-c1">push</span>(v);
  }
}

<span class="pl-k">if</span> (topo.size() != n) {
  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 有环，不是 AOE 网</span>
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">反向求最晚发生时间：</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="long long project_time = *std::ranges::max_element(ve);

std::vector&lt;long long&gt; vl(n, project_time);
for (int i = n - 1; i &gt;= 0; --i) {
  int u = topo[i];
  for (auto [v, w] : adj[u]) {
    vl[u] = std::min(vl[u], vl[v] - w);
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> project_time = *<span class="pl-en">std::ranges::max_element</span>(ve);

std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">vl</span>(n, project_time);
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = n - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; i &gt;= <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; --i) {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> u = topo[i];
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> [v, w] : adj[u]) {
    vl[u] = <span class="pl-c1">std::min</span>(vl[u], vl[v] - w);
  }
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">输出关键活动：</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="for (auto [u, v, w] : edges) {
  long long earliest = ve[u];
  long long latest = vl[v] - w;
  if (earliest == latest) {
    // u -&gt; v 是关键活动
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> [u, v, w] : edges) {
  <span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> earliest = ve[u];
  <span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> latest = vl[v] - w;
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (earliest == latest) {
    <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> u -&gt; v 是关键活动</span>
  }
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">应用：</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>项目最短完成时间：<code>project_time</code></li>
<li>关键路径长度：<code>project_time</code></li>
<li>活动可延误时间：<code>latest - earliest</code></li>
<li>多条关键路径：所有 <code>earliest == latest</code> 的边组成的关键子图中可能有多条路径</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">常用技巧</h2><a id="user-content-常用技巧" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 常用技巧" href="#常用技巧"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">哈希表 / set</h3><a id="user-content-哈希表--set" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 哈希表 / set" href="#哈希表--set"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">判重、计数、记录最早或最晚位置。<code>std::set</code> 有序，查找和插入 <code>O(log n)</code>；<code>std::unordered_set</code> 均摊 <code>O(1)</code>，但不能有序遍历。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::unordered_map&lt;int, int&gt; count;
for (int x : a)
  ++count[x];

std::unordered_set&lt;int&gt; seen;
for (int x : a) {
  if (seen.contains(target - x)) {
    // 找到一组和为 target 的数
  }
  seen.insert(x);
}"><pre>std::unordered_map&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>, <span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; count;
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> x : a)
  ++count[x];

std::unordered_set&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; seen;
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> x : a) {
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (seen.<span class="pl-c1">contains</span>(target - x)) {
    <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 找到一组和为 target 的数</span>
  }
  seen.<span class="pl-c1">insert</span>(x);
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">值到下标列表，配合二分找最小合法下标：</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::vector&lt;std::vector&lt;int&gt;&gt; pos(max_value + 1);
for (int i = 0; i &lt; n; ++i)
  pos[a[i]].push_back(i);

auto it = std::upper_bound(pos[value].begin(), pos[value].end(), i);
if (it != pos[value].end()) {
  int j = *it; // 最小的 j &gt; i
}"><pre>std::vector&lt;std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;&gt; <span class="pl-en">pos</span>(max_value + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>);
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; i &lt; n; ++i)
  pos[a[i]].push_back(i);

<span class="pl-k">auto</span> it = std::upper_bound(pos[value].begin(), pos[value].end(), i);
<span class="pl-k">if</span> (it != pos[value].end()) {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> j = *it; <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 最小的 j &gt; i</span>
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">双指针 / 滑动窗口</h3><a id="user-content-双指针--滑动窗口" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 双指针 / 滑动窗口" href="#双指针--滑动窗口"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">双指针适用：数组有序、窗口性质随左右端点单调变化、每个元素最多进出窗口一次。</p>
<p dir="auto">有序数组二数和：</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="int l = 0, r = n - 1;
while (l &lt; r) {
  int sum = a[l] + a[r];
  if (sum &lt; target)
    ++l;
  else if (sum &gt; target)
    --r;
  else
    break;
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">int</span> l = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>, r = n - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
<span class="pl-k">while</span> (l &lt; r) {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> sum = a[l] + a[r];
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (sum &lt; target)
    ++l;
  <span class="pl-k">else</span> <span class="pl-k">if</span> (sum &gt; target)
    --r;
  <span class="pl-k">else</span>
    <span class="pl-k">break</span>;
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">滑动窗口：</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="int l = 0;
long long sum = 0;
for (int r = 0; r &lt; n; ++r) {
  sum += a[r];
  while (l &lt;= r &amp;&amp; !check_window(l, r, sum)) {
    sum -= a[l];
    ++l;
  }
  // [l, r] 是当前合法窗口
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">int</span> l = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> sum = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> r = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; r &lt; n; ++r) {
  sum += a[r];
  <span class="pl-k">while</span> (l &lt;= r &amp;&amp; !<span class="pl-c1">check_window</span>(l, r, sum)) {
    sum -= a[l];
    ++l;
  }
  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> [l, r] 是当前合法窗口</span>
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">队列 / deque</h3><a id="user-content-队列--deque" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 队列 / deque" href="#队列--deque"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">普通 BFS 用 <code>queue</code>；需要两端进出、维护窗口或 0-1 BFS 时用 <code>deque</code>。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::queue&lt;int&gt; q;
dist[start] = 0;
q.push(start);

while (!q.empty()) {
  int u = q.front();
  q.pop();
  for (int v : g[u]) {
    if (dist[v] != -1)
      continue;
    dist[v] = dist[u] + 1;
    q.push(v);
  }
}"><pre>std::queue&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; q;
dist[start] = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
q.push(start);

<span class="pl-k">while</span> (!q.empty()) {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> u = q.<span class="pl-c1">front</span>();
  q.<span class="pl-c1">pop</span>();
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> v : g[u]) {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (dist[v] != -<span class="pl-c1">1</span>)
      <span class="pl-k">continue</span>;
    dist[v] = dist[u] + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
    q.<span class="pl-c1">push</span>(v);
  }
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">0-1 BFS：</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::deque&lt;int&gt; q;
dist[start] = 0;
q.push_front(start);

while (!q.empty()) {
  int u = q.front();
  q.pop_front();
  for (auto [v, w] : g[u]) {
    if (dist[u] + w &lt; dist[v]) {
      dist[v] = dist[u] + w;
      if (w == 0)
        q.push_front(v);
      else
        q.push_back(v);
    }
  }
}"><pre>std::deque&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; q;
dist[start] = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
q.push_front(start);

<span class="pl-k">while</span> (!q.empty()) {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> u = q.<span class="pl-c1">front</span>();
  q.<span class="pl-c1">pop_front</span>();
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> [v, w] : g[u]) {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (dist[u] + w &lt; dist[v]) {
      dist[v] = dist[u] + w;
      <span class="pl-k">if</span> (w == <span class="pl-c1">0</span>)
        q.<span class="pl-c1">push_front</span>(v);
      <span class="pl-k">else</span>
        q.<span class="pl-c1">push_back</span>(v);
    }
  }
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">撤销栈 / 状态历史</h3><a id="user-content-撤销栈--状态历史" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 撤销栈 / 状态历史" href="#撤销栈--状态历史"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">适用：编辑器撤销、版本回退、搜索中恢复状态。把每次修改前的旧值压栈，撤销时反向恢复。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="struct Change {
  int index;
  int old_value;
};

std::vector&lt;int&gt; a(n);
std::vector&lt;Change&gt; history;

auto assign_value = [&amp;](int index, int value) {
  history.push_back({index, a[index]});
  a[index] = value;
};

auto snapshot = [&amp;]() {
  return static_cast&lt;int&gt;(history.size());
};

auto rollback = [&amp;](int checkpoint) {
  while (static_cast&lt;int&gt;(history.size()) &gt; checkpoint) {
    auto [index, old_value] = history.back();
    history.pop_back();
    a[index] = old_value;
  }
};"><pre><span class="pl-k">struct</span> <span class="pl-en">Change</span> {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> index;
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> old_value;
};

std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">a</span>(n);
std::vector&lt;Change&gt; history;

<span class="pl-k">auto</span> assign_value = [&amp;](<span class="pl-k">int</span> index, <span class="pl-k">int</span> value) {
  history.<span class="pl-c1">push_back</span>({index, a[index]});
  a[index] = value;
};

<span class="pl-k">auto</span> snapshot = [&amp;]() {
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-k">static_cast</span>&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;(history.<span class="pl-c1">size</span>());
};

<span class="pl-k">auto</span> rollback = [&amp;](<span class="pl-k">int</span> checkpoint) {
  <span class="pl-k">while</span> (<span class="pl-k">static_cast</span>&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;(history.<span class="pl-c1">size</span>()) &gt; checkpoint) {
    <span class="pl-k">auto</span> [index, old_value] = history.<span class="pl-c1">back</span>();
    history.<span class="pl-c1">pop_back</span>();
    a[index] = old_value;
  }
};</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">堆 / 优先队列</h3><a id="user-content-堆--优先队列" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 堆 / 优先队列" href="#堆--优先队列"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">默认是大根堆；小根堆用 <code>std::greater&lt;&gt;</code>。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::priority_queue&lt;int&gt; max_heap;
std::priority_queue&lt;int, std::vector&lt;int&gt;, std::greater&lt;&gt;&gt; min_heap;"><pre>std::priority_queue&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; max_heap;
std::priority_queue&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>, std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;, std::greater&lt;&gt;&gt; min_heap;</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">自定义排序：比较器返回 <code>true</code> 表示优先级更低，会排到后面。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="struct Node {
  int value;
  int id;
};

struct Compare {
  auto operator()(const Node &amp;a, const Node &amp;b) const -&gt; bool {
    if (a.value != b.value)
      return a.value &gt; b.value; // 小 value 优先
    return a.id &gt; b.id;
  }
};

std::priority_queue&lt;Node, std::vector&lt;Node&gt;, Compare&gt; pq;"><pre><span class="pl-k">struct</span> <span class="pl-en">Node</span> {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> value;
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> id;
};

<span class="pl-k">struct</span> <span class="pl-en">Compare</span> {
  <span class="pl-k">auto</span> <span class="pl-en">operator</span>()(<span class="pl-k">const</span> Node &amp;a, <span class="pl-k">const</span> Node &amp;b) <span class="pl-k">const</span> -&gt; bool {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (a.<span class="pl-smi">value</span> != b.<span class="pl-smi">value</span>)
      <span class="pl-k">return</span> a.<span class="pl-smi">value</span> &gt; b.<span class="pl-smi">value</span>; <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 小 value 优先</span>
    <span class="pl-k">return</span> a.<span class="pl-smi">id</span> &gt; b.<span class="pl-smi">id</span>;
  }
};

std::priority_queue&lt;Node, std::vector&lt;Node&gt;, Compare&gt; pq;</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Dijkstra / Prim 里常用懒删除：弹出时如果状态已经过期，直接 <code>continue</code>。</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">单调栈</h3><a id="user-content-单调栈" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 单调栈" href="#单调栈"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">适用：找每个元素左/右第一个更大或更小的元素、柱状图最大矩形、字典序删除字符。</p>
<p dir="auto">右侧第一个更大元素：</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::vector&lt;int&gt; next_greater(n, -1);
std::vector&lt;int&gt; st; // 栈内下标对应值单调递减

for (int i = 0; i &lt; n; ++i) {
  while (!st.empty() &amp;&amp; a[st.back()] &lt; a[i]) {
    next_greater[st.back()] = i;
    st.pop_back();
  }
  st.push_back(i);
}"><pre>std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">next_greater</span>(n, -<span class="pl-c1">1</span>);
std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; st; <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 栈内下标对应值单调递减</span>

<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; i &lt; n; ++i) {
  <span class="pl-k">while</span> (!st.<span class="pl-c1">empty</span>() &amp;&amp; a[st.<span class="pl-c1">back</span>()] &lt; a[i]) {
    next_greater[st.<span class="pl-c1">back</span>()] = i;
    st.<span class="pl-c1">pop_back</span>();
  }
  st.<span class="pl-c1">push_back</span>(i);
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">柱状图最大矩形：</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="a.push_back(0); // 哨兵，清空栈
std::vector&lt;int&gt; st;
long long ans = 0;

for (int i = 0; i &lt; a.size(); ++i) {
  while (!st.empty() &amp;&amp; a[st.back()] &gt; a[i]) {
    int h = a[st.back()];
    st.pop_back();
    int left = st.empty() ? -1 : st.back();
    ans = std::max(ans, 1LL * h * (i - left - 1));
  }
  st.push_back(i);
}"><pre>a.push_back(<span class="pl-c1">0</span>); <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 哨兵，清空栈</span>
std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; st;
<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> ans = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;

<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; i &lt; a.size(); ++i) {
  <span class="pl-k">while</span> (!st.<span class="pl-c1">empty</span>() &amp;&amp; a[st.<span class="pl-c1">back</span>()] &gt; a[i]) {
    <span class="pl-k">int</span> h = a[st.<span class="pl-c1">back</span>()];
    st.<span class="pl-c1">pop_back</span>();
    <span class="pl-k">int</span> left = st.<span class="pl-c1">empty</span>() ? -<span class="pl-c1">1</span> : st.<span class="pl-c1">back</span>();
    ans = <span class="pl-c1">std::max</span>(ans, <span class="pl-c1">1LL</span> * h * (i - left - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>));
  }
  st.<span class="pl-c1">push_back</span>(i);
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">单调队列</h3><a id="user-content-单调队列" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 单调队列" href="#单调队列"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">适用：滑动窗口最大/最小值、窗口内 DP 最值优化。队列里存下标，队首永远是当前窗口最优。</p>
<p dir="auto">滑动窗口最大值：</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::deque&lt;int&gt; q;
std::vector&lt;int&gt; ans;

for (int i = 0; i &lt; n; ++i) {
  while (!q.empty() &amp;&amp; q.front() &lt;= i - k)
    q.pop_front(); // 过期
  while (!q.empty() &amp;&amp; a[q.back()] &lt;= a[i])
    q.pop_back(); // 保持递减
  q.push_back(i);
  if (i &gt;= k - 1)
    ans.push_back(a[q.front()]);
}"><pre>std::deque&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; q;
std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; ans;

<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; i &lt; n; ++i) {
  <span class="pl-k">while</span> (!q.<span class="pl-c1">empty</span>() &amp;&amp; q.<span class="pl-c1">front</span>() &lt;= i - k)
    q.<span class="pl-c1">pop_front</span>(); <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 过期</span>
  <span class="pl-k">while</span> (!q.<span class="pl-c1">empty</span>() &amp;&amp; a[q.<span class="pl-c1">back</span>()] &lt;= a[i])
    q.<span class="pl-c1">pop_back</span>(); <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 保持递减</span>
  q.<span class="pl-c1">push_back</span>(i);
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (i &gt;= k - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>)
    ans.<span class="pl-c1">push_back</span>(a[q.<span class="pl-c1">front</span>()]);
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">DP 窗口最大值：</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="// dp[i] = value[i] + max(dp[j]), i - k &lt;= j &lt; i
std::deque&lt;int&gt; q;
for (int i = 0; i &lt; n; ++i) {
  while (!q.empty() &amp;&amp; q.front() &lt; i - k)
    q.pop_front();
  if (!q.empty())
    dp[i] = value[i] + dp[q.front()];
  while (!q.empty() &amp;&amp; dp[q.back()] &lt;= dp[i])
    q.pop_back();
  q.push_back(i);
}"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> dp[i] = value[i] + max(dp[j]), i - k &lt;= j &lt; i</span>
std::deque&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; q;
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; i &lt; n; ++i) {
  <span class="pl-k">while</span> (!q.<span class="pl-c1">empty</span>() &amp;&amp; q.<span class="pl-c1">front</span>() &lt; i - k)
    q.<span class="pl-c1">pop_front</span>();
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!q.<span class="pl-c1">empty</span>())
    dp[i] = value[i] + dp[q.<span class="pl-c1">front</span>()];
  <span class="pl-k">while</span> (!q.<span class="pl-c1">empty</span>() &amp;&amp; dp[q.<span class="pl-c1">back</span>()] &lt;= dp[i])
    q.<span class="pl-c1">pop_back</span>();
  q.<span class="pl-c1">push_back</span>(i);
}</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">答案二分</h3><a id="user-content-答案二分" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 答案二分" href="#答案二分"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">把“求最优值”改成“判断答案 <code>x</code> 是否可行”。关键是判定函数 <code>check(x)</code> 必须单调。</p>
<p dir="auto">最大值最小化：找最小可行值，形如 <code>false false true true</code>。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="auto check = [&amp;](long long x) {
  // 是否能让最大代价 &lt;= x
  return true;
};

long long l = low, r = high;
while (l &lt; r) {
  long long mid = l + ((r - l) &gt;&gt; 1);
  if (check(mid))
    r = mid;
  else
    l = mid + 1;
}
// l 是最小可行值"><pre><span class="pl-k">auto</span> check = [&amp;](<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> x) {
  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 是否能让最大代价 &lt;= x</span>
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
};

<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> l = low, r = high;
<span class="pl-k">while</span> (l &lt; r) {
  <span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> mid = l + ((r - l) &gt;&gt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>);
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (<span class="pl-c1">check</span>(mid))
    r = mid;
  <span class="pl-k">else</span>
    l = mid + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
}
<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> l 是最小可行值</span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">应用：分割数组最小化最大段和、运货最小容量、最小化最大距离。</p>
<p dir="auto">最小值最大化：找最大可行值，形如 <code>true true false false</code>。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="auto check = [&amp;](long long x) {
  // 是否能让最小收益/间距 &gt;= x
  return true;
};

long long l = low, r = high;
while (l &lt; r) {
  long long mid = l + ((r - l + 1) &gt;&gt; 1);
  if (check(mid))
    l = mid;
  else
    r = mid - 1;
}
// l 是最大可行值"><pre><span class="pl-k">auto</span> check = [&amp;](<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> x) {
  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 是否能让最小收益/间距 &gt;= x</span>
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
};

<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> l = low, r = high;
<span class="pl-k">while</span> (l &lt; r) {
  <span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> mid = l + ((r - l + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>) &gt;&gt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>);
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (<span class="pl-c1">check</span>(mid))
    l = mid;
  <span class="pl-k">else</span>
    r = mid - <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
}
<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> l 是最大可行值</span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">应用：最大化最小间距、最大化最小分数、选点/放置类问题。</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">约数分解 / 最小质因数</h3><a id="user-content-约数分解--最小质因数" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 约数分解 / 最小质因数" href="#约数分解--最小质因数"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">质数筛法：</p>
<p dir="auto">埃氏筛，简单好写，复杂度 <code>O(n log log n)</code>。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::vector&lt;bool&gt; is_prime(limit + 1, true);
is_prime[0] = is_prime[1] = false;

for (int i = 2; i * i &lt;= limit; ++i) {
  if (!is_prime[i])
    continue;
  for (long long j = 1LL * i * i; j &lt;= limit; j += i)
    is_prime[j] = false;
}

std::vector&lt;int&gt; primes;
for (int i = 2; i &lt;= limit; ++i)
  if (is_prime[i])
    primes.push_back(i);"><pre>std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">bool</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">is_prime</span>(limit + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, <span class="pl-c1">true</span>);
is_prime[<span class="pl-c1">0</span>] = is_prime[<span class="pl-c1">1</span>] = <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;

<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">2</span>; i * i &lt;= limit; ++i) {
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!is_prime[i])
    <span class="pl-k">continue</span>;
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> j = <span class="pl-c1">1LL</span> * i * i; j &lt;= limit; j += i)
    is_prime[j] = <span class="pl-c1">false</span>;
}

std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; primes;
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">2</span>; i &lt;= limit; ++i)
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (is_prime[i])
    primes.push_back(i);</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">线性筛，每个合数只被最小质因数筛一次，复杂度 <code>O(n)</code>。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::vector&lt;int&gt; primes;
std::vector&lt;bool&gt; is_composite(limit + 1, false);

for (int i = 2; i &lt;= limit; ++i) {
  if (!is_composite[i])
    primes.push_back(i);
  for (int p : primes) {
    if (1LL * i * p &gt; limit)
      break;
    is_composite[i * p] = true;
    if (i % p == 0)
      break;
  }
}"><pre>std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; primes;
std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">bool</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">is_composite</span>(limit + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, <span class="pl-c1">false</span>);

<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">2</span>; i &lt;= limit; ++i) {
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!is_composite[i])
    primes.<span class="pl-c1">push_back</span>(i);
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> p : primes) {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (<span class="pl-c1">1LL</span> * i * p &gt; limit)
      <span class="pl-k">break</span>;
    is_composite[i * p] = <span class="pl-c1">true</span>;
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (i % p == <span class="pl-c1">0</span>)
      <span class="pl-k">break</span>;
  }
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">多次分解整数时先筛 <code>spf[x]</code>，<code>spf[x]</code> 表示 <code>x</code> 的最小质因数。复杂度 <code>O(M log log M)</code> 预处理，单次分解约 <code>O(质因数个数)</code>。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::vector&lt;int&gt; spf(limit + 1, 0);
for (int i = 2; i &lt;= limit; ++i) {
  if (spf[i] != 0)
    continue;
  for (long long j = i; j &lt;= limit; j += i)
    if (spf[j] == 0)
      spf[j] = i;
}

auto factorize = [&amp;](int x) {
  std::vector&lt;std::pair&lt;int, int&gt;&gt; factors;
  while (x &gt; 1) {
    int p = spf[x], cnt = 0;
    while (x % p == 0) {
      x /= p;
      ++cnt;
    }
    factors.push_back({p, cnt});
  }
  return factors;
};"><pre>std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; <span class="pl-en">spf</span>(limit + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, <span class="pl-c1">0</span>);
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">2</span>; i &lt;= limit; ++i) {
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (spf[i] != <span class="pl-c1">0</span>)
    <span class="pl-k">continue</span>;
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">long</span> <span class="pl-k">long</span> j = i; j &lt;= limit; j += i)
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (spf[j] == <span class="pl-c1">0</span>)
      spf[j] = i;
}

<span class="pl-k">auto</span> factorize = [&amp;](<span class="pl-k">int</span> x) {
  std::vector&lt;std::pair&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>, <span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;&gt; factors;
  <span class="pl-k">while</span> (x &gt; <span class="pl-c1">1</span>) {
    <span class="pl-k">int</span> p = spf[x], cnt = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
    <span class="pl-k">while</span> (x % p == <span class="pl-c1">0</span>) {
      x /= p;
      ++cnt;
    }
    factors.<span class="pl-c1">push_back</span>({p, cnt});
  }
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> factors;
};</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">生成所有约数：</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::vector&lt;int&gt; divisors{1};
for (auto [p, cnt] : factors) {
  int size = static_cast&lt;int&gt;(divisors.size());
  int power = 1;
  for (int e = 1; e &lt;= cnt; ++e) {
    power *= p;
    for (int i = 0; i &lt; size; ++i)
      divisors.push_back(divisors[i] * power);
  }
}"><pre>std::vector&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt; divisors{<span class="pl-c1">1</span>};
<span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">auto</span> [p, cnt] : factors) {
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> size = <span class="pl-k">static_cast</span>&lt;<span class="pl-k">int</span>&gt;(divisors.<span class="pl-c1">size</span>());
  <span class="pl-k">int</span> power = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>;
  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> e = <span class="pl-c1">1</span>; e &lt;= cnt; ++e) {
    power *= p;
    <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> i = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; i &lt; size; ++i)
      divisors.<span class="pl-c1">push_back</span>(divisors[i] * power);
  }
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">若图的转移和质因数/约数有关，先预处理每个数的因子表，再 BFS，避免每次现场分解。</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">剪枝搜索</h3><a id="user-content-剪枝搜索" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 剪枝搜索" href="#剪枝搜索"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">适用：组合枚举、分组、因子拆分。核心是先排序，再用上下界、重复跳过、不可行提前返回。</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-c++ notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="std::sort(a.rbegin(), a.rend()); // 大元素优先，剪枝更强

auto dfs = [&amp;](auto &amp;&amp;self, int index, int current) -&gt; void {
  if (current &gt;= best)
    return; // 最优性剪枝
  if (index == n) {
    best = std::min(best, current);
    return;
  }

  for (int choice = 0; choice &lt; limit; ++choice) {
    if (!can_place(index, choice))
      continue; // 可行性剪枝
    place(index, choice);
    self(self, index + 1, current + cost(index, choice));
    undo(index, choice);
  }
};"><pre><span class="pl-en">std::sort</span>(a.rbegin(), a.rend()); <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 大元素优先，剪枝更强</span>

<span class="pl-k">auto</span> dfs = [&amp;](<span class="pl-k">auto</span> &amp;&amp;self, <span class="pl-k">int</span> index, <span class="pl-k">int</span> current) -&gt; <span class="pl-k">void</span> {
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (current &gt;= best)
    <span class="pl-k">return</span>; <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 最优性剪枝</span>
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> (index == n) {
    best = <span class="pl-c1">std::min</span>(best, current);
    <span class="pl-k">return</span>;
  }

  <span class="pl-k">for</span> (<span class="pl-k">int</span> choice = <span class="pl-c1">0</span>; choice &lt; limit; ++choice) {
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> (!<span class="pl-c1">can_place</span>(index, choice))
      <span class="pl-k">continue</span>; <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">//</span> 可行性剪枝</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">place</span>(index, choice);
    <span class="pl-c1">self</span>(self, index + <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, current + <span class="pl-c1">cost</span>(index, choice));
    <span class="pl-c1">undo</span>(index, choice);
  }
};</pre></div>
</article></div><div class="d-none"></div></section></div></div></div> </div> <!-- --> </div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="ScrollMarksContainer-module__scrollMarksContainer__Eu7uU" id="find-result-marks-container"></div><div class="d-none"></div><div class="d-none"></div></div> <!-- --> <!-- --> <script type="application/json" id="__PRIMER_DATA__R_1___">{"resolvedServerColorMode":"day"}</script></div>
</react-app>




  </div>

</turbo-frame>

    </main>
  </div>

  </div>

    <template id="snippet-clipboard-copy-button">
  <div class="zeroclipboard-container position-absolute right-0 top-0">
